Frankly, Joe Biden and the Democrat-controlled Senate have done nothing but try to turn America into a socialist wasteland. Policy after policy has done nothing but hurt hard-working Americans! It is time we make a change!

That's why I am reaching out to strong grassroots Conservatives like yourself to help me reach my End-Of-Month fundraising goal. **The Radical Left wants people like you and me who deeply care about our country to take a back seat while they run this country into the ground. name: Blake Masters
subject: A secret about our family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
We homeschool | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d100ecc6afb14611aac1a671c0b30727&_e=NWuHgquAmXkQSHY3kvWH1lBXBHHBqj3szaLkmk0SHxU58rn6CVcI217yVCTdpMXVpJfTmMiwErk6rHdBLo9m3bBJrA2815w88YkfTkHMZTdjOvLEoo3FSCSC4xKAWu82IDaHot59YNkh9ya6QLSVe0jk8fRArJv564lHT3jtSDbRfXeZ0YULjU7OiMHuE7182I39P160IEHySS8l6OzQ9wXMIpf3MmU4LvkMbz1C45P0UjsNP2tvxPehI0rViQ6lGYb-bVFy-maBdrbob5T3-pPAXj1oQZkgNWLYvXXAbZSXjcWXQ_YuU3I29kZuBHbHfjDGrz0r8QpVubKNnaTjeKBrOT8ZomkvJAkNgcOzlEm_izdroUCQlxcT_AWniHpa8payHIZ0xddmAbqWDHbWKmIScAQDz-S6ZrXuej-3lLEtVIn9hVlmAY7CPaO-orZ7SKia-NJpiGP-mdA4FiRwFA%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

I wanted to tell you a secret about my family. **We homeschool our sons. My wife and I thought that homeschooling was the best option for our family, and it's a decision we will never regret.**

While students in public school are learning wokeisms, challenging their privilege, and fussing over pronouns, my kids are learning real skills they'll need to succeed in life and real American history.

Democrats are trying to silence their opposition and to do that, they need to indoctrinate your children. **The Biden administration has already designated parents as _"Domestic Terrorists"_ because they want their children to learn math and science, not to hate their country.** You should be able to control your child's education without the FBI opening an investigation.

This overreach is beyond the scope of the government, but they will continue to meddle in your lives until we stop them. [**You didn't sign up to co-parent your children with the government, so why should you be forced to give them control over their lives.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d100ecc6afb14611aac1a671c0b30727&__Vc-Sxk42PQP0w9FGCvoqAOfGoNP4_mPeMMtK5DElbsnQe7fXCVTFpkKStzOVlUO3t3njvEmD8B9jaD18KYw0TX-pXIS-1G3mxkLcbZKxBejKagAAgkazH68P0W_7w%3D%3D)

[** ****STOP THE GOVERNMENTS
CO-PARENTING ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d100ecc6afb14611aac1a671c0b30727&__AnWxmS8fQOh8GYVC-qo6zWrO5v23UMZoLucpb-JCvuI03aS_U5K073u6JpapAWJIU-GueVtBVjSJrlysUu9MoQ84ZOqKXD7UIMw8SehUk9Xk0jNcJfJuV0R0o44NdjNEj97sJ4dcUVtjS8SytS8TfVex7w%3D%3D)
Parents should have the final say when it comes to their child's education. Government should get out of the way and let parents choose where their kids go to school and what they learn.

I want to stop the Left from indoctrinating your children. To do that, we first need to take back our Senate from the Democrats.

[**If you want to protect your kids and make sure they have what it takes to beat China in the future economy, will you make a $10 contribution to my campaign today?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d100ecc6afb14611aac1a671c0b30727&__xUkCUabT8DBYh-HTzwQMxkvvSpj601yq1sBCJGQQzoQDdSvt226EDhE_SApiwuTbJaYBQDX0YAABP7gir0Lox4Pw8eQPrAYmvNX8ibL5POw%3D%3D)

It's time to take back our country from the radical, socialist agenda that Democrats are pushing – and that starts with protecting our kids. [**If you agree, chip in $10 today?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d100ecc6afb14611aac1a671c0b30727&_e=NWuHgquAmXkQSHY3kvWH1lBXBHHBqj3szaLkmk0SHxU58rn6CVcI217yVCTdpMXVpJfTmMiwErk6rHdBLo9m3bBJrA2815w88YkfTkHMZTdjOvLEoo3FSCSC4xKAWu82IDaHot59YNkh9ya6QLSVe0jk8fRArJv564lHT3jtSDbRfXeZ0YULjU7OiMHuE7182I39P160IEHySS8l6OzQ9wXMIpf3MmU4LvkMbz1C45P0UjsNP2tvxPehI0rViQ6lpEB6nX9hFPLGVn8MFv9TnSIWnBAKmhhMXZPqT1Fl3_Vvi9YyyUeGz0FQY0l2JKQdLV2oBod5DhMMPoFEFBaEJysKsXHpfxfAfihKJ07QRvzcSSKKwQClnSTKdlxkwmIomIptDGCmj-3T-9k_-GPfil7fE4pSCbZd-NSIoo5RsF33V2nHukJPpZ023uTDqIBjBH1oGI5zQ9lDuiMamP-dew%3D%3D)

[** ****Chip in $10 ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d100ecc6afb14611aac1a671c0b30727&__UgdksP8Vl7fL-tnx9uCmSmIsLQjdtbD0Cru3JMXPOYx2WdljbfvhPuTpB-TRwkEoO680weF5zr59XqmGwBluWHY_uMY3Y34lxCrsgYARjKuGo2F0RYzhAG9Rdl-xMmhbGtP4yjI8DtmLH6loVtdux5iR5dv9dTu64SG7RGT6AQ%3D%3D)
**We are no longer just in a battle for the heart and soul of our nation; we are fighting to save our children.**

Thank you, Peter,

Blake Masters
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

clean_body: We homeschool | Peter, I wanted to tell you a secret about my family. We homeschool our sons. My wife and I thought that homeschooling was the best option for our family, and it's a decision we will never regret. While students in public school are learning wokeisms, challenging their privilege, and fussing over pronouns, my kids are learning real skills they'll need to succeed in life and real American history. Democrats are trying to silence their opposition and to do that, they need to indoctrinate your children. The Biden administration has already designated parents as "Domestic Terrorists" because they want their children to learn math and science, not to hate their country. You should be able to control your child's education without the FBI opening an investigation. This overreach is beyond the scope of the government, but they will continue to meddle in your lives until we stop them. Parents should have the final say when it comes to their child's education. Government should get out of the way and let parents choose where their kids go to school and what they learn. I want to stop the Left from indoctrinating your children. To do that, we first need to take back our Senate from the Democrats. It's time to take back our country from the radical, socialist agenda that Democrats are pushing – and that starts with protecting our kids. We are no longer just in a battle for the heart and soul of our nation; we are fighting to save our children. Thank you, Peter, Blake Masters Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona | | Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Dr. Mary L. Trump
subject: My uncle’s return to the White House is already underway
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Donald Trump hasn't gone anywhere -- and his grip on the Republican Party is as strong as it's ever been.
| | | _****_[](https://links.e.dccc.)
I was so proud to see Americans all across the country turn out in record numbers last year to defeat my uncle, Donald Trump.

But here's the hard truth: **Donald Trump hasn 't gone anywhere -- and his grip on the Republican Party is as strong as it's ever been.**

Since the day he left office, he's been plotting his return to the White House. And he's made it clear that it begins with the destruction of our Democratic House Majority.

That's why I'm reaching out today.

**We simply can 't afford a second Trump term -- but that's exactly what we could get if we lose our House Majority to Donald Trump's Republicans.**

[**So I 'm asking you personally: Can you join me in support of House Democrats nationwide by chipping in $3 to defend our House Majority? My uncle's return to the presidency -- and the fate of our democracy -- hang in the balance, so anything you can spare to protect our House Democrats would go a long way >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)
| | [**Chip in now >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)
---

There's no sugarcoating it: **We cannot allow Donald Trump ever to step foot in the White House again.**

The last time my uncle held power, he incited an insurrection, spread COVID-19 conspiracy theories, and pushed our democracy to its breaking point.

And even after all the destruction he caused, House Republicans are still lining up to pledge their absolute loyalty to him and pave the way for his return to power.

I refuse to sit on the sidelines and just watch as this worst-case scenario unfolds before my very eyes -- _**but I need you with me if we 're to put an end to this madness.**_

[**Please: Will you contribute $3 to defend our House Majority and defeat Donald Trump 's House Republicans all across the country? There are just 72 hours left before House Democrats' critical End of Month Deadline, so there's not a moment to lose. >>**](https://links.e.dccc.)
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_aGxf2z-)
---
| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thanks for joining me in this fight,

Mary L. Trump, PhD
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45855191&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMzExNjAxNQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45855191&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMzExNjAxNQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: 6 years ago, the good guys won

body:

Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4b5438fd41ef4df4af1806bafca55b05&_e=KiTuZQM8-7EZ3OagIHgdYEbeiLqwxJV6tJPiBBEkhKUB8rdvZh3HmUR94idnU_z95rDkRq_3S4-0BmdnE51jSUw2knRGt-fZFc5jVb0XFLlauUbEf8wK9zxmMYurIMTkhsROPyRnacUAvAbO1gOqXHhqbHb6cdXPIASRPRAoPNmWXIX2l60d6LdTFbGvVqeusY4Gt4Zs2Elv6f4GcJgvykGxCTauVqtzfGsX_QZMq6aPHM0OtwBrzPSdxVIHegPDr-9eFZ-o6WqAFrXBZ3nRbEG0q5aKDayUNfCZfkHaPPyfkQwls41fC734z4L4wdMsIF7loUJz07gkcID8JaGNrRXVKS4TOV0S5FwtQeLrH2_HoLkq3reDqXB1NJfnzMxDov5pJvh-psNZ9jA04sZ5QG_-9cv8US1k8fnUI9TgxqQhNR4xri4XENC7wO1BIpNw9adEpS1gBUah81DDqxOiCg%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4b5438fd41ef4df4af1806bafca55b05&_e=KiTuZQM8-7EZ3OagIHgdYEbeiLqwxJV6tJPiBBEkhKUB8rdvZh3HmUR94idnU_z95rDkRq_3S4-0BmdnE51jSUw2knRGt-fZFc5jVb0XFLlauUbEf8wK9zxmMYurIMTkhsROPyRnacUAvAbO1gOqXHhqbHb6cdXPIASRPRAoPNmWXIX2l60d6LdTFbGvVqeusY4Gt4Zs2Elv6f4GcJgvykGxCTauVqtzfGsX_QZMq6aPHM0OtwBrzPSdxVIHegPD5TiSkdOntLkgu_TtHIkrLjS4DCDvtIXN86h-gkv89g9AJksY1ff0-p16ZBeT9Ude-lH0MRg3Bxdr6XmMu0DNQ00q_ZtIzNatGOxNvdZ0YUCG3IXiO4z8qwtTHPy3F0ysBk0eTeHwW4YmHIAa6FWwXyDIB9m-IHMcGHM5vGK_7Lr4a22dp-arWfGPY-7owoCDfJl4b1O7q1pZZ8PZXe99iQ%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4b5438fd41ef4df4af1806bafca55b05&_e=KiTuZQM8-7EZ3OagIHgdYEbeiLqwxJV6tJPiBBEkhKUB8rdvZh3HmUR94idnU_z95rDkRq_3S4-0BmdnE51jSUw2knRGt-fZFc5jVb0XFLlauUbEf8wK9zxmMYurIMTkhsROPyRnacUAvAbO1gOqXHhqbHb6cdXPIASRPRAoPNmWXIX2l60d6LdTFbGvVqeusY4Gt4Zs2Elv6f4GcJgvykGxCTauVqtzfGsX_QZMq6aPHM0OtwBrzPSdxVIHegPD_ndN_FrLtzA2Ien16OsiTc214N8v6Mj6g019tVAjfOLHMWpGLl0tkWHZROAjnevwcx55nEMLXHjzMfa3E0pLxUua2N5UKCqmlahSxafArMwUwduvarYD7KQpPGBtd37d2lGu8OQ_-Sm1gB14tLun8u3ZiSjUd0btkDVLBZ8YdDk9UE-nfs7khmnUU17C41Zm7jMIQHeV_O7XL_5MTxzIkQ%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4b5438fd41ef4df4af1806bafca55b05&_e=KiTuZQM8-7EZ3OagIHgdYEbeiLqwxJV6tJPiBBEkhKUB8rdvZh3HmUR94idnU_z95rDkRq_3S4-0BmdnE51jSUw2knRGt-fZFc5jVb0XFLlauUbEf8wK9zxmMYurIMTkhsROPyRnacUAvAbO1gOqXHhqbHb6cdXPIASRPRAoPNmWXIX2l60d6LdTFbGvVqeusY4Gt4Zs2Elv6f4GcJgvykGxCTauVqtzfGsX_QZMq6aPHM0OtwBrzPSdxVIHegPD0ujC2-Kzx2vrjQq8vbgc-TJAnOFbBGJaUHNRBcJmG3LW0zLhdOVV7n1tBTlQ2Wnh4qJavoCwRWN5xqORnQulxVOBbgJN0eSMme3bMi_KU_qVxKEz9efB_79r9ufsWt27sUjgmpIT6BVdMI4EqZtQ0HlBYsN9_hmHSfLeZEMNlDHTiH3ym6ufM0j5TKqkkPtxWXpdFN6b36QSzfA6HwD3_Q%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4b5438fd41ef4df4af1806bafca55b05&_e=KiTuZQM8-7EZ3OagIHgdYEbeiLqwxJV6tJPiBBEkhKUB8rdvZh3HmUR94idnU_z95rDkRq_3S4-0BmdnE51jSUw2knRGt-fZFc5jVb0XFLlauUbEf8wK9zxmMYurIMTkhsROPyRnacUAvAbO1gOqXHhqbHb6cdXPIASRPRAoPNmWXIX2l60d6LdTFbGvVqeusY4Gt4Zs2Elv6f4GcJgvykGxCTauVqtzfGsX_QZMq6aPHM0OtwBrzPSdxVIHegPDjeXY-jvcIpnRXtxqCqNXNgFI_5tkPDVFPXJMOiBRrhzh0Xw8PX3FRDzMQCmITmshshGk-7a6U1tNS-v6495O77Ayxs-S50Yyuee0wIYm3cHH6Nef4PKlhW_a_hKwmqswbjhaZgfjTSMFNUZjhaqdM2wUo9HA4X0vaLcu7j9gffcHY-XNOViQwI1quiWd5Eac696pBbZJt6WZFC4kjrJrdw%3D%3D)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. name: Jerrod Sessler
subject: Don't miss the Sessler Session Live Show tonight at 6:30 PM
body:
Join Us for our virtual online event with Guest Eryn, a volunteer Legal Advocate with the WA Civil Rights Council [http://email.mg.jerrod4congress.com/c/eJwdj8uqwzAMRL8mWRrJL9mLLEqh25ZL98WJHdchiYMd6O9ftzCgYY6QGD8Ypwn6NHDgiMAtoLBCMGRGKOLqBmSvdCGtOglbZEsoJXs55T2WUCub8ta_B2VGPptxhlHLUZJ1MDcFwZUB64Tu1-F9nkftxKXjt6Z65uJiYDHnuAZ3pN-lBrYa6-5Lc49leXJ1n65_NFvjH5_Jnt-F4JNrE4kIpUX5QkBlJGpQAhFFS5RC0hqENqJBacDI186WI_Zl8McnrWuqmlqhuLm0fj__A9EKTD4]
Hi ,

Join us tonight at 6:30 PM PST for Sessler Session LIVE with Eryn. Eryn is a volunteer Legal Advocate with the WA Civil Rights
Council.

The WRCR is a citizen activist group that came together with a Constitutional lawyer to provide (free) documents and legal
strategies for any individual or business pushing back against the illegal vaccine mandates in WA state.

A must-see show for anyone facing vaccine mandates at work. Know your legal rights and how you can fight back.

Eryn will also be sharing some information about legal action against school boards enforcing mask mandates on children.

Check out the LIVE show broadcast on Facebook [http://email.mg.jerrod4congress.com/c/eJxdjcsKwyAUBb8mLkW9mqsLF6WQ_7A-EtukBg34-zXbwlkNh5lgtZuRkWwFE5wzYRgHA0A51aBQqIWheeIDZzVJdqz0HWstQfryXWtsjfpykM0aTElFFb3goAMPUQYM0iWlHCgNjOx2u66zTfCYxDLWe6fJ-fgq5XM7BvozD0KqDWfP-57bjCO_Hi7v9_sHVAk3Yw], Twitter [http://email.mg.jerrod4congress.com/c/eJwVjUEOhCAQBF8jRzLMKMiBw2YTP7AvQByVDa4GSPz-YtKXTqqrFzd6bUBEh4BKAVpQZImkkiMNBocJjH2bl9FD18OxyS_nfC59OH9b5lJkOA-xOx8wsLUre6X9CMQ9rmq12qCfWdMskttrvUpHrw6nlnrHWjk_89Y-zZQ4i-yW644pxaJNu9sOH9OD_AEgxDIm],
Rumble [http://email.mg.jerrod4congress.com/c/eJwVjcsKwyAURL8m7ire6-PGhYtQyH9oNKlFm6Ap_f0mMLM4MIeJbvSGBMsOBQIItAKklZIDH6Um1LMg-6SJjB6UqBt_p9b2qJb9s7XUO1_2yl5OI4JcFVIMMnnQSmkTVhWS8ikCJVbc6zyPPshpwPlK-9ZQ0m1fsNx9AOjRkmLNxeOXS8nd0PW5VZ_LPfwDqIQxUA] and YouTube [http://email.mg.jerrod4congress.com/c/eJwdjUEOgyAURE8jS_Lhg8iCRdPERbc9ASJVGiwGNKS3LzaZ2Uxe3sxmsL0CEgwHzhhwDQw1ImV0QKm4HEHpu7qpXnYCtoW-fc5pFi59luxLoS5tZDUCBlDSWYaAHrSfQKDsBydeHJ2yQKJZj2MvHd46PrbUWuk3ncc5-UvRFtf6-MufzRt9JtnMew0xhtKrdr5sNsQL_gGJiTXm].

If you miss the LIVE you can find the replay easily on our EVENTS [http://email.mg.jerrod4congress.com/c/eJxNjcsKwyAQRb8mLmXG18SFi1DIfxg1j2Ji0ND-ftNFoXB353BudL03BGxzAgQiCAsorZQceS81CT0C2QcNZHSnYF_4M9VaogrlWGpqjYeys9VhsMILbREDUT97SjiDQkPKxAhTYtmt13W2Tg6dGO9Nufxac6n_tRumVzquxqqL53vLeWuG7vNl91v-Gh_R2zcI] page.

name: Blake Masters
subject: The first step in silencing the opposition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
is controlling the educational system | [](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=7fb65af6338a4ddb85a1f10d824819d2&_e=F1OSVtnBLMILNW_JltCT_c-sL6UAY0doKK0dOIBpmt997m-h-uhsfxlwfjutZdVrFXw9sFZVNoOI0qNpB_6xhO7tBvp60Wbia0touaWugCnpBVwEqct-N-V9X-qVQ6tzyLv0be5CzbMl_sd26EFVcr--4b1AwPRhardv40Nx36YYWRkS9btHc3bk9uZI2uWLtS4bgHxRDeJlw3qIw-iZIK23VDHo6iM2dcwKKaKXKmt8Ne1T8yrfC962vvDQmsNoBqun-n9zkljKs7dcY5agdhafAnwNyvNWxb7OWzthZuuI-q79mv2bmy7eFmmw7Ve9rTv_niKM176UWFuGMN37H_5md4vnBT9IW3GeJo-8xll17RPxUwTtMWifA9OSnC-wIoucRzYz-q1w-B2YLy7YwyCpasgcQTflvr_N30NoZMjka-wT3cs7hTcf6sR3jjaQ0fxlY_oHGll7vGGDKy4Dkg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I wanted to tell you a secret about my family. **We homeschool our sons. My wife and I thought that homeschooling was the best option for our family, and it's a decision we will never regret.**

While students in public school are learning wokeisms, challenging their privilege, and fussing over pronouns, my kids are learning real skills they'll need to succeed in life and real American history.

Democrats are trying to silence their opposition and to do that, they need to indoctrinate your children. **The Biden administration has already designated parents as _"Domestic Terrorists"_ because they want their children to learn math and science, not to hate their country.** You should be able to control your child's education without the FBI opening an investigation.

This overreach is beyond the scope of the government, but they will continue to meddle in your lives until we stop them. [**You didn't sign up to co-parent your children with the government, so why should you be forced to give them control over their lives.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=7fb65af6338a4ddb85a1f10d824819d2&_e=F1OSVtnBLMILNW_JltCT_c-sL6UAY0doKK0dOIBpmt997m-h-uhsfxlwfjutZdVrFXw9sFZVNoOI0qNpB_6xhO7tBvp60Wbia0touaWugCnpBVwEqct-N-V9X-qVQ6tzyLv0be5CzbMl_sd26EFVcr--4b1AwPRhardv40Nx36YYWRkS9btHc3bk9uZI2uWLtS4bgHxRDeJlw3qIw-iZIK23VDHo6iM2dcwKKaKXKmt8Ne1T8yrfC962vvDQmsNoyHssy5TV9unVc2PJIdECMGSlCNu4K1P9nysdsVXWJj9XSFF2tyoQCiQWdXWxyyrj2ov1eIf0s5xtd0kTHQskStpc0SrcanlLPaQERBvzsE84fIaMGka20tyXwr9FDNZFZ7W41x4wvWozFeT0KKCD5_i9yPDPJjnihf9ry3WIpy6BfRZq8tkqYBr2HuqW5o1H9TgBIKntWYXn40_4xbL8mg%3D%3D)

[** ****STOP THE GOVERNMENTS
CO-PARENTING ➞ **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=7fb65af6338a4ddb85a1f10d824819d2&_e=F1OSVtnBLMILNW_JltCT_c-sL6UAY0doKK0dOIBpmt997m-h-uhsfxlwfjutZdVrFXw9sFZVNoOI0qNpB_6xhO7tBvp60Wbia0touaWugCnpBVwEqct-N-V9X-qVQ6tzyLv0be5CzbMl_sd26EFVcr--4b1AwPRhardv40Nx36YYWRkS9btHc3bk9uZI2uWLtS4bgHxRDeJlw3qIw-iZIK23VDHo6iM2dcwKKaKXKmt8Ne1T8yrfC962vvDQmsNoPBD69m0J2lk--Ezc6Zn2XN5Cq3TzWB12I-nCbDnpbSwBJ4MQFrTnYLSzDxdTdLF18Q2RqyXi_voy4h2mj2zYAcPWnDbWHSu2q7z743llpp3y3L_xoH-R80PkW23tTrBrmhJQ6ncPG1N6jCz8Sjjw_1Eaho5mrt75V4aXkrHyBWPTLTdykAmR8LtryJy0pdITXwAj8J2kc31ddM0SZC-TVw%3D%3D)
Parents should have the final say when it comes to their child's education. Government should get out of the way and let parents choose where their kids go to school and what they learn.

I want to stop the Left from indoctrinating your children. To do that, we first need to take back our Senate from the Democrats.

[**If you want to protect your kids and make sure they have what it takes to beat China in the future economy, will you make a $10 contribution to my campaign today?**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=7fb65af6338a4ddb85a1f10d824819d2&_e=F1OSVtnBLMILNW_JltCT_c-sL6UAY0doKK0dOIBpmt997m-h-uhsfxlwfjutZdVrFXw9sFZVNoOI0qNpB_6xhO7tBvp60Wbia0touaWugCnpBVwEqct-N-V9X-qVQ6tzyLv0be5CzbMl_sd26EFVcr--4b1AwPRhardv40Nx36YYWRkS9btHc3bk9uZI2uWLtS4bgHxRDeJlw3qIw-iZIK23VDHo6iM2dcwKKaKXKmt8Ne1T8yrfC962vvDQmsNopCK3Zl25cGhaRzqKSbtzhpR4m-tkTu71HYnbs7y2ynNsKeN7iIIcL1B9-EV7wVFbFTbup5BRrpwncTZfzd35M3r8bnnMsfBaJc624DhXVU2Ac85_-u9G-3GzDsIONHARCnHa_vAvy5JwTIiNvoJtm7Uh2-MvgDdNEeGMprCpHYNEFj0jHZXp2u2SvvNroMdEsg3t3muHhI9zP1lNTkfuQw%3D%3D)

It's time to take back our country from the radical, socialist agenda that Democrats are pushing – and that starts with protecting our kids. [**If you agree, chip in $10 today?**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=7fb65af6338a4ddb85a1f10d824819d2&_e=F1OSVtnBLMILNW_JltCT_c-sL6UAY0doKK0dOIBpmt997m-h-uhsfxlwfjutZdVrFXw9sFZVNoOI0qNpB_6xhO7tBvp60Wbia0touaWugCnpBVwEqct-N-V9X-qVQ6tzyLv0be5CzbMl_sd26EFVcr--4b1AwPRhardv40Nx36YYWRkS9btHc3bk9uZI2uWLtS4bgHxRDeJlw3qIw-iZIK23VDHo6iM2dcwKKaKXKmt8Ne1T8yrfC962vvDQmsNorvZsKDfS-dOfHW3S8Zh2FklZT2U3pV-ZpO4bo11DO6NU2Es1Rnwxc8fR59oHr2J1EZjvfvd1_d7raODb0mdntus_lznwIv9mQPh9TcpIcXbDTNtwAtDO58zQxA20-TaiVYSGhVP3XleEq4CCZDOboyWNNnv9EGQvFgzFoMHj06QGz9OrH7Jmgd46vcVCk9Xak64DT_kEBd1rHB1G8s412A%3D%3D)

[** ****Chip in $10 ➞ **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=7fb65af6338a4ddb85a1f10d824819d2&_e=F1OSVtnBLMILNW_JltCT_c-sL6UAY0doKK0dOIBpmt997m-h-uhsfxlwfjutZdVrFXw9sFZVNoOI0qNpB_6xhO7tBvp60Wbia0touaWugCnpBVwEqct-N-V9X-qVQ6tzyLv0be5CzbMl_sd26EFVcr--4b1AwPRhardv40Nx36YYWRkS9btHc3bk9uZI2uWLtS4bgHxRDeJlw3qIw-iZIK23VDHo6iM2dcwKKaKXKmt8Ne1T8yrfC962vvDQmsNoayHp1g66WlrmUJImjcopsPv5XVKKabsBeXErIFKsV8zdGL3uoyPVvh0KQqZQiiynEBLqj9pkWrveHneX8GWeos-GrHy5i6oNxdR3m2_rks1vYDrtA45uaDdbYkRbzu4OtCa78TqcfVDY6G2SpNeQ3jDCp5ICmVB-MZWW-pND670oR0m57owem5FYuBtUohkah68pcxW5rRyLWwRUTeMe_A%3D%3D)
**We are no longer just in a battle for the heart and soul of our nation; we are fighting to save our children.**

Thank you, Fellow Conservative,

Blake Masters
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

[** ****DONATE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=7fb65af6338a4ddb85a1f10d824819d2&_e=F1OSVtnBLMILNW_JltCT_c-sL6UAY0doKK0dOIBpmt997m-h-uhsfxlwfjutZdVrFXw9sFZVNoOI0qNpB_6xhO7tBvp60Wbia0touaWugCnpBVwEqct-N-V9X-qVQ6tzyLv0be5CzbMl_sd26EFVcr--4b1AwPRhardv40Nx36YYWRkS9btHc3bk9uZI2uWLtS4bgHxRDeJlw3qIw-iZIK23VDHo6iM2dcwKKaKXKmt8Ne1T8yrfC962vvDQmsNognSSsInk2PC5OUt4ORr2ZVsogffqd1w5ZVMyUbWr9d2BS0mC-JYkgLJRmxEEEwpLJwnqRlDMlBO_hgH7HWnYrRha_vSux5fJvnRajRBQqkhdTFtHa0QUXFP0j0FMpexHGP7yZ_Cgd_jrGmFx1_MRR6E46LYSsOgXRHrfSV_5Mm-zKhEXTOHYYt0ZW_OaB1-lxxyCewXODKiCuP4ukG44mQ%3D%3D)

| | **Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_s=7fb65af6338a4ddb85a1f10d824819d2&_t=nSx8OUklxU1man345huTyuCUIB2CkkGnQTgqhhaP3v4sPps_-YE_aE0MG_h6S2iwfmN088fdTty6rfRCoROmNWbMuWruficHmcKAbSYcDQ9N-Wc7qstuGqCRTXoNZCMe45mVYS6UqP-W_gZjAbxvYQ8P3-YsNYSrpGtN07T4LUg%3D)._

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Peter, we wanted to fill you in about what just happened:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, we wanted to fill you in about what just happened:
The pressure was once again increasing on progressives in Congress today to move forward only on a smaller physical infrastructure bill without agreed-upon legislative text for President Biden’s larger Build Back Better Act that makes long-overdue investments in working people, families, and our communities. [**
**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211028?refcode=em20211028-755&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=755_420207_2Mjp6s&akid=755%2E420207%2E2Mjp6s)
Pramila and progressives responded to this pressure by organizing together and saying what they have long made clear for months: **The popular Build Back Better Act — with childcare, housing, pre-K, health care, climate action, and much more — and the infrastructure bill go TOGETHER. It's not one or the other — it's BOTH.**
**[Can you show that you still have Pramila’s back and want her to fight for working people by chipping in $3 or whatever you can afford toward our movement right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211028?refcode=em20211028-755&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=755_420207_2Mjp6s&akid=755%2E420207%2E2Mjp6s) _We’re also coming up on an important end-of-month deadline at midnight on Sunday, and reaching our $25,000 goal is one of the best ways that we can show that our grassroots movement is strong and not going anywhere as we fight for the people:_**
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211028?refcode=em20211028-755&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=755_420207_2Mjp6s&akid=755%2E420207%2E2Mjp6s)**
Thanks for having Pramila’s back. It really makes a difference.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211028-755-footer&t=22&refcode2=755_420207_2Mjp6s&akid=755%2E420207%2E2Mjp6s)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

subject: President Trump’s new shirt is awesome
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
You need to see this
[](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJyNUcFu6yAQ_BrnhgWLHZyDD02j3ttTbxaBJaYy2MW4Uf6-a9fvHXqqhBCaHWZ3Zm0LpgFjDr4FDkJwOHEAWUMpyovkquZcCnVu-PmpKSp-97G0Y9SD_chpCVNpxnDoW-tsrZDLa308OQFoVQVQc6ucEVajOAxtn_M0F_KpgBc6M5olYUlyCe0qsmL6C5kOmLzR7GP0MTO3RJu0n328MSIFnzMiUQfMM7uN7Jp0pHHY3PuU2RcU8kWHcYm5kJeqLuC45NAFtH4JhGDQfuh6t-PzuCSDhAfTRU1nx40Ok_a3SJU9kqb73TDindGkpu_otSXhM5IkWdgd_BMbY8Ztnh-6mR5p_unVxcFbKny-fb4q5UC-b-C8gYqydPoqGAp7ZJU7NewqNGcVSCc5NlRUh9Ta6e6Hwc9HRcu5rf62jZCDwbtHW6hzAbAsJAmwhQ9_EV7J8Ex3fkz4_-cuWm4xrqi6fAMyq7eC)

Friend,

_**LET 'S GO BRANDON.**_

Sorry for the late email. I’m pretty stressed. We’re days away from our
end-of-month fundraising deadline and we’re not where we need to be.

$50,000 end-of-month goal and flip this open seat blue?

subject: Please Help Us Hit Our October Goal!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, can we count on you to help us hit our October goal?
Hi Peter,

First, I want to sincerely thank you. We have been able to hit our monthly fundraising goals the past few months. While we have made great progress, we cannot let up now with the 2022 election just over a year away.**[Will you help us reach our October goal before midnight on October 31?](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zbjhdt-idtjvlhlh-r/)** We need to do big things in 2022 to make up for Biden and Pelosi's mistakes. Under their incompetent leadership we have seen rising costs, more crime, a bloated bureaucracy, and a weaker America on the global stage.**But we cannot do it while we have a minority in the House. **If we want any chance of combating the overreach of government and restoring prosperity to America, we need to provide a check on the Democrat's power. **[Please donate before our midnight deadline on October 31st so we can continue our momentum into 2022 and create a brighter future for everyone in Southeast Wisconsin.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zbjhdt-idtjvlhlh-y/)** Thank you,Bryan

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Humbly asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | Peter,

I'm urgently reaching out to you with a humble request.

My election is in just 5 days, ballots are already being cast, and time and resources are running critically low.

We are so close to pulling off a victory in Virginia, but this race is so tight that every single dollar will make or break the outcome of this election.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58639207:J_8pWa2NR:m:1:3298722022:755D3802CC371893C77F0D0984652864:r "If you have anything to spare,
I’m humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58639207:J_8pWa2NR:m:1:3298722022:755D3802CC371893C77F0D0984652864:r)
---

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this governors race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

Winning in Virginia will set the tone for 2022, but we're running out of time. _**[That's why I'm hoping you'll step up with any amount you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58639207:J_8pWa2NR:m:1:3298722022:755D3802CC371893C77F0D0984652864:r "That’s
why I’m hoping you’ll step up with any amount you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1. ")**_

_We can win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe in a dead heat with less than a week to go._

---
|
---

**But, the latest polls make fully funding these final days even more critical.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in right away to help me win the race for governor in just 5 days?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58639207:J_8pWa2NR:m:1:3298722022:755D3802CC371893C77F0D0984652864:r "So, can I please count on you to
pitch in right away to help me win the race for governor in just 5 days?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Glenn Youngkin

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58639207:J_8pWa2NR:m:1:3298722022:755D3802CC371893C77F0D0984652864:r)

I'm focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values.

Please help me fight back against the Democrats and their radical agenda. We can only defeat them if we stand united.

**[Will you join my team today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58639208:J_8pWa2NR:m:1:3298722022:755D3802CC371893C77F0D0984652864:r "Will you join my team today?")**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2pstk0mkvkvotb0iahnu0g0anhasdero2cr3rg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clg68or2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc4fjo2qjgjekvn77tuv0iuq9cpgto87sc3gva40_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clg68or2c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq21a5gql0o551f6rloiujoeh31ul78he65a6mp0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clg68or2c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3baa46dhi77khrqkri45n7ufnishhpviirb53m0_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1po6gmh5ahp921ajlkkbfue0n737nclrpvev4c0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clg68or2c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8918%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=B583oAVSpcxgm5tPgYWZJw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16365%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6VAZFzut6MkbNxrMFQv3NA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16366%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ppQasWJDfC2jixDhfL08Fg&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16367%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BM9d3gngLMXz2k1bdBL3sw&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8918%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=B583oAVSpcxgm5tPgYWZJw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8918%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=B583oAVSpcxgm5tPgYWZJw&sysid=1)

body:
But I need your help in this fight
---
| | | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H3q-r-A4wUynNnNrwTl6qMFK2UtM3RnXtsh3Vi189XaGtDN1MNf66NhLO5-cbFUr6qYC9WabR7Hr9N0MEKgVC8isW9PbJYlv6LuA85JEQBJlzFV-LKbVyoErvVbqsM3nRChm6IrCCnHca60ZPK-eHroq9eCdCs_aVlHMPqSAYOjaWwzJV3eTc6ia8AJBTS7i&c=Qkz8tMxeq_fqycvIqfKTi6mnxXxcXbT2Rgfa9hRnDGzsE0Jk8N_1rA==&ch=XP6Sk_pNK7fLUqO0lfuowgRBoXQ0aSjt9_zGPtAPkCGjMZAec7XwbA==)

| Peter,

Congress as it stands is a hotbed of corruption thanks to generation after generation of career politicians. And at this rate, it's not getting better anytime soon.
We have to act fast if we want to put a halt to the special interest and liberal elites that grow fat off the backs of hard-working Americans and push destructive ideas like Critical Race Theory to our children.
That is why I have made a VOW to make Term Limits on Congress one of my first priorities once elected as your next Congressman.
See my full video on this here:

That is why I have made a VOW to make Term Limits on Congress one of my first priorities once elected as your next Congressman. See my full video on this here: | == | With your support, I can introduce Term Limits to Congress and start the process to hold these career politicians accountable for the damage done to our great nation. Are you with me in this fight? | | | == | Every dollar brings me closer to D.C. to fight for our freedoms here in Georgia and across the country. Together we can put an end to the special interest game once and for all and put Americans First in our government. | In Liberty, Marc McMain Congressional Candidate for GA-10 | | | == | | | | Connect with us == == | | | == | | | Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc. | | | Marc McMain for Congress, Inc. | P.O. He’s literally trying to buy the governor’s office, Derek!

Meanwhile, our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days. I need your help so we can kick it into high gear in the final week of this race — this is really urgent because we’re running out of time.

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Humbly asking for your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | Peter,

I'm urgently reaching out to you with a humble request.

My election is in just 5 days, ballots are already being cast, and time and resources are running critically low.

We are so close to pulling off a victory in Virginia, but this race is so tight that every single dollar will make or break the outcome of this election.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58641086:6v6MJa2No:m:1:3298722022:DBFC2059E57B5D50DE19A39DD273219D:r "If you have anything to spare,
I’m humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58641086:6v6MJa2No:m:1:3298722022:DBFC2059E57B5D50DE19A39DD273219D:r)
---

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this governors race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

Winning in Virginia will set the tone for 2022, but we're running out of time. _**[That's why I'm hoping you'll step up with any amount you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58641086:6v6MJa2No:m:1:3298722022:DBFC2059E57B5D50DE19A39DD273219D:r "That’s
why I’m hoping you’ll step up with any amount you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1. ")**_

_We can win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe in a dead heat with less than a week to go._

---
|
---

**But, the latest polls make fully funding these final days even more critical.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in right away to help me win the race for governor in just 5 days?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58641086:6v6MJa2No:m:1:3298722022:DBFC2059E57B5D50DE19A39DD273219D:r "So, can I please count on you to
pitch in right away to help me win the race for governor in just 5 days?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Glenn Youngkin

clean_body: | | Peter, I'm urgently reaching out to you with a humble request. My election is in just 5 days, ballots are already being cast, and time and resources are running critically low. We are so close to pulling off a victory in Virginia, but this race is so tight that every single dollar will make or break the outcome of this election. "If you have anything to spare, I’m humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections." | | | If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this governors race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools. If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory. Winning in Virginia will set the tone for 2022, but we're running out of time. "That’s why I’m hoping you’ll step up with any amount you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1. " We can win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe in a dead heat with less than a week to go. | But, the latest polls make fully funding these final days even more critical. Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Friend, even the bureaucrats at the NIH have had to admit it now...

**I was right - Dr. Fauci was wrong.**

_He sent thousands of taxpayer dollars to the Wuhan lab that most likely invented COVID-19. _
_He repeatedly authorized gain-of-function grants for that lab._
_He lied straight to my face about it - a bunch of times - under oath. _

_And still, he thinks he won’t have to be held accountable for it all._ But I want to prove him wrong. _T_ _hat’s why I had my team set up a huge end-of-month MONEYBOMB to help prove the momentum is on my side and we WILL FIRE FAUCI. _

Will you help me reach it by chipping in now?

Friend, you know me. And you know exactly how hard I’ll fight to expose the power-hungry leftists for what they really are.

_We’ve seen the progress already. _

The NIH is turning on Fauci because they know we will NOT let up in our efforts to find the truth.

We can’t afford to slow down now.

[**Please, chip in what you can before the end-of-month deadline.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbj40vovfer3s95kiasqp788thpkv3aacjpbl4kg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clg6eo32clh2bs)

| | Friend, We've made tremendous progress in the last twelve hours. Our statewide network has greatly expanded and we are so close to reaching our goal of 25 donors from your zip code. **We only need 8 more!** _[**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Byhw9SdFAkLDNxzQ_-B31KiXLwY7n3H7RV9lgOzCMnc=/bz7gOmfXs9fB5wRElUoiM9B0IdNp-IRCMM9YvlhXGbY=?refcode=102921)_ Will you make a contribution today to help our cause? Thank you, Mark Warren Finance Director P.S. Minnesotans can make a $50 (or $100 per couple) contribution to the House DFL once per year and receive a full refund from the state. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: House DFL Team <house@dflhouse.com> Date: Thurs, Oct 28, 2021 at 7:02 PM Subject: We need 25 donors from 55783 Friend, In a week and a half we will be one year out from Election Day 2022. This coming election is shaping up to be even more important than the 2020 election. Even though we succeeded in kicking hatred and division out of the White House, those same forces are coming roaring back. **Historically, the president 's party has a tough path ahead in the midterm elections. From reproductive freedom to safeguarding our democracy, there is too much on the line.** That's why we are writing to you today. **We are looking for just 25 donors from your area to help bolster our odds next year.** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ _[**Contribute $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Byhw9SdFAkLDNxzQ_-B31KiXLwY7n3H7RV9lgOzCMnc=/bz7gOmfXs9fB5wRElUoiM9B0IdNp-IRCMM9YvlhXGbY=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=102921)_ _[**Contribute $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Byhw9SdFAkLDNxzQ_-B31KiXLwY7n3H7RV9lgOzCMnc=/bz7gOmfXs9fB5wRElUoiM9B0IdNp-IRCMM9YvlhXGbY=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=102921)_ _ _ _[**Contribute $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Byhw9SdFAkLDNxzQ_-B31KiXLwY7n3H7RV9lgOzCMnc=/bz7gOmfXs9fB5wRElUoiM9B0IdNp-IRCMM9YvlhXGbY=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=102921)_ _[**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Byhw9SdFAkLDNxzQ_-B31KiXLwY7n3H7RV9lgOzCMnc=/bz7gOmfXs9fB5wRElUoiM9B0IdNp-IRCMM9YvlhXGbY=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=102921)_ We know that this coming election will be a tough one, but with your support we can protect and even expand our House DFL Majority. **If we slip this election, it won 't be long before Minnesota looks like Texas.** House Republicans have already pledged to introduce anti-choice legislation and have a long history of introducing anti-transgender youth bills and voting restrictions -- it's not unreasonable to assume it would happen again. Will you stand with us and help hold off Republican extremism in the Minnesota Legislature? Thank you, House DFL Team P.S. | Peter
A CNN cameraman threatened to kill me recently, so nothing CNN does surprises me at this point.
It's very on-brand for America's Democrat propaganda network to embrace the campaign of Rebekah Jones, AKA Florida's Fauci...
CNN couldn't pass up the chance to make sure this "scientist" gets plenty of free airtime in her pursuit to take my seat in Congress. After all, they were the ones who promoted Rebekah Jones's debunked COVID conspiracies from the start!
If you don't know the backstory, Rebekah Jones was FIRED from her job after she claimed that Ron DeSantis and Florida health officials instructed her to manipulate COVID-19 data to make it appear more favorable. As it turns out, Jones never even had access to that information or the ability to change it in any way. Before that, she was also fired from her position as a college professor for stalking one of her students, vandalizing his car, and releasing revenge porn against the student.
With the real Dr. Fauci flailing after his latest scandal involving the funding of PUPPY ABUSE, let's make sure Florida's Fauci also gets laughed out of the state. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: This is stunning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
I’ll be blunt, Peter. The Virginia governor’s race is the most important in the country in 2021 and recent polls show a tied race.
With so much on the line for Virginia and our country. I’m stunned that more members of our grassroots team aren’t stepping up and donating right now.
**[We’re days away from Election Day. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Abby Finkenauer to help stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin from winning in Virginia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38054027/313784357/-688926594?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk358-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjkyMDY3OS1iMDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-M8JHvOAEC12ju3BkgmD0iMKvppH7usscsis1tvChg=)**
I mean, think about it:

My opponent Glenn Youngkin said he is running to be Virginia’s governor because of Donald Trump. And media outlets like the Washington Post are reporting that Youngkin is undermining our democracy by “playing footsie with the ‘big lie.’”
And, with Roe v. Wade hanging on by a thread, Glenn Youngkin could bring a Texas-style abortion ban to Virginia.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Florida’s Fighting Back Against Biden
body:
In Florida, the opportunity to earn a living WILL NOT be deprived due to mandates that are nothing more than government power grabs.
To view this email as a web page, go [here.](https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c9ea95b06f53795068301f4c0a3e88492fd1a26ef64ccf47047b6820d336b1608ad26f488e739ba94a92ae8238d409ad4da5edb99754d08af6e2854b0311e729ad172da8029d799b)
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5a1f456ed9e88f3fa35001e42391054dafe96b5be9900c9baa7e256d2df58236a951de6101c8aab107b0e344b65dc2e36fce3d9b2dac2f04)
---
Peter,

I'm fighting back against Joe Biden's heavy handed vaccine mandates. Florida's workers shouldn't be terminated due to Joe Biden's unlawful and unconstitutional political whims.

**We somehow went from "15 days to slow the spread" to "3 jabs or lose your job." Biden's mandates are about expanding government control; they are based on politics, not science.** **[HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT- CHIP IN $15 NOW](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5a1f456ed9e88f3f285a8ec6070a40f2184ccac4d8a0bbb0fb6dd191a14da929360805f5fb915b9a2c529bb28831969dec46042623fb2b07 "HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT – CHIP IN $15 NOW")** In Florida, the opportunity to earn a living WILL NOT be deprived due to mandates that are nothing more than government power grabs. In many cases, Joe Biden now wants to fire people who have been working and earning a living throughout the entire pandemic. These workers don't deserve to get kicked to the curb by the federal government.

_**We 're fighting back in Florida.**_ Joe Biden and his henchmen aren't going to use obscure provisions and loopholes to jam regulations down your throat and put you out of a job.

We're suing the Biden administration for their vaccine mandates that are going to put federal contractors out of work. Any time this administration steps out of line to infringe on the liberty of Floridians, _**I 'll be there to get in their way.**_ **[CHIP IN $15>>
CHIP IN $10 >>
CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5a1f456ed9e88f3fd5d15ecf1c5a330a85bb6f3950b1b79569dc0cf0b62c3ef730d4a62253c1d628431224c0815b3007fa918b3c7357b643 "CHIP IN $15 >>CHIP IN $10 >>CHIP IN $5 >>")** At a time when our national economy is crumbling under the disastrous policies of the Biden administration, Joe Biden wants to implement illegal policies that will only exacerbate these problems. Our Constitution is not an Etch A Sketch that Joe Biden can edit to fit his woke political fantasies. _**We stand up for workers in Florida - No ifs, ands, or buts about it.**_

**[Peter, help me continue the fight for Florida's workers by chipping in $15, $10, or $5 now. Together, we WILL keep Florida FREE and continue our fight to defend our freedoms and liberties.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5a1f456ed9e88f3fe4048aa31564b8367723f89c79a4fa839ef5b2eb387df466620bc606dd044de07da0cd8137f4f0159a3ec13e3cceb982 "Peter, help me continue the fight for Florida’s workers by chipping in $15, $10, or $5 now. Together, we WILL keep Florida FREE and continue our fight to defend our freedoms and liberties.")**
---
|
---
Ron DeSantis
---

body:
I’m asking for your help to stop it

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38054839/313786530/-844928598?refcode=BLU-KING-20211029-P-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VjNzExMS1iNjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GfSqGSwUvPlt8jConPcxGscTrw5b49u6gpWRYJP0sek=)

Peter,

I’m going to get to the point because we’re running out of time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021.

Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the pledge of allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection.

Peter, we only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong.

[_**If you’re with me, and you want to keep Virginia blue, pitch in right now by making a split donation between my campaign and John King.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38054840/313786531/-844928598?refcode=BLU-KING-20211029-P-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VjNzExMS1iNjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GfSqGSwUvPlt8jConPcxGscTrw5b49u6gpWRYJP0sek=)

This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now.

We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday.

With polls STILL tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism.

[_**Will you split a donation right now between John King and my campaign to ensure we turn out all the voters we need on Tuesday?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38054841/313786532/-844928598?refcode=BLU-KING-20211029-P-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VjNzExMS1iNjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GfSqGSwUvPlt8jConPcxGscTrw5b49u6gpWRYJP0sek=)

clean_body: I’m asking for your help to stop it | = Peter, I’m going to get to the point because we’re running out of time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021. Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the pledge of allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection. Peter, we only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong. = This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now. We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday. With polls STILL tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m up against a Trump-loving guy who has promised to go on offense and ban abortion if he’s elected. The only way the stakes could be higher would be if I were up against Donald Trump himself. Friend,

Terry McAuliffe is officially scared.

**Terry knows he can’t win, so he is bringing in Stacey Abrams, Kamala Harris, Joe Biden, and even Jill Biden to campaign on his behalf.** He needs the help of corrupt career politicians who campaign on stale political ideas...that do not work.

Terry McAuliffe is officially showing how desperate he is. | [**KEEP TERRY SCARED**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm148fj2esn7fa8dj4nhsm5aj2lajp8a4vvtg8ng_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cli64ob2chh2bs)

[**A very generous donor has offered to DOUBLE every single donation from now until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to help keep up the momentum.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zet866vmp71l6b4gqdm7aq62je7k128bl7ao8s70_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cli64ob2chh2bs)

**We are about to make a statement that will reverberate across this great country, and I hope you will join me.** [**DOUBLE YOUR DONATION HERE**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk5h7vr3acrqcvsjm8qes8fei4p1ma6dee95ecd0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cli64ob2chh2bs)

| | Derek,

This is 2021’s most important race, so I want to tell you directly why I’m running to be Virginia’s next Governor.

We are running an historic campaign here in Virginia. Not only are we building the largest grassroots movement in Virginia history, but we’re running a campaign that speaks to the issues that matter most to Virginians.

And that’s exactly why I’m running.

I’m running because every single Virginia child deserves a **quality education** — which is why I will make the largest-ever investment in education in the Commonwealth’s history.

I’m running because every Virginian has a right to **affordable, quality health care** and prescription medications.

I’m running because we need a leader who will champion initiatives to **curb gun violence** in Virginia.

I’m running because it's long past time for innovative strategies to secure our **clean energy future.**

And Derek, I’m running because every single person in our Commonwealth deserves to live in a state where they have opportunities for success.

_**[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll support my campaign today by chipping in whatever amount makes sense for you. subject: Control of the Senate hinges on Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38056640/313794778/-420428835?refcode=20211029_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGRmMjE5Yy1iOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRgONEgV13EkOK4tumTTafQtjtjhgKkUbUCgnu3Ar94=) Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection next year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38056641/313794779/-392698372?refcode=20211029_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGRmMjE5Yy1iOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRgONEgV13EkOK4tumTTafQtjtjhgKkUbUCgnu3Ar94=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38056642/313794780/-420428835?refcode=20211029_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGRmMjE5Yy1iOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRgONEgV13EkOK4tumTTafQtjtjhgKkUbUCgnu3Ar94=)
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38056643/313794781/-392698372?refcode=20211029_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGRmMjE5Yy1iOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRgONEgV13EkOK4tumTTafQtjtjhgKkUbUCgnu3Ar94=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38056644/313794782/-420428835?refcode=20211029_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGRmMjE5Yy1iOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRgONEgV13EkOK4tumTTafQtjtjhgKkUbUCgnu3Ar94=)

But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat. That's why we have to fight back now – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late: = I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Peter, Humbly asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | Peter,

I'm urgently reaching out to you with a humble request.

My election is in just 4 days, ballots are already being cast, and time and resources are running critically low.

We are so close to pulling off a victory in Virginia, but this race is so tight that every single dollar will make or break the outcome of this election.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58642180:JNT89a2NJ:m:1:3253819041:1DCD81361E4214DC5A42AF25CF2C8F45:r "If you have anything to spare,
I’m humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58642180:JNT89a2NJ:m:1:3253819041:1DCD81361E4214DC5A42AF25CF2C8F45:r)
---

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this governors race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

Winning in Virginia will set the tone for 2022, but we're running out of time. _**[That's why I'm hoping you'll step up with any amount you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58642180:JNT89a2NJ:m:1:3253819041:1DCD81361E4214DC5A42AF25CF2C8F45:r "That’s why I’m hoping you’ll step up with any amount you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1. ")**_

_We can win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe in a dead heat with less than a week to go._

---
|
---

**But, the latest polls make fully funding these final days even more critical.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in right away to help me win the race for governor in just 4 days?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58642180:JNT89a2NJ:m:1:3253819041:1DCD81361E4214DC5A42AF25CF2C8F45:r "So, can I please count on you to
pitch in right away to help me win the race for governor in just 5 days?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Glenn Youngkin

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58642180:JNT89a2NJ:m:1:3253819041:1DCD81361E4214DC5A42AF25CF2C8F45:r)

I'm focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values.

Please help me fight back against the Democrats and their radical agenda. We can only defeat them if we stand united.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Troubling shortfall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=jm2ZGdgXhSdYhImsg8oboiBsSaI3YUhb&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
I just hung up with my finance director five minutes ago and I have some unfortunate news: We are $12,000 short of what we need to raise this month with just 72 hours left to make up this troubling shortfall.
Forgive me for being blunt, but Senate control is on the line here. With a 50-50 Senate, we can't afford to take _any_ seat for granted. That's why we set such ambitious fundraising goals, and why I count on this team to pull through. If we don't, we give Mitch McConnell the upper hand and put this seat - and control of the entire Senate - at risk of falling into the GOP's hands.
So Friend, I'm humbly asking you for a contribution so we can make up this fundraising shortfall - and I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why your contribution is so important.
The Republican Party is beholden to one thing and one thing only. It's not the American people. It's not their constituents. It's not even our precious democracy. It's Donald J. Trump. The twice-impeached, disgraced, former president has taken over the GOP - and their consistent submission to his will is why a Republican-controlled Senate is so dangerous. **Right now, the select committee investigating the Jan. 6 insurrection is investigating whether Republican members of Congress aided violent insurrectionists that attacked our Capitol.**
Even after revelations exposed Donald Trump's pressure tactics on his acting attorney general to weaponize the Department of Justice to overturn the election results, Republicans continue to consolidate around and defend Trump. **We are only able to hold the former president and his accomplices accountable because Democrats control Congress. If we lose control, Trump 's party will usher in chaos, obstruction, and attacks on our democratic institutions the likes of which we've never seen.**
I know this may sound extreme, but as someone who has been in committee hearings with a front-row seat to Donald Trump's wrongdoings, I can tell you that it's the reality of what we're facing. That's why we cannot leave a single dollar on the table when it comes to protecting Democratic control of the Senate - and right now, you can help ensure Mitch McConnell does not win back a majority.
**[Please, will you make a contribution of $5 or more- whatever you can spare to help me make up this fundraising shortfall - to ensure we have the resources to fight GOP attacks and protect this Senate seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1088-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you for your support.
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1088-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=fxcfMQLjUIL7r6xaWQLNCSBsSaI3YUhb&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: FW: Whitmer is failing, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Have you seen the poll? 78% disapprove of Governor Whitmer’s handling of the Benton Harbor water catastrophe. | | | |
---
| | |
#### Have you seen the latest poll?
## 78% disapprove of Governor Whitmer’s handling of the Benton Harbor water catastrophe.
_The Marketing Resource Group (MRG) polled 600 Michigan voters between October 18-24._
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| 78% disapprove! That's a huge number and spells big trouble for "Big Gretch."

Peter, for two years Whitmer knew of the dangerous water conditions in Benton Harbor and she did nothing. She did not warn Benton Harbor residents about dangerous lead in their drinking water. She still hasn’t.

I’ve been at the forefront of this issue. I’ve written about it, and I’ve taken action where I could.

You can read my editorial here: [Passing the buck in Benton Harbor](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=380cce97ab&e=0636b97700)

Just yesterday, I volunteered at the Abundant Life Church to distribute water for the citizens in Benton Harbor. I like getting my hands dirty and working so it was a pleasure to work with all the young men and women of Benton Harbor that were volunteering.
---
|
---
---
| **This water catastrophe is just that, a catastrophe. And it didn’t need to happen._Gretchen Whitmer must be held accountable_.**

Sitting in long lines waiting for cases of bottled water is no way to live for any community in the State of Michigan.

Every citizen in the state has my commitment that the entire government and the State of Michigan will be focused and will execute their respective duties. We’re not going to drop the ball like the Whitmer administration.

This should have never occurred and now this community will be playing catch-up for several years. And no one knows the long-term health ramifications.

**Help me defeat Gretchen Whitmer.** _Let’s put real, conservative leadership in charge and kick out the radical democrats who are ruining our great state_.

Please take a minute and make a donation to my campaign. Any amount will help.

**Can you spare $10 or $20? How about $50 or $100?**
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=7251f773a6&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY")
---
| __**It’s time to Dump Whitmer.**__ But I need your help now.

Please make a donation today. You won’t regret it.

Thank you.

Michael Brown
_Candidate for Governor_

PS – our "Dump Whitmer" yard signs are available now in our campaign store. Check them out.
---
