clean_body: Have you seen the poll? 78% disapprove of Governor Whitmer’s handling of the Benton Harbor water catastrophe. | | | | | | | Have you seen the latest poll? 78% disapprove of Governor Whitmer’s handling of the Benton Harbor water catastrophe. The Marketing Resource Group (MRG) polled 600 Michigan voters between October 18-24. | | | | 78% disapprove! That's a huge number and spells big trouble for "Big Gretch." Peter, for two years Whitmer knew of the dangerous water conditions in Benton Harbor and she did nothing. She did not warn Benton Harbor residents about dangerous lead in their drinking water. She still hasn’t. I’ve been at the forefront of this issue. I’ve written about it, and I’ve taken action where I could. You can read my editorial here: Just yesterday, I volunteered at the Abundant Life Church to distribute water for the citizens in Benton Harbor. I like getting my hands dirty and working so it was a pleasure to work with all the young men and women of Benton Harbor that were volunteering. | | This water catastrophe is just that, a catastrophe. And it didn’t need to happen.Gretchen Whitmer must be held accountable. Sitting in long lines waiting for cases of bottled water is no way to live for any community in the State of Michigan. Every citizen in the state has my commitment that the entire government and the State of Michigan will be focused and will execute their respective duties. We’re not going to drop the ball like the Whitmer administration. This should have never occurred and now this community will be playing catch-up for several years. And no one knows the long-term health ramifications. Help me defeat Gretchen Whitmer. Let’s put real, conservative leadership in charge and kick out the radical democrats who are ruining our great state. Please take a minute and make a donation to my campaign. Any amount will help. Can you spare $10 or $20? How about $50 or $100? | | "DONATE TODAY" | It’s time to Dump Whitmer. But I need your help now. Please make a donation today. You won’t regret it. Thank you. Michael Brown Candidate for Governor PS – our "Dump Whitmer" yard signs are available now in our campaign store. Check them out. | | "VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE" | Contributions to Michael Brown for Governor are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle. | | Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P.O. Box 23 • Stevensville, MI 49127 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@captainmikeformichigan.com | | Copyright © 2021 Michael Brown for Governor, All rights reserved.

As LBR’s Outreach Coordinator, it’s not my job to raise money, but it is my job to make sure Delawareans know exactly what LBR has been doing for them in Congress and how crucial the 2022 elections will be.

Both of those require one thing: **grassroots donors.**

**[Before I go on, can you chip in $5 to hit our October goal and make sure I have the resources to get this job done? To keep our House majority, we have to build our campaign infrastructure _now._ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38065458/313824281/-796730906?refcode=EM_fr_211029eom3_eom_jw_actives_6_ng_na_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjc5YWQwYS1jMzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpjfIyTQsavPbN6Q88B8_GKKi-R_ar97bQbrJ4uE2tk=)**

LBR is one of the most effective members of Congress, and Republicans know that if they can flip Delaware and replace her with a do-nothing Trump supporter, they’ll make it that much harder for the Biden Administration to continue to get things done.

Our team is working hard behind the scenes to lay the groundwork for a successful campaign, but right now, we need your help.

Peter, Our end-of-month deadline is on a weekend this month, and not just any weekend.

**It’s Halloween weekend.**

Our fundraising team hates when deadlines fall on the weekend, especially a holiday, because it usually means people are less engaged and not reading our emails. **[So we won’t keep you that long today. If you already know what’s at stake in this election, rush a donation of $10 now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38067032/313827006/-1337061357?refcode=EM_FR_211029EOM_N_TL_90DA_5_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmI2ODViZi1jNDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GLEwUIOjsSfNUyRqca2xSJMXMBGMv0IbiMpRbtB9ddE=)**

For those who are still reading this important message, we’re going to break down why it’s so critical that we keep hitting our deadlines every month:
1. Ron Johnson is raising millions of dollars towards his re-election campaign. If we’re not able to match that, then this seat is at risk of staying in Mitch McConnell’s hands.
2. We’ve seen how delicate the balance of power is hanging in this country. If we lose a **_SINGLE SENATE SEAT_** , we can say goodbye to any progress on anything that would help working families and our country move forward.
3. Everything from access to reproductive healthcare, to voting rights, to infrastructure is on the line. Ron Johnson will happily continue to obstruct and chip away at our rights, and we can’t let him win.

**[We hope we’ve made it clear why we need you to help us hit our October fundraising goal. subject: What issues matter to you?
body:
We’re relying on supporters like you to tell us what you want to see accomplished in Maryland. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/OllgZHPBxi5Nj1ruZQeQpwBj2yY3qrjjXDqCsubFGRpgnVewgtvgh6qNOeYPs4heNJgLarV4quNEJed3WxYi21vD2fBIdcIh9cItjOmZ4a7WOSogTkq98lh4dgY2ZNSetPbTq5c1s8i6znJrTjxTxSiq0n0JfMyFVe_lYWc8zrsexyaWKwqXv1J8XP7NL3eVyfJJKjQwAUOrERahQrzSoqzEb2qMA3Ff5DcKKlywFk7nZctapH4Yn1W_Qsln04Tp/3gk/JZ-qd8YdS-2T-LZ4c7rNwA/h0/_-aX8uazPxuk_uq1gxQN-Ro2NWSK1aXIeexibZLooLw) Hi friends, We’re building the Gansler for Governor campaign by and for all Marylanders. But to do that, we need your help. [**We want to hear from you! Can you take a minute to answer our survey?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkqmZM1HE0RCl785OLuUMmPNkicraglSVLrWVOndckyCM4Y3F-FcqFI6u6sxTekKG9VQU0nwf-Cd_1SjLY2gBUqmXs1S_1bn-btVv-9o1lzSZIL03zKPO-Yu30rHJvDBMQhPxi9WvVzDBIeHgiwqpjQFGejVYc8RW7b6opxYl6h89AH3X6xTjgGvHF6KPVHhjKTZka4HmYGw9EhjzOoyGmP60UGBMsF7HFUJxWpAX02zg/3gk/JZ-qd8YdS-2T-LZ4c7rNwA/h1/sf-qMrFRsdkNjF18scmiNtpaMyQAEBXtnz9fcC9YbRE) Tell us what issues are important to you. This campaign starts with a **_bold_** agenda to:
* Provide affordable childcare for every Maryland family.
* Make Maryland the national leader on climate change with 100% clean energy.
* Close gaps of opportunity through universal pre-K.
* Legalize and tax marijuana to pay for the investments our state needs.

This list is just the beginning. We’re relying on supporters like you to tell us what you want to see accomplished in our beautiful state. **[Make your voice heard. Click to share your ideas!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkqmZM1HE0RCl785OLuUMmPNkicraglSVLrWVOndckyCM4Y3F-FcqFI6u6sxTekKG9VQU0nwf-Cd_1SjLY2gBUq-Oe_EbIDiMDbNIiijdUegqGuXtPFu8mlTsJfQNAdhYKKJYBcy84xj9xuuMHyrvHw9Nye5LpdMay3-3KXfANhf5gQbgra6sfmIolyd4dpG2Hj2JfpSj7A435naMvVny3E2n4tbx5fk8lLBKBIhjMRyA/3gk/JZ-qd8YdS-2T-LZ4c7rNwA/h2/KGiIAbvANidz0fvPlx9jTvx6bPGrhD1C_aNt6GZ19mI)** Thanks, Team Gansler [ **DONATE** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTKovbz1PW8TZ8xdoVteJSjHhEZ3gZUVYj_O-HkBgA8XVgR-ddu3TsHrPZPpfGcD7yo4UXfcdNcUKXnHi0ZrtAfF7RGVzucdkl9e0HThddmKExxsfFku8heLyXFpWVkMEOX-eSagYNV4ByHt70BrSOitxjiEKCCsE_S2OiR0epMgqdNXrnDuIXO99KOkSgyGLSB5rjonQayqfWplH3_dl1x_7hVeXCPm6nKwc-qDSb4j7_bG-oFWG0pdsW5TB27yiZ/3gk/JZ-qd8YdS-2T-LZ4c7rNwA/h3/gNLhosCpepcYTmpw-lEkTeItmFvALPpT9XHZPWZBl88) By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair.

name: Team Mckayla
subject: Official Team Mckayla Priorities Survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
If you have a moment, please share with us what you think the most critical issues we’re facing are right now. It will only take a minute. | | | _Friend, you have stood up for Democratic and progressive values and candidates before; now we need you to help keep fighting. Mckayla is running a proudly progressive campaign for Congress. But if you don't want to hear about this campaign, please click[ _here._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GduVWzPmTjGmLJetR2bvS9CY5nxKcyc3Fvk0ptPznDC6dE23y2dlEYrrWweSiHpgsyHLAQ9-P72CG71L5e_VBVHYhfPdZgbMMB8gss1DfaShiBgQ45EFulOvtQzjNPogTITpp9LMIg8irbZJwPlBGPCXC-2JDoHkVbPoLLY_EeBiItiOHDIcdGjxmDorpFBrGgtogJZO1TOXiMQVcnAzoDYHH4xbzzcUF6VtRcoVJzbUbjbp26k8SgnpsKlo_MlOV4RAaZKoRNfrT8G2LeQ9ivA/3gk/D-KRaQg2SmmdV6DQNsx6vg/h0/pwOagcX8_RU2mhzLlPPjdh-MV8FAJZp7nfkbZy4jwLU)___ Team, A lot of the national conversation in the last couple of years has focused on getting back to normal once the pandemic is over. But there’s a lot of us who don’t want to go back to _normal_. Our normal wasn’t so good. | | Derek, I was in Virginia because Terry McAuliffe needs our help.

We know the path to electing more Democrats is mobilizing more people to vote — and there’s good news on that front in Virginia: it has never been easier to vote thanks to the incredible progress made by the Democrats in Virginia’s state government. We can protect this progress by electing Terry.

**So far, though, not enough voters have cast their ballots in this crucial election against Trumpism. And Democrats only have 4 days to turn around that worrying trend with investment in ads, organizers and events across Virginia.**

_**[The fight for voting rights will only be won if we exercise our right to vote at each opportunity. Terry and his team are doing everything they can to get out the vote but we need YOU to step up and help fund their efforts. We have seen the danger of Donald Trump’s rhetoric and the threat it poses to our democracy.

Derek, we need leaders who stand up for our democracy and voting access — not extremists who will restrict voting access and defend Donald Trump’s conspiracy theories.

Right now, the Virginia governor’s race is Trumpism’s best chance to mount a comeback, and I’m asking you to join me in standing with Terry McAuliffe and against Donald Trump.

name: James Carville
subject: I won’t lie
body:
| | I won’t lie to you -- if Democrats lose in Virginia, [_**it’s game over.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38069405/313829784/-610132975?refcode=20211029_em_fr_b1_carville_30_cl&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGVmNDk1Zi1jNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PvuZU_8nGH79p_MvQxgmr0NyY7DRC_fZrMkdTGe6OPM=) [_**Don’t let it happen -- split a donation between Wes Moore and Terry McAuliffe’s campaign right now to help him in the final days of his campaign →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38069406/313829785/-610132975?refcode=20211029_em_fr_b1_carville_30_cl&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGVmNDk1Zi1jNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PvuZU_8nGH79p_MvQxgmr0NyY7DRC_fZrMkdTGe6OPM=) Let me explain this to you: If Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate pulls off a win this year, Republicans will get a huge boost heading into next year’s critical midterm elections. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: We urgently need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, I hate reaching out with bad news, but this can't wait. **Two recent polls are showing me down by single digits.** With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, we cannot afford to fall behind. **If we're going to protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we have to win here in New Hampshire.** But the GOP has endless resources, and they're pulling out all the stops. So far, top Republicans like Betsy DeVos and Mike Pence have visited the Granite State to rally their far-right base. And GOP super PACs and special interest groups have spent over $4 million in New Hampshire to defeat me. Most recently, Mitch McConnell's dark money super PAC unleashed yet another massive ad buy in New Hampshire, targeting my campaign in an attempt to flip this seat. If these recent polls indicate anything, it's that the constant Republican attacks are breaking through. But the polls are within the margin of error, which means that we can turn them around. My team and I are working hard to keep New Hampshire and our Senate blue – **but we urgently need your help.** If we're going to win, it's going to take a grassroots effort. **[We don't need mega-donors like Republicans, but we do need people like you friend to give $5 or more before our end-of-month fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38069438/313829888/-214106137?refcode=e20211029_mwh-urgent-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDA5YTE2Yi1jNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AcFITGOLK_tYiKcYGwiL0_bYnY6xC-ChKsvuTwU-qnA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38069439/313829889/-214106137?refcode=e20211029_mwh-urgent-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDA5YTE2Yi1jNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AcFITGOLK_tYiKcYGwiL0_bYnY6xC-ChKsvuTwU-qnA=)

[Contribute $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38069441/313829891/-214106137?refcode=e20211029_mwh-urgent-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDA5YTE2Yi1jNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AcFITGOLK_tYiKcYGwiL0_bYnY6xC-ChKsvuTwU-qnA=)
[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38069442/313829892/-214106137?refcode=e20211029_mwh-urgent-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDA5YTE2Yi1jNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AcFITGOLK_tYiKcYGwiL0_bYnY6xC-ChKsvuTwU-qnA=)
New Hampshire is a real swing state. In 2016, I won by 1,017 votes–less than half of a percentage point, and news outlets across the country are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection. This is a critical moment in the campaign, and it's vital that we have the resources to take the lead.
Your support is so important to me and my campaign, and we're counting on you. **[So please, if you can, chip in $5 today to help keep New Hampshire and the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38069443/313829893/-214106137?refcode=e20211029_mwh-urgent-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDA5YTE2Yi1jNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AcFITGOLK_tYiKcYGwiL0_bYnY6xC-ChKsvuTwU-qnA=)**
Thank you for being on my team!
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

subject: I got my start in LGBTQ organizing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38069851/313833291/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTcwNjFlZC1jODM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5HF358ce-FIa2CA0K5xastthAVR4AkKuSeSkfZS-HY=)

| | October is LGBTQ history month, Peter. It’s a time focused on honoring those who have come before us and renewing our commitment to push for full LGBTQ equality in every part of life. **[Before I go any further, we have an urgent end-of-month deadline approaching in a few days. Will you rush a donation of $10 right now to help us reach our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38069853/313833292/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211029_FR_EOM6LGBTQHistory_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTcwNjFlZC1jODM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5HF358ce-FIa2CA0K5xastthAVR4AkKuSeSkfZS-HY=)** | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38069855/313833294/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211029_FR_EOM6LGBTQHistory_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTcwNjFlZC1jODM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5HF358ce-FIa2CA0K5xastthAVR4AkKuSeSkfZS-HY=)
---
Every October, I think a lot about my heroes in the LGBTQ movement. People like Pauli Murray, a pioneering minister and civil rights attorney, and Bayard Rustin, a civil rights strategist and organizer, and Kathy Kozachenko, the first out person elected to office in the country.
And I think about the incredible LGBTQ youth that I get to work with across the South, middle and high schoolers who are coming out and fighting for their rights.
Every LGBTQ person in our country has experienced LGBTQ discrimination or bias in one way or another.
It is a big part of why I got involved in politics. Ultimately, this led to my wife Meghann and I launching marriage equality campaigns across the South.
From the start, I loved it -- the organizing, the campaigning. And I saw firsthand the power of changing laws and winning elections -- it led to changes that had an immediate impact on people’s lives. Like being able to marry the love of your life. Or being able to legally adopt your own child.
That’s why I ran for county commissioner -- where I have worked to expand access to early childhood education, respond to the opioid crisis, strengthen rural broadband access, and more.
And this is a big part of why I’m running for Congress. Because so much is at stake for people in Western NC and we need leadership that will deliver real change and results.
I want to work together with people across Western North Carolina to make our home the place we deserve. Where violence and extremism no longer divide us, but love and compassion unite us. Where no matter who you are and who you love, you are treated with dignity. Where every person has an equal chance to thrive.
**I’m not your typical career politician, Peter, and this is not your typical campaign. I’m running on the values of love, hope, and empathy to deliver real leadership to WNC.**
**[We still have $9,803 left to raise before our end-of-month deadline expires. Will you chip in $10 or more to help us get there?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38069857/313833297/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211029_FR_EOM6LGBTQHistory_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTcwNjFlZC1jODM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5HF358ce-FIa2CA0K5xastthAVR4AkKuSeSkfZS-HY=)**

clean_body: | = | | October is LGBTQ history month, Peter. It’s a time focused on honoring those who have come before us and renewing our commitment to push for full LGBTQ equality in every part of life. = | | | = Every October, I think a lot about my heroes in the LGBTQ movement. People like Pauli Murray, a pioneering minister and civil rights attorney, and Bayard Rustin, a civil rights strategist and organizer, and Kathy Kozachenko, the first out person elected to office in the country. And I think about the incredible LGBTQ youth that I get to work with across the South, middle and high schoolers who are coming out and fighting for their rights. Every LGBTQ person in our country has experienced LGBTQ discrimination or bias in one way or another. It is a big part of why I got involved in politics. Ultimately, this led to my wife Meghann and I launching marriage equality campaigns across the South. From the start, I loved it -- the organizing, the campaigning. And I saw firsthand the power of changing laws and winning elections -- it led to changes that had an immediate impact on people’s lives. Like being able to marry the love of your life. Or being able to legally adopt your own child. That’s why I ran for county commissioner -- where I have worked to expand access to early childhood education, respond to the opioid crisis, strengthen rural broadband access, and more. And this is a big part of why I’m running for Congress. Because so much is at stake for people in Western NC and we need leadership that will deliver real change and results. I want to work together with people across Western North Carolina to make our home the place we deserve. Where violence and extremism no longer divide us, but love and compassion unite us. Where no matter who you are and who you love, you are treated with dignity. Where every person has an equal chance to thrive. I’m not your typical career politician, Peter, and this is not your typical campaign. I’m running on the values of love, hope, and empathy to deliver real leadership to WNC. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = When we come together, there’s nothing we can’t do. \-- Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

subject: DeSantis is about to launch his reelection campaign >>>
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team,

This is urgent: according to Florida Politics, Ron DeSantis’ re-election campaign launch is “imminent.”

We all know what this means, team: he’s going to raise millions more from top Republican donors across Florida and across the country. And he’s going to start attacking Nikki at every turn.

We need to be prepared for his well-funded attacks, and reaching our end-of-month goal is critical. As of right now, we’re $18,977 short. Please click here to chip in and help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=10291]

Nikki is the only candidate who can defeat Ron DeSantis, friends. But to get this done, we need grassroots supporters like you to continue stepping up to help us compete with DeSantis’ massive warchest.

I know we have a winning strategy, but only if we have the resources we need. Right now, we’re in the process of hiring new communications, field, and finance staff—all of whom will help us fight back against DeSantis and win this race.

The bottom line? Reaching our goals now ensures we can build the organization we’ll need to defeat DeSantis

Please, friend, help us finish October strong and reach our by making a donation today. Together, we’re building a winning movement. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=10291]

Thanks!
Farah Melendez
Campaign Manager

name: Gosar Update
subject: The friends he keeps 🤢
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress

| | It’s official, team: my uncle, the most dangerous man in America, just announced he’s going to campaign for Glenn Youngkin in the Virginia governor’s race.

Terry McAuliffe needs your support right now — more than ever. [He set a rapid response goal of raising 10,000 grassroots contributions before my uncle’s rally in Virginia, and he needs your help. Will you split a donation between Terry’s campaign and Tom Nelson right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38071612/313841829/1870159766?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211029_2_1&refcode2=92922ec8-cc38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjkyMmVjOC1jYzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxDPAKUzpXmaml1jf8hiDwu_MtSfZrsWx5Kmmyp2EPo=)

Glenn Youngkin might pretend he’s a moderate, pragmatic Republican.

But the truth is, he’s just as bad as Donald Trump — that’s why Donald has endorsed him **_eight times._**

And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are attached at the hip — they’re gone now. **Donald Trump is _all in_ for Youngkin.**

We worked much too hard to stomp out right-wing extremism last year — and I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up to make sure my uncle’s radical followers, like Glenn Youngkin, aren’t given the chance to gain power.

[We need your support _right now_. clean_body: | | It’s official, team: my uncle, the most dangerous man in America, just announced he’s going to campaign for Glenn Youngkin in the Virginia governor’s race. Terry McAuliffe needs your support right now — more than ever. = Glenn Youngkin might pretend he’s a moderate, pragmatic Republican. But the truth is, he’s just as bad as Donald Trump — that’s why Donald has endorsed him eight times. And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are attached at the hip — they’re gone now. Donald Trump is all in for Youngkin. We worked much too hard to stomp out right-wing extremism last year — and I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up to make sure my uncle’s radical followers, like Glenn Youngkin, aren’t given the chance to gain power. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Tom Nelson and Terry McAuliffe. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Dr. Mary L. Trump, PhD | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

body:
| _Hi friend,_ _I’m Eddie’s Inner Monologue._ _I’m the little voice in Eddie’s brain that’s the driving force behind almost literally everything that he does. Before you complain, I take**no responsibility whatsoever** for his lame jokes, but I take ALL the credit for the good ones. If it made you laugh, it’s mine, and I’m very proud of it._ _I didn’t come up with those great jokes just for kicks, though — it’s all in service of reaching people who have never felt included in the political process,[**so we can flip this seat and help Democrats hold the House. Validate me with a donation and help us do it!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38071751/313842332/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211029EOM3_EIM_main_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTMyNzcxMi1jZDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q0lFYO2NeONf9I6KwQWiLFCBqwoyphxa5hxNwuQbCtY=)_ _I give Eddie lots of grief about asking for money and sending emails three times a week to you, dear reader (again, you’re welcome for the funny bits and compelling content). And while I often complain to him about asking people for money, I also remind him that he’s falling behind his fundraising pace from last quarter!_ _That’s why I’m writing this email that Eddie sort-of-knows-about-but-sort-of-doesn’t (brains are complicated).[**We’ve got to get Eddie elected next November so he can go to Congress and pass policies that work for ALL of us — including the voices in people’s brains. This is incredibly important so please read this from start to finish:

**WE TOLD YOU:** Our opponent is a dangerous Capitol Insurrectionist.

**WE TOLD YOU:** He’s raised over $1,000,000 for his election.

**WE TOLD YOU:** If we lose this race, Democrats have almost no chance of keeping the House Majority.

The National Republican Congressional Committee announced their first round of “On the Radar” candidates as part of the Youngs Guns program -- and guess who made the list? One of our opponents -- far-right, Trump-endorsed candidate Anna Paulina Luna.

The last thing Fl-13 needs is a representative that's beholden to the gun industry, rather than the people. This is much bigger than just a surface-level issue. Our opponent cozying up to special interests in the gun industry means that we can kiss any sort of sensible gun safety reform legislation goodbye.

Far too often, an act of senseless gun violence takes the lives of innocent people across the nation. This cannot continue.

**That's why we're stepping up our game for this end-of-month fundraiser -- with an ambitious goal of $13,000. Michele's the candidate beholden to the people and running a grassroots campaign -- unlike Anna Paulina Luna, who's clearly beholden to the gun industry first and foremost.**

Unfortunately, gun violence is a _uniquely_ American problem.

Here in the U.S., we have the highest number of guns per person of any country in the world, and one of the world's highest rates of gun violence internationally.

**The last thing we need is a representative like Anna Paulina Luna, who has no interest in ending it. The last thing we need is a representative like Anna Paulina Luna, who's getting cozy with gun groups like the NRA. The last thing we need is a representative like Anna Paulina Luna -- full stop.**

What we do need is a representative like Michele -- a representative that is beyond dedicated to ending the gun violence epidemic. She's ready to invest directly in our communities, reform our approaches to public safety, and is fighting tirelessly to keep guns out of our schools, movie theatres, and the countless other spaces that guns have no place in.

With reasonable, responsible, and compassionate representatives, we can end the epidemic of violence. We can keep our people safe. We do this by getting Michele to Congress.

Michele's the candidate beholden to the people and running a grassroots campaign -- unlike Anna Paulina Luna, who's clearly beholden to the gun industry first and foremost. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Unfortunately, gun violence is a uniquely American problem. Here in the U.S., we have the highest number of guns per person of any country in the world, and one of the world's highest rates of gun violence internationally. The last thing we need is a representative like Anna Paulina Luna, who has no interest in ending it. The last thing we need is a representative like Anna Paulina Luna, who's getting cozy with gun groups like the NRA. The last thing we need is a representative like Anna Paulina Luna -- full stop. What we do need is a representative like Michele -- a representative that is beyond dedicated to ending the gun violence epidemic. She's ready to invest directly in our communities, reform our approaches to public safety, and is fighting tirelessly to keep guns out of our schools, movie theatres, and the countless other spaces that guns have no place in. With reasonable, responsible, and compassionate representatives, we can end the epidemic of violence. We can keep our people safe. We do this by getting Michele to Congress. = \-- Team Rayner = = *

body:
| | | **American Action Network drops $4.5M in ads attacking Democrats**

_-Politico_
---
Peter -- a major outside spending PAC recently announced that they are running ads attacking Democrats running in competitive districts, including against Abigail in Virginia's 7th District.

[_**Keeping Abigail in her seat is critical for Democrats to maintain the House majority. Will you contribute before the October end-of-month deadline to support our effort to re-elect Abigail Spanberger?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/CEbCKnIUSMbuLAmXQ5fqiX__09h9betGr73thwn7yM4=/1oPSEroEXQChN4KLA-DwuPyNPuDuNhRyMFZ_evy9Clg=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211029-1-EM&amount=25)

---
A lot is at stake in this election. We need to keep Abigail in Congress to continue leading the way in expanding rural broadband and lowering prescription drug prices. But outside groups have not shied away from spending heavily in an attempt to flip this seat.

This team has successfully fended off attacks in the previous two elections and will do so again. But to run the most robust campaign possible that can stand up to outside spending groups, the Spanberger campaign needs a groundswell of support.

[_**Will you contribute today so we have the resources to defend against attacks and re-elect Abigail in 2022? name: Barrier To Entry PAC
subject: Something spooky is approaching, and it’s not just Halloween
body:
Our worst nightmare isn’t monsters or ghosts 👻

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38072679/313847158/1300596418?refcode=211029_FR_eom1team_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkY2ZhNjA3LWQxMzgtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aOaZYnFhM7Z4EiVN1-gCozNRAL4BGcM5GGtDq2VGK1E=) Peter, let the countdown begin!

Halloween is approaching this weekend, and that’s not the only spooky thing on October 31st. It’s also our end-of-month fundraising deadline!

This Halloween, our worst nightmare isn’t monsters or ghosts— it’s the very real fear of a GOP takeover.

_Me with my family_

When I was three, my dad was feeling sick and went to the hospital.

But his face was unshaven, his clothes disheveled, his name unfamiliar, and his address not in an affluent area.

The hospital staff asked my mom if he was prone to exaggerations and sent him home.

[**And 24 hours later, unable to get the care he needed, he died of a completely treatable illness.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38073728/313852322/-711004501?refcode=20210617_em_fr_b1_moore_30op_v1&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWI5OGNmNi1kMTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxhUMUGdQ96C8z3NEqcvuW0aqz3c68bl2ZdqzTOkbXU=)

[**I’m running for people like my mom.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38073729/313852323/-711004501?refcode=20210617_em_fr_b1_moore_30op_v1&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWI5OGNmNi1kMTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxhUMUGdQ96C8z3NEqcvuW0aqz3c68bl2ZdqzTOkbXU=)

My mom did everything right.

Widowed as a young mother, she did everything she could to take care of my sisters and me.

[**But it wasn’t until I was 14 that she found a job that actually paid her benefits.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38073730/313852324/-711004501?refcode=20210617_em_fr_b1_moore_30op_v1&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWI5OGNmNi1kMTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxhUMUGdQ96C8z3NEqcvuW0aqz3c68bl2ZdqzTOkbXU=)

I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the Presidency again.
I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn’t gain power again.
**_It seems I was wrong._**
Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate for governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently tied with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is.
Turnout is low, and Terry tells me that donations have slowed to a trickle. We need more resources, so he can mobilize the voters he needs to win.

subject: Democrats are spending like CRAZY
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
We can stop the madness in Washington by winning back the Senate majority. Are you with me? We can stop the madness in Washington by winning back the Senate majority. Are you with me? | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4c2afdafce2e4d898c7ce1eed377c71c&_e=HHa-zvnM6h7UEoz2Q_SuP0m3EpvajCX9h3Kk4xN0fUgm--hpzNtpOL-tF7VkxggPZAgFKcNNDC0qyiIQOhiEPjAYveWU0YznM9e9NPB72scDxR7NZ2QV-G-VZlmDSojitImvAxwTuO6Hp0UPKg2TnkiVWV_gtWk0cnq5NZimHa2ORvB69NSrNRgQcvCt15Mhh95JIntCEDw0Pi-OgPcRQUl4qPDFDmeBmeAwm2RsYFbryRSkVKMPaUMixYpB75HGDTmcILwgWnF8phP6scPrefASKlikXkMfa5kvXeClPxWuF3Ht14fvlmX9ekW27BdDJudnLAYUX5h9DfKLWa_13onpncy9EeDrcB7-bUq_LgI5Eu9pL02wKLr6iT5jeuPL4X0tS2MTBXjctIj1AM8G14QDkLLUsk-HxhKg7ntMNq2Z52ZPmWJ8JLDxqvNJb4WnvJUWNwxX9wwLmvArEF1AJcMyv_A0eajcVmTOf8PcjS8%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Bernie Sanders is the Budget Chairman in the Senate because Republicans lost the Senate majority last year.

Under the leadership of Bernie Sanders, Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi, we are seeing out-of-control spending. _**Inflation is kicking our butt as a nation.**_

Last month, the inflation rate was up 5.4 percent, and things aren’t getting any better under the Biden Administration.

Gas prices are up.
The supply chain is backlogged.
We’re facing workforce shortages.
And Washington is on a spending spree.
But Fellow American, we can change this. If we win back the Senate majority by picking up just one more seat, I will be the new Budget Chairman - and we will STOP THIS CRAZY TRAIN!

clean_body: We can stop the madness in Washington by winning back the Senate majority. Are you with me? We can stop the madness in Washington by winning back the Senate majority. Are you with me? | Fellow American, Bernie Sanders is the Budget Chairman in the Senate because Republicans lost the Senate majority last year. Under the leadership of Bernie Sanders, Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi, we are seeing out-of-control spending. Inflation is kicking our butt as a nation. Last month, the inflation rate was up 5.4 percent, and things aren’t getting any better under the Biden Administration. Gas prices are up. The supply chain is backlogged. We’re facing workforce shortages. And Washington is on a spending spree. But Fellow American, we can change this. If we win back the Senate majority by picking up just one more seat, I will be the new Budget Chairman - and we will STOP THIS CRAZY TRAIN! We cannot let spending-obsessed Democrats in Washington ruin our country and our economy. It’s time to fight back! Sincerely, Lindsey Graham | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Over a dozen Democratic House seats up for grabs
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, Republican Texas Gov. Greg Abbott just signed an extreme gerrymander of the state’s 38 congressional districts into law. It’s hyper-partisan and aims to remove several Democratic seats from Texas for the next _decade_. Voting rights groups are already challenging this in court for violating Section 2 of the _Voting Rights Act_. But with a 6-3 conservative Supreme Court supermajority and Mitch McConnell’s death grip on our democracy with the filibuster, it’s once again up to us — all of us — to defend our House majority with everything we’ve got. We can’t let Republicans retake control of Congress. It’s simply not an option. If they do, all of our progress could be wiped away, and Joe Biden’s agenda stymied. Effectively paving the way for Donald Trump in 2024. Our democracy is quite literally on the line. **Can you pitch in $10 right now to help us defend our House majority? As Republicans suppress voters and attack our democracy, we’re up against so much. In 2010 not only did Republicans win 63 House seats — they also gerrymandered congressional districts across the country to stop President Obama’s agenda in its tracks — paving the way for Donald Trump and his brand of toxicity.
They also completely took over state legislatures and governorships, where they’ve spent years peeling back voting rights, workers’ rights, reproductive rights — you name it. **Emboldened by Trump, the GOP is threatening our democracy like never before.**
We can stop them. It is true that the party in power in the White House often loses seats in the midterms, but that’s because the president’s party traditionally gains seats in the prior election. But in 2020, Joe Biden had no coattails and we lost ground in the House — so we have already had our correction.
What’s more, there’s something very powerful that stands in their way. **It’s youDerek,**. The power of your contribution, your voice, and your vote can prevent a GOP takeover. Together, we can stop them.

clean_body: | Derek, Republican Texas Gov. Greg Abbott just signed an extreme gerrymander of the state’s 38 congressional districts into law. It’s hyper-partisan and aims to remove several Democratic seats from Texas for the next decade. Voting rights groups are already challenging this in court for violating Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act. But with a 6-3 conservative Supreme Court supermajority and Mitch McConnell’s death grip on our democracy with the filibuster, it’s once again up to us — all of us — to defend our House majority with everything we’ve got. name: Diehl for Massachusetts
subject: Reminder: Baker/Polito Target First Responders
body:
Diehl Releases New Ad Targeting Baker/Polito Firing of State Workers
| | | |
---
---
---
| October 26, 2021
DIEHL CALLS ON BAKER / POLITO ADMINISTRATION TO END FIRST RESPONDER MANDATES AND FIRINGS As Governor, Geoff will end mandates, reinstate jobs.
(Whitman, MA - 10/26/21) Geoff Diehl calls on the Baker - Polito administration to stop punishing the heroes who worked through the pandemic by terminating their employment if they are not complying with the vaccine mandates.
Diehl released an ad today: [Diehl Ad First Responders Stabbed in the Back by Baker Polito](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aFxNDrxvx80V7NRG6j9P1hHO3FR1wzQ-ZIOJGI9GsSqUaizWqM-CeQJTa8NBHWucexTLbFDWcF1ymgqaW6XNgKus3070zJh5c_mJYMIM8nQXM6eewDYBXlo9UbVkzJ47TXTMsgz7X1KkDdld6yA40A==&c=zROITliPN6sngDRKAu4sa8Y6ntpayCeptDDlghPCPUTmj4_OHChhqw==&ch=jhRom8KaWNwzJCs0-8P0r1uR1QVELWfwyqzJQfv5cia2WyX2q42Bxw==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aFxNDrxvx80V7NRG6j9P1hHO3FR1wzQ-ZIOJGI9GsSqUaizWqM-CeQJTa8NBHWucexTLbFDWcF1ymgqaW6XNgKus3070zJh5c_mJYMIM8nQXM6eewDYBXlo9UbVkzJ47TXTMsgz7X1KkDdld6yA40A==&c=zROITliPN6sngDRKAu4sa8Y6ntpayCeptDDlghPCPUTmj4_OHChhqw==&ch=jhRom8KaWNwzJCs0-8P0r1uR1QVELWfwyqzJQfv5cia2WyX2q42Bxw==), focusing on the Governor's flip-flop on this issue, as well as the Lt. Governor's hypocrisy of saying the administration has State Police's backs at the recent graduation ceremony last week in Worcester.
Diehl has pledged publicly that, once elected Governor, he will restore the jobs of everyone who was fired and will end the mandates which were enacted after the June 15 lifting of the state of emergency in Massachusetts.
"It's very simple. Individuals have the right to make their own health care choice related to taking a vaccine which, we're finding out, is not providing the guaranteed protections promised by government officials. In fact, we're seeing some very serious adverse reactions occur and its more clear than ever that a medical decision like this should be left between a person and their doctor," stated Diehl. "This is particularly true when discussing the brave first responders who worked through the pandemic, when a vaccine wasn't available."
Meanwhile unemployment numbers came out this week, and [Massachusetts is the only state in the country to see an increase in people out of work](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aFxNDrxvx80V7NRG6j9P1hHO3FR1wzQ-ZIOJGI9GsSqUaizWqM-CeQJTa8NBHWucYxhcbdM9jEXTSvGRrb6__vc6fDOQ6J8CHdmRZ96Rpvro6c2dsyhyNVYS9HeKy2BzRdxWTcmdd1MGB9ixtNHUDbVxv0sZ_cA_Wnu02nJzPiaHr4F4dFUgZmVFiGmnkqbVjGgxVz0DB5cB7Pj-2S36JOqzxXgUgY4PQ3TF9XYRwh3QPYFbYaOzqg==&c=zROITliPN6sngDRKAu4sa8Y6ntpayCeptDDlghPCPUTmj4_OHChhqw==&ch=jhRom8KaWNwzJCs0-8P0r1uR1QVELWfwyqzJQfv5cia2WyX2q42Bxw==).
Diehl added, "The Baker - Polito administration obviously consider people who want a say in what's put in their body as expendable, but there's only so many members of the National Guard out there to replace all the highly trained law enforcement officials, DCF workers and [various state agency employees losing their jobs right now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aFxNDrxvx80V7NRG6j9P1hHO3FR1wzQ-ZIOJGI9GsSqUaizWqM-CeQJTa8NBHWucokvvI3H0mZCkjFLd6UC2TDAjx7P-qa-KsXQObflZn_zgivIR3AdCc95kEgODxfLrafQcXKVcDfTMnK4q9NA1As7lzvciwCJUlXhUg4OHAUbwoDd23S1xPal9qJdpvMVHhE8sHcURmRTFC90j9-eMI10X3UpeMl-EI6m15xVNTvtQDnFHaFBUi4CjF6ZCmCC2pliLBHB9i-efGr1nV8UT2Q==&c=zROITliPN6sngDRKAu4sa8Y6ntpayCeptDDlghPCPUTmj4_OHChhqw==&ch=jhRom8KaWNwzJCs0-8P0r1uR1QVELWfwyqzJQfv5cia2WyX2q42Bxw==). This mandate is putting at risk the ability for the state to perform the vital services needed by the citizens as we recover from the pandemic.
---
|

---
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---

name: Terry (personal)
subject: Where your money goes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Here’s what we need right now
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38074274/313854651/-2023814932?refcode=20211029.05_TM_10JB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDBjN2Y0Yy1kMTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iEgmvofzgH5PnooQBKwNb5egeCCL1vAnxc4fR9atoAw=)

| | Derek, we have 4 days left in 2021’s most important race. It’s a must-win race, and I just finished meeting with my team to discuss our final expenses for our massive GOTV push.

Here’s where your money is going:
* Ads on Facebook, YouTube, and even Hulu, to make sure everyone understands what’s at stake in this election
* Clipboards, signs, and print materials for our field organizers, who will spend the weekend knocking on doors in every corner of the Commonwealth
* Resources to run texting programs and set up staging locations so we can do our part to get every voter to the polls before they close on November 2nd

Your $15 might not seem like a lot, Derek, but trust me: it goes a really, really long way.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: in 72 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
|
#
To be honest, these last few weeks have been tough ones, with lots of ups and downs. I have been working to secure many key provisions in the Build Back Better agenda that I've been fighting to pass for years — on issues ranging from universal early childhood education, to combating climate change, to affordable housing, reducing the costs of child care, and more. While the current package doesn't include everything I wanted it to (like giving Medicare the power to negotiate drug prices or providing paid family and medical leave), it will have an enormous positive impact on the lives and well-being of American families and communities across our country. We will have to return another day to fight for those priorities that are not included in the final bill — and we will! But, for now, we need to push hard to get this package over the finish line. Whatever the final bill looks like, not a single Republican in the Senate or House plans to vote for it. That's another reminder of how crucial it is that we win in 2022 to continue our work! [**And we can’t afford to take anything for granted. That’s why I’m asking if you are able to chip in $7, or whatever you can, before our end-of-October deadline to support my re-election campaign and our fight to keep the Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38074605/313856457/1305608586?amount=7&refcode=AU_CVH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211029_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmZmY2ExZi1kNDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K70VM0EQM_ZZY9P-K1RxyKrKgiIk3MSuzRYx-BMw-II=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $7 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38074606/313856460/1305608586?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=AU_CVH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211029_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmZmY2ExZi1kNDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K70VM0EQM_ZZY9P-K1RxyKrKgiIk3MSuzRYx-BMw-II=)

clean_body: | To be honest, these last few weeks have been tough ones, with lots of ups and downs. I have been working to secure many key provisions in the Build Back Better agenda that I've been fighting to pass for years — on issues ranging from universal early childhood education, to combating climate change, to affordable housing, reducing the costs of child care, and more. While the current package doesn't include everything I wanted it to (like giving Medicare the power to negotiate drug prices or providing paid family and medical leave), it will have an enormous positive impact on the lives and well-being of American families and communities across our country. We will have to return another day to fight for those priorities that are not included in the final bill — and we will! But, for now, we need to push hard to get this package over the finish line. Whatever the final bill looks like, not a single Republican in the Senate or House plans to vote for it. That's another reminder of how crucial it is that we win in 2022 to continue our work! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We know that Mitch McConnell has his eyes on Maryland and has been working to recruit a big money GOP candidate to challenge me next November and help Mitch win back control of the Senate gavel. We need to be ready for whatever they throw our way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for for being part of this. name: Wisconsin Senate Alert
subject: CNN reports:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
**_CNN_ ranked Wisconsin as one of the top ten Senate seats most likely to flip.** If we can take down Ron Johnson, we'll protect and expand our Democratic Senate majority and get more done for working families. But beating an incumbent with Donald Trump's full support won't be easy.

**[That's why our campaign is building the infrastructure to take him down, and we need to hit our 5,000 donor goal to do it. Please, rush a donation of whatever you can afford to send Ron Johnson packing and grow our fragile Senate majority before the end-of-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38074689/313856862/-1230885654?refcode=em21_211028_eom8_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211028_eom8_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sarah-godlewski&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjZlMWE2NS1kNDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vsvMqNIJt5vwi5K5DwJfPm7wiob691lgQExHE4D5Ed4=)**
| [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38074690/313856863/-1230885654?refcode=em21_211028_eom8_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211028_eom8_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sarah-godlewski&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjZlMWE2NS1kNDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vsvMqNIJt5vwi5K5DwJfPm7wiob691lgQExHE4D5Ed4=)
---

The path to expanding our Democratic Senate majority runs straight through Wisconsin. _CNN_ also reports: "Johnson is the only Republican potentially running for reelection in a state Biden carried last year, so the seat is a top target for Democrats...." That's true, but it doesn't mean we can rest easy.

Biden won in Wisconsin by just over 20,000 votes (or approximately the population of Germantown), and in a midterm election, voter turnout is historically lower -- and historically tough on Democrats.

But Sarah Godlewski won two statewide elections in a midterm election -- defeating her Republican opponent by more than 100,000 votes to become Wisconsin’s State Treasurer in 2018, flipping 9 Trump counties, and outperforming almost every Democrat statewide. She has what it takes to beat Ron Johnson, too. But only with your help.

clean_body: CNN ranked Wisconsin as one of the top ten Senate seats most likely to flip. If we can take down Ron Johnson, we'll protect and expand our Democratic Senate majority and get more done for working families. But beating an incumbent with Donald Trump's full support won't be easy. = | = The path to expanding our Democratic Senate majority runs straight through Wisconsin. CNN also reports: "Johnson is the only Republican potentially running for reelection in a state Biden carried last year, so the seat is a top target for Democrats...." That's true, but it doesn't mean we can rest easy. Biden won in Wisconsin by just over 20,000 votes (or approximately the population of Germantown), and in a midterm election, voter turnout is historically lower -- and historically tough on Democrats. But Sarah Godlewski won two statewide elections in a midterm election -- defeating her Republican opponent by more than 100,000 votes to become Wisconsin’s State Treasurer in 2018, flipping 9 Trump counties, and outperforming almost every Democrat statewide. She has what it takes to beat Ron Johnson, too. But only with your help. = = Thanks for everything! — Team Sarah Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

Hey Peter,
We’ll get right to the point: **The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats this year, and we’re running out of time.**
Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed Terry McAuliffe TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. Remember, this is a guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the pledge of allegiance to a flag that was at the January 6th insurrection.
**If you thought Bill Lee was extreme, Glenn Youngkin is just as bad.**
We only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and Terry’s campaign is asking for our help to prove them wrong.
[**Can you help a fellow Democrat keep Virginia blue and pitch in right now by making a split donation between our campaign and Terry’s?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38075014/313858436/-684751708?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211029eom3_TM_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODM2MmM4Ni1kNTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eF-rPj86uVkBPrRhmLQCCPN0lB8Fw7Y-IaUFOs6wwYE=)
This is the final weekend before Election Day, and there’s no better time to step up and show your support for Democrats in Virginia.
With polls still tied, anything can happen. But here’s the thing: every dollar that we help Terry’s campaign raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that they can turn out the voters they need to win. **And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism.**
[**Will you split a donation right now between Dr. Martin and Terry McAuliffe to ensure they can turn out all the voters they need on Tuesday?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38075017/313858439/-684751708?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211029eom3_TM_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODM2MmM4Ni1kNTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eF-rPj86uVkBPrRhmLQCCPN0lB8Fw7Y-IaUFOs6wwYE=)

name: RasForIowa.com
subject: Before you sign off, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
We can't afford to come up short on any of our goals, or we risk another four years of her failed leadership. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38075413/313860139/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjljM2QxYi1kNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ALqwhhXTkdwwu7EGzOQGBy2wm6xSDlRtFicerVwTfNg=)
We'll make this quick in case you have Halloween festivities lined up for the weekend, friend.

**Sunday we close the books for the month of October.** Kim Reynolds announced earlier this year that she had raised _over a million dollars_ for her re-election effort. She's relying on corporate executives to write big checks to the tune of $25,000 or more. We're relying on grassroots donors chipping in what they can, just like you friend.

We can't afford to come up short on any of our goals, or we risk another four years of her failed leadership. Sorry to put that **spooky** thought in your head, but it's true.

**The good news is that we're well within reach of where we need to be, we just need to pick up the pace in these final three days.**

clean_body: We can't afford to come up short on any of our goals, or we risk another four years of her failed leadership. | = We'll make this quick in case you have Halloween festivities lined up for the weekend, friend. Sunday we close the books for the month of October. Kim Reynolds announced earlier this year that she had raised over a million dollars for her re-election effort. She's relying on corporate executives to write big checks to the tune of $25,000 or more. We're relying on grassroots donors chipping in what they can, just like you friend. We can't afford to come up short on any of our goals, or we risk another four years of her failed leadership. Sorry to put that spooky thought in your head, but it's true. The good news is that we're well within reach of where we need to be, we just need to pick up the pace in these final three days. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks in advance, Team Ras = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. This campaign covers all of NV-03 -- from Las Vegas to Sandy Valley, Boulder City to Laughlin, and everywhere in between meeting voters where they are. No matter where Susie is, she makes a point of letting Nevadans know that **she is there for them and always will be.**
Team, you can bet that Susie’s **5 Republican opponents** aren’t taking the time to hear from different points of view in NV-03. They’re too busy spreading Covid-19 conspiracy theories and peddling Trump’s Big Lie.
_They’re making it clear that the only voices they want to hear are echoes of their own._
That’s why it’s so important that Susie gets to every corner of our district so that she knows how to serve Nevada in the best way possible.
So, we need your help. If Susie wants to reach every voter possible, she has to have a strong network of supporters ready to back her. We have to meet our fundraising goals so Susie can spend more time talking to voters and less time raising money.
[**This is the most competitive Congressional race in Nevada. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is fast approaching. name: Laurie Bishop
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38075775/313861720/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211029eom3_lb_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzY1ZDc3Ny1kODM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b8gwD_9qzjWFHm4KoJSTOeg6cTaC4E-m9kVKEfRjk7Y=)
---
Friend, In two days, this campaign faces our October fundraising deadline, and I hate to say it, but we’re about $3,749 behind where we need to be. [**Before I ask if you can pitch in to help us reach our goal, I hope you’ll let me explain why deadlines like this matter so much.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38075776/313861726/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211029eom3_lb_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzY1ZDc3Ny1kODM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b8gwD_9qzjWFHm4KoJSTOeg6cTaC4E-m9kVKEfRjk7Y=) The race for Montana’s new U.S. House seat is one of our best chances to defend our Democratic majority and ensure we can move forward on passing legislation that will help people: affordable healthcare, paid family leave, higher wages, action on climate change, and so much more. It’s looking like Donald Trump’s disgraced Secretary of the Interior Ryan Zinke will be the Republican nominee to beat, which means he’ll have Trump supporters’ money behind him plus his own war chest fueled by lobbyists and corporate interests. There’s currently three Democratic candidates in this race vying for the Democratic candidacy. **I’m not a boastful person, but I can confidently say I am the most qualified candidate in this race, and I know I can beat Ryan Zinke. Here’s why:** First, I know how to win. I’ve represented my small town of Livingston in the Montana House of Representatives since 2017, serving two terms in minority leadership. In order to get there, **I took on a Republican incumbent and flipped my seat from red to blue in 2016.** I know how to turn a seat blue, and I know I can do it again in this new district! I know how to lead. As a sitting state legislator, **I have passed landmark legislation** with an uncertain path because my colleagues across the aisle trust me and know I treat everyone with respect. My constituents know they are at the center of everything I do at the Capitol, and I will always listen to their needs, fight for what I believe is right, and deliver real results on the issues that matter most to Montanans. I’m not asking you to trust me — I’m asking you to look at my track record and know that I can beat Zinke and be a voice for Montanans who feel like they don’t have a seat at the table. But in order to do that, I need your help standing out from the crowd as we move closer to the end of the year and ultimately the Democratic primary next Spring. **Sunday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline is a big part of that. clean_body: | = Friend, In two days, this campaign faces our October fundraising deadline, and I hate to say it, but we’re about $3,749 behind where we need to be. = The race for Montana’s new U.S. House seat is one of our best chances to defend our Democratic majority and ensure we can move forward on passing legislation that will help people: affordable healthcare, paid family leave, higher wages, action on climate change, and so much more. It’s looking like Donald Trump’s disgraced Secretary of the Interior Ryan Zinke will be the Republican nominee to beat, which means he’ll have Trump supporters’ money behind him plus his own war chest fueled by lobbyists and corporate interests. There’s currently three Democratic candidates in this race vying for the Democratic candidacy. I’m not a boastful person, but I can confidently say I am the most qualified candidate in this race, and I know I can beat Ryan Zinke. Here’s why: First, I know how to win. I’ve represented my small town of Livingston in the Montana House of Representatives since 2017, serving two terms in minority leadership. In order to get there, I took on a Republican incumbent and flipped my seat from red to blue in 2016. I know how to turn a seat blue, and I know I can do it again in this new district! I know how to lead. As a sitting state legislator, I have passed landmark legislation with an uncertain path because my colleagues across the aisle trust me and know I treat everyone with respect. My constituents know they are at the center of everything I do at the Capitol, and I will always listen to their needs, fight for what I believe is right, and deliver real results on the issues that matter most to Montanans. I’m not asking you to trust me — I’m asking you to look at my track record and know that I can beat Zinke and be a voice for Montanans who feel like they don’t have a seat at the table. But in order to do that, I need your help standing out from the crowd as we move closer to the end of the year and ultimately the Democratic primary next Spring. Sunday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline is a big part of that. The more we raise now, the more likely we are to win the primary and go on to beat Zinke. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Every donation, whether it’s $1 or $500, goes towards the growing costs of this operation. I sincerely appreciate anything you’re able to contribute to keep this people-powered campaign moving forward! — Laurie | Laurie Bishop is a mom, former small business owner, education advocate, and an experienced Democratic leader who has been representing her small town in the Montana legislature since she unseated a Republican in 2016. name: Patty Murray
subject: “What are you going to do with the kids?”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I will never stop fighting for affordable child care.
#
Peter,
When I was first running for Senate in 1992, I gathered some people from the community at my house to try and earn their support. A gentleman listened to my pitch and then looked right at me and asked, _**“What are you going to do with the kids?”**_
My first thought was: Do you ask men this question?
But what I actually said was: This kind of thing is exactly why I’m running for the Senate. Because every working parent in this country, whether she’s working at a grocery store or running for office, needs affordable child care in their community so they can go out and do the jobs they need to do.
For a long time in this country, the solution to the child care crisis has been “you’re on your own.” We found out that did not work -- parents can’t be at work worried about whether their kids are being cared for in a safe environment. **We need to make child care more affordable.**
Right now, with so many families stretched thin in this pandemic, addressing the child care crisis is more urgent than ever before. That’s why I fought tooth-and-nail to make sure my child care legislation was included in the Build Back Better framework. This is so important for families and we’re so close to making affordable child care a reality, _but if we let Mitch McConnell’s GOP take back the Senate, we know they’ll roll back our progress._
**[We have a crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up, and I am asking each of my supporters to make an investment in defending our Democratic Senate majority. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 now and join me in the fight to keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38075809/313861951/-234244402?refcode=pm_em_211029_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2I5NDRjOS1kODM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4wRzNczf9cuFkNHHTUmmB-gJddbNxFgMyXTIfgV_MY=)**
Thank you for your continued support,
Patty
** **
** **
** **
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38075810/313861952/-234244402?refcode=pm_em_211029_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2I5NDRjOS1kODM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4wRzNczf9cuFkNHHTUmmB-gJddbNxFgMyXTIfgV_MY=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

name: Donna Imam
subject: The importance of field campaigns in Texas.
disclaimer_text: paid for by a new 5% surtax on incomes over $10 million, and an additional 3% on income over $25 million
body:
I want to take a moment to update you on where things stand with President Biden's bill. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38075831/313862117/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJmODgwMC1kOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14-_tUKxTocgFw5FM31XSUlGPnnQ3pK4BO99uB5x8Xo=)
Friend,

In a moment I'm going to ask you to [**chip in $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38075832/313862139/1898666321?refcode=em-102921-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJmODgwMC1kOTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14-_tUKxTocgFw5FM31XSUlGPnnQ3pK4BO99uB5x8Xo=) to our end-of-month deadline. But first, I want to take a moment to update you on where things stand with President Biden's Build Back Better Act. It's important to me that you're kept in the loop. **• The White House just announced a framework for the Build Back Better plan.** While it's not quite final -- it includes an expanded child tax credit through 2022, universal pre-K, child-care funding, and increased access to health care through ACA.

**• The deal is to be paid for by a new 5% surtax on incomes over $10 million, and an additional 3% on income over $25 million.**

**• Due to the resistance of Senators Joe Manchin and Krysten Sinema -- popular policies like two year community college, medicare expansion including dental and vision, prescription drug price negotiation, paid family and medical leave, and the billionaire tax have been stripped from the bill.** This further illustrates the need to elect Democrats with the expertise and experience to make a case for investing in the future of our country. We need to elect champions for working families who deliver on their promises.

**• Austinites have the opportunity to lead right here in a Democratic-leaning district for the first time in decades.** I'm running to deliver for working families, but running a comprehensive field campaign takes time and grassroots resources. Right now, we're coming up short of our monthly goal. [**Sunday marks our end-of-month fundraising deadline. Will you chip in $3 to make sure a true champion for working families represents us in Washington? clean_body: I want to take a moment to update you on where things stand with President Biden's bill. | = Friend, In a moment I'm going to ask you to = to our end-of-month deadline. But first, I want to take a moment to update you on where things stand with President Biden's Build Back Better Act. It's important to me that you're kept in the loop. • The White House just announced a framework for the Build Back Better plan. While it's not quite final -- it includes an expanded child tax credit through 2022, universal pre-K, child-care funding, and increased access to health care through ACA. • The deal is to be paid for by a new 5% surtax on incomes over $10 million, and an additional 3% on income over $25 million. • Due to the resistance of Senators Joe Manchin and Krysten Sinema -- popular policies like two year community college, medicare expansion including dental and vision, prescription drug price negotiation, paid family and medical leave, and the billionaire tax have been stripped from the bill. This further illustrates the need to elect Democrats with the expertise and experience to make a case for investing in the future of our country. We need to elect champions for working families who deliver on their promises. • Austinites have the opportunity to lead right here in a Democratic-leaning district for the first time in decades. I'm running to deliver for working families, but running a comprehensive field campaign takes time and grassroots resources. Right now, we're coming up short of our monthly goal. = | = Field campaigns are important in Texas, because overall, turnout is still very low here compared to the other 49 states. Young people who don't often watch the local network news are not aware of what has happened in the last year here. We're dealing with: voter suppression, no reproductive rights, and extreme gerrymandering. We need to inform them about these issues at their door -- and then get out the vote. This is the only way to make a real impact in Texas. As a reminder, we knocked over 50,000 doors last year. So if you're looking for a place to make a real impact, look no further. We'll use your grassroots donation to bolster our field operation to turn out more Democrats up and down the ticket. We can do this but we need your help. = Thanks, Donna = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. Please make the check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

[ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=6b8171330b&e=400a181d5a)
| Hi ,

This is it. There are only** 4 days left before Election Day, and national news outlets are paying attention to the hard work we’re doing this weekend:**

[**NBC**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0b9a184ef4&e=400a181d5a): _“Mike Carey is what would happen if Fox News came to life and ran for Congress...”_
[**Roll Call**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d23dd8346a&e=400a181d5a): _“Russo has spent the closing weeks of her campaign crisscrossing the district, which ranges from the Columbus suburbs to the Appalachians. She has posted Twitter check-ins from an independently owned coffee shop, a rural pumpkin fair and a suburban neighborhood where she canvassed in the rain”_
[**The Associated Press**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b12a70dcb9&e=400a181d5a): “ _Two different organizations tried to set up debates where the candidates could have hashed out their differences before voters. Carey declined to participate_.”

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: The most important race in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
| | | **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5zoZlMiiBAwRuJ1vD8LWyBJk_DQaymMxJrvteJ7qELs=/B-1XzyNMhlLz5mXLX6JvPIZWvFy5SmEn9FSUbARwHFA=)**
---
Friend -- I'm not kidding when I say this is the most important email you'll receive today. The Virginia Governor's election is on TUESDAY, and back to back polls show it's _still _tied. Experts are saying my Trump-endorsed opponent Glenn Youngkin has the momentum. That Democrats don't care about stopping Trumpism anymore. Folks, we're running out of time to prove them wrong. [**Will you split a donation between my campaign and Jay Jones right now? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38077832/313870885/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjIxYWY0Ni1kYzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wcPzrZJ3qPbf3kXnkZ2-s8A9fCgvEVebcLOj4yILeJQ=&emci=ec3a0d10-dc38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f221af46-dc38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23594672) | |
