Peter, **Team Holly just raised over $100,000 in 48 hours**. Our campaign to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene is gaining momentum, and here’s why:

With an average donation of just $37, we know that our campaign of empathy and action is resonating with folks everywhere. Holly believes this recent momentum is because of our focus on in-district initiatives. **Including the largest voter registration effort in Northwest Georgia history** , along with being the first campaign to begin field operations in-district.

When we launched our campaign over 8 months ago, Holly’s main goal was to make the people of Northwest Georgia the center of attention. We’ve been left behind for far too long. Our path to victory includes investing funds right back into GA-14, while also listening and advocating for the district.

It’s easy to make Marjorie Taylor Greene the villain. She doesn’t fight for her constituents' needs and she spreads misinformation while pulling publicity stunt after publicity stunt. **But we can’t run just on the idea that we’re not Marjorie Taylor Greene.** We need to inspire the folks in GA-14 and fight for a better future. We intend to do this every day.

**[Chip in $15 today and help us keep our momentum going. Folks like you are the heart of this campaign. We wouldn’t be here without you and we hope you’ll continue to stand by us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38077833/313870886/-804235033?refcode=em1029&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjIxYWY0Ni1kYzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wcPzrZJ3qPbf3kXnkZ2-s8A9fCgvEVebcLOj4yILeJQ=)**

Moving forward together,
Team Holly.

Peter, with our end-of-month deadline in just a few days, I’m sure your inbox is flooded with fundraising appeals. **So I’m coming to you personally — _no tricks, no gimmicks._**

I’m Hala Ayala.
I’m the Democratic nominee for Lt. Governor of Virginia.
I’m a Virginian, born and raised, and I know my story is a Virginia story.

**And I need your support** — for working families, for voting rights, for abortion access, and to protect our historic Democratic majority. [**My finance director told me we’re just short of where we need to be with two days remaining to meet our $30,000 fundraising goal and four days until Election Day. Friend, Lisa Chaffee refused the COVID-19 vaccine and retweeted conspiracy theory claims about it. She claimed masks don't work and insisted kids should have to sit in classrooms with unmasked, unvaccinated students.

Friend,

Chelsea’s got big goals for what she wants to see in the state of Ohio. In order to get there, she’s got fundraising goals to meet first. As the month winds down, it’s time to push forward and hit our targets.

**We're just $1,973 away from hitting our goal.[Can you help us close the month on the right note by pitching in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38078096/313872530/-939985431?refcode=EM_FR_211029eom2_EOM_TC_90D_6_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDk2M2JkZC1kZDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Txzintgj-k2JvPRmODzvR0h0ydaZnOWPzMxgmkGzzAE=)**

**Not everyone agrees with us. Our opponent's mishandling of the redistricting commission has gone public, and we know that we cannot trust his leadership to define our democracy for the next decade and beyond.** This election is not a battle over the status quo. In order to get there, she’s got fundraising goals to meet first. As the month winds down, it’s time to push forward and hit our targets. We're just $1,973 away from hitting our goal.= The stakes are high, and we cannot afford the luxury of taking this race lightly. Maps are on the table, and the districts we set today will determine who has the right to be a decision-maker in the state of Ohio. We believe everyone, including you and your family, has that right. Not everyone agrees with us. Our opponent's mishandling of the redistricting commission has gone public, and we know that we cannot trust his leadership to define our democracy for the next decade and beyond. This election is not a battle over the status quo. It’s a vote on whether we want our state to become a progressive model or a regressive nightmare. Chelsea is ready to defend you out there in the battle against voter suppression.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = It's on now, Team Chelsea | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure. = Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202 www.chelseaforohio.com to receive fewer emails. subject: Terrifying times in PA.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

It’s just two days until Halloween, but even more terrifying than brain-hungry zombies or blood-thirsty vampires is what’s happening in the PA legislature.

Conservative lawmakers are trying to pass a law to allow people to carry firearms freely and without a license in PA. They’re also still trying to destabilize our democracy by pushing the Big Lie to cast doubt on our free and fair elections, making it harder for Pennsylvanians' votes to count.

WE CANNOT LET THIS HAPPEN. We're fighting these ghoulish efforts to make life less equitable by empowering voters in the coming Nov. 2 election.

Help with a donation TODAY so that we can meet our end-of-month goal and continue working with organizers and voters in areas of our state that are often ignored to elect progressive leaders who will protect our democracy, not try to squash it.

name: Team Mondaire
subject: Mondaire is so close to delivering Build Back Better for working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Hi team,
Yesterday, after weeks of negotiations with Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema, President Biden unveiled legislative text for his $1.75 trillion Build Back Better Act. It contains universal child care, planet-saving climate action, Medicare expansion, historic investments in affordable housing, an extension of the expanded Child Tax Credit (which has cut child poverty in half), and so much more.
This is a major victory for the American people, made possible by progressives in Congress like Mondaire who insisted upon passing the larger Build Back Better Act along with the bipartisan infrastructure bill. Working alongside his progressive colleagues, Mondaire fought tirelessly to get Manchin and Sinema to the negotiating table to demand that these provisions be included in the final bill.
The lesson is clear: We need more people like Mondaire in Congress fighting for our families. But first, we have to make sure Mondaire wins re-election, which is where you come in, friend.
**[Mondaire won’t stop fighting for programs that help hardworking families. But in order to keep him in Congress, we need to hit our campaign’s end-of-month deadline in two days. name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Pennsylvania Senate Race Update (NEW POLL)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Over a THIRD of Pennsylvania’s Democratic primary voters are undecided over who will be our next U.S. Senator
#

A brand new poll just came out that shows over a THIRD of Pennsylvania’s Democratic primary voters are undecided over who will be our next U.S. Senator.
The numbers show our race is wide open — with millions of undecided voters out there, it’s still far too early to tell who will win the Democratic primary.
That makes the work we do now *so* important.
**If we are able to make big investments reaching these voters while we’re still in the early stages of the race, we’ll have a better shot at reaching them first.**
[So we have to ask: Could you make a contribution of $3 or any amount to Malcolm’s campaign today? This new poll makes it even more crucial that we hit our October fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38078225/313872723/-360183459?refcode2=aa115efc-dd38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211029-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTExNWVmYy1kZDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_aFG-1fWrHklrpiAQdUUzPpjB8QvAlp5QXN3pu7GWA=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38078227/313872725/-360183459?refcode2=aa115efc-dd38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211029-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTExNWVmYy1kZDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_aFG-1fWrHklrpiAQdUUzPpjB8QvAlp5QXN3pu7GWA=)**
We know it can be hard to imagine that what we do today will make such a huge impact in an election that’s months away, but this poll shows that the work we do now will mean the difference between victory and defeat.
So thanks in advance for anything you’re able to pitch in. Your support will give us the ability to reach undecided voters across all of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties.
Thanks for everything,
Team Malcolm

The numbers show our race is wide open — with millions of undecided voters out there, it’s still far too early to tell who will win the Democratic primary. That makes the work we do now so important. If we are able to make big investments reaching these voters while we’re still in the early stages of the race, we’ll have a better shot at reaching them first. = = We know it can be hard to imagine that what we do today will make such a huge impact in an election that’s months away, but this poll shows that the work we do now will mean the difference between victory and defeat. So thanks in advance for anything you’re able to pitch in. Your support will give us the ability to reach undecided voters across all of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties. From day one in Washington, **Billy fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States.** He has cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. Billy is a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement. **His loyalty to the American people has never wavered.**

_I’m writing to tell you this:_ **If we put Billy Long in the U.S. Senate, we won’t have to worry about him giving into the swamp.** His vote will be for you. What you see is what you get. He’s been in Washington for 10 years, **but he’s never been of Washington.**

He’s not just talking the talk, like the power-hungry Democrats do. Billy passed legislation to release Missourian workers from unnecessary government regulations, improving their economic situation and quality of life.

_Sounds like the opposite of what the radical-Democrats are doing in Washington, right?_ **Because unlike Joe Biden, Kamala Harris or Chuck Schumer, Billy understands that Americans should ALWAYS come first.** That’s the type of Republican we need fighting for us, Fellow Conservative.

From day one in Washington, Billy fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States. He has cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. Billy is a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement. His loyalty to the American people has never wavered. I’m writing to tell you this: If we put Billy Long in the U.S. Senate, we won’t have to worry about him giving into the swamp. His vote will be for you. What you see is what you get. He’s been in Washington for 10 years, but he’s never been of Washington. He’s not just talking the talk, like the power-hungry Democrats do. Billy passed legislation to release Missourian workers from unnecessary government regulations, improving their economic situation and quality of life. Sounds like the opposite of what the radical-Democrats are doing in Washington, right? Because unlike Joe Biden, Kamala Harris or Chuck Schumer, Billy understands that Americans should ALWAYS come first. That’s the type of Republican we need fighting for us, Fellow Conservative. This race is going to be competitive and it will certainly be one of the most expensive battles we see this cycle. Even President Trump is confident that we can and will take back the Senate, but that plan becomes increasingly difficult if the Democrats swoop in and buy and lie their way into one of our red-state seats. Let me tell you, Democrats already have their eyes and pocketbooks set on Missouri. They aren’t wasting any time using big corporations and dark-money donors to pad their campaign accounts. Thank you, Kellyanne Conway Former Counselor to President Donald J. Trump | | PAID FOR BY BILLY LONG FOR SENATE

With THREE days remaining, we wanted to make sure you knew how important this deadline is. Last quarter, thanks to your support, Tina had the most successful quarter, raising over $340,000. And now that we are kicking off the first month of our second campaign quarter, we have a lot to prove. Will you join us in our continued success? It’s because of your ongoing support that Tina can continue fighting for you. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: re: paid family leave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
The latest reporting indicates that paid family leave is unlikely to make it into the final Build Back Better bill.
#

Friends -
The latest reporting indicates that paid family leave is unlikely to make it into the final Build Back Better bill.
It is unfathomable that, after the past year and half, anyone could think paid family leave is not an urgent need for our families — and to help rebuild our economy.
The United States is the only industrialized country without paid family leave. This is unacceptable, and it must change.
Our families need and deserve a national paid family leave program. It’s an extremely popular idea that is good for families and the economy!
**[If you agree, will you join me in calling on Congress to pass paid family leave as part of the Build Back Better bill? They need to hear that this is important to all of us as Democrats finalize this legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38080144/313880904/1070241659?refcode2=3cf92078-e338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211029-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2Y5MjA3OC1lMzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QWwpPUFSXqC9AoEm7WdIxXQf0OPg-26axiAIg0TTja4=&emci=7ff12a2d-db38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3cf92078-e338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20912107)**
When I was Chief Justice, I learned that court employees were expected to give birth one week and return to the court the next. That’s unacceptable.
And that’s why as Chief Justice, we created a paid family leave policy for employees within the court system. That helped over 6,400 employees be successful at their jobs and take care of their loved ones.
But the truth is, that is sadly not the norm for most North Carolinians. In fact, more than half of our state’s workers currently have no access to any form of family leave — not even unpaid.
Democrats ran on passing paid family leave. Our families need it, and we must not settle for any policy that leaves our families behind and hurts our economy.
**[Will you add your name to my petition to tell Congress to include paid family leave in the Build Back Better bill? It is unacceptable that America is the only industrialized nation without it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38080147/313880908/1070241659?refcode2=3cf92078-e338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211029-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2Y5MjA3OC1lMzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QWwpPUFSXqC9AoEm7WdIxXQf0OPg-26axiAIg0TTja4=&emci=7ff12a2d-db38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3cf92078-e338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20912107)**
Thank you for supporting our fight for access to paid family leave. With your help, we can finish what I started as Chief Justice.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38080150/313880911/1070241659?refcode2=3cf92078-e338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211029-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2Y5MjA3OC1lMzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QWwpPUFSXqC9AoEm7WdIxXQf0OPg-26axiAIg0TTja4=&emci=7ff12a2d-db38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3cf92078-e338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20912107)**

# **Friend — Joe Biden wants to let the IRS spy on your bank account to see where he can tax you more. But he wants to give illegal immigrants $450,000 checks for breaking our laws.**

---
Seriously. That’s Biden and the Democrats’ latest scheme to reward lawbreaking and encourage illegal immigration. **It’s on us to end this by winning back the U.S. Senate. Will you help?[Rush a donation now, BEFORE our October End of Month fundraising deadline!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/7e1a46211664c1f1/5e13d87efb67632cc3d6b838967d376c/37973)**

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/7e1a46211664c1f1/7283df2c82b0ca4cc3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
[**RUSH MY DONATION »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/7e1a46211664c1f1/b8a72c82ff99edd2c3d6b838967d376c/37973)

Fellow Conservative,

Recently I had the pleasure of shooting my first TV advertisement – and let me tell you, it was insightful.

Before launching my bid for Congress, I honestly didn’t know how much work political candidates are required to put into their campaigns on a daily basis.

I’ve been going a mile a minute every day for the last six months and I’ve got to tell you that while the process is absolutely exhausting, there is nothing else I’d rather be doing – **well, of course spending more time with my newborn son wouldn’t be a terrible thing**.

**[Can I call on you to take 30 seconds out of your day right now to watch my TV ad?](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=aa0b54efad4e41b9806842058743a056&_e=oxIA-4mUtvP3tlYFpod0KZMQgBh8F3I5pLK-Xf5CWlrSqob6845oLTfEOLmXzbRsr42QXI62ECBKvG2004p5squwjJE_o-NRm7SJ3pYwkizqjMllchshrO6CnYpeNFMUnInlUQQghV_7iv7JlGs7NXZQzLbcjvcvOeVqtY10KsUAl42XVFKldoherMY5LNMSjkASS2IeEKjeYk5pL-2EgQCkcUDfqUz0NzxkIaodkdtg0A9_4d4CMrvWtAPvCavk1Bf3ZiMlAXSYW-dlUE6kvU6HnbBSiL4eRIFgxep9AMzRp3GAdK56FCmmXZMiDXo3PpbmEGnv2FBscJ-q_aPSyH6mDkNJjo5DyYVKI5gMjJmq8n-KmompX1ub73bVjUPurMDXaOcX7RBnlm7-fyf4GChZBNwlrlj3fJFIjkJoKgVHe5r3uvr8WdIkK0L5dKf9hzz3jU1cX4vVUALXafnFEQ%3D%3D)** If you’re not a voter in my district chances are you’d never see it on air outside of this email of course, but I value your opinion all the same.

**What is important is that every voter in my Virginia district sees this spot before the Republican convention next year. I’ve been running for Congress for six months but hardly anyone who can vote in my race knows who I am!**

We need leaders in Congress who are calm under fire. I’ve proven time and again that I can keep my composure even in the most difficult situations.

We need more veterans in Congress. We need people who still believe in the prospect of passing on the American Dream to future generations.

Simply put, we need more folks in Congress who actually are proud Americans.

**[Send a couple of dollars my way to keep this ad running if you’re able. I’d be so grateful](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=aa0b54efad4e41b9806842058743a056&_e=oxIA-4mUtvP3tlYFpod0KZMQgBh8F3I5pLK-Xf5CWlrSqob6845oLTfEOLmXzbRsr42QXI62ECBKvG2004p5squwjJE_o-NRm7SJ3pYwkizqjMllchshrO6CnYpeNFMUnInlUQQghV_7iv7JlGs7NXZQzLbcjvcvOeVqtY10KsUAl42XVFKldoherMY5LNMSjkASS2IeEKjeYk5pL-2EgQCkcUDfqUz0NzxkIaodkdtg0A9_4d4CMrvWtAPvCavkshqIMre9yOu0GoL7VWnJzQVyGO3s0EeMMf1vqQZf6rFIfocoepQMV2nM4ijnmZloIn1pJNE2OXBYiUHlKyRmhUTT26GeB_UbCv3X7Cx5TKCyONrKeiuNoud9mmJoaNUKEsgqhJRPp7jy2IaR9w91N8m_8SLalFwsIY1uXlSi3G_I7fxFEXE9COs4CuAhoOiqZjJFBKONBXZPlzRWxtojoA%3D%3D)**.

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Build back better: We are going to get this done
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxes on corporations and wealthy Americans
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38080563/313882801/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZiODA3ZS1lNTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UduRR1Z8bFwofLp6Nt035Mb-u6lHfZZhyeDoqUqRfc4=&emci=c9f1f6d5-d038-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1dfb807e-e538-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9494239)
---

| | After months of work, Democrats in Congress are poised to unite around President Biden's consensus plan to build back better. We are going to get this done because America needs us to get it done. Here is what it means for families across the country:
* **A massive investment in child care.** Universal and free preschool for all 3- and 4-year-olds in America. A guarantee that no family will spend more than 7% of their income on child care. And an extension of the $250-300/month refundable child tax credit that has already delivered the largest one-year reduction in childhood poverty in American history.

* **An historic investment to tackle climate change.** We are investing in domestic production of solar energy, wind energy, battery technology, and green technologies that will reduce carbon pollution. We will offer new tax credits to reduce the cost of adding solar to your home or buying an American-made, union-made electric vehicle. And we are creating a Civilian Climate Corps that will hire 300,000 people to work in our public lands, improve climate resilience, and do the work of taking on climate change.

* **Expand affordable health care for millions of Americans.** This plan reduces premiums for 9 million Americans and delivers coverage to 4 million uninsured people whose states have refused Medicaid expansion. And we will offer hearing benefits to older Americans through Medicare.

* **Invest in rebuilding America's infrastructure.** With the agreement on the Build Back Better plan, we will be able to pass the bipartisan infrastructure plan. This plan includes big investments in rebuilding our roads and bridges, expanding Amtrak, expanding broadband internet access to rural communities, building a national network of electric vehicle charging stations, funding low and zero-emission buses and ferries, and so much more—all of it creating millions of well-paying jobs to do the work.

* **And it is all paid for by taxes on corporations and wealthy Americans.** President Biden kept his promise of no tax increases for the middle class. This plan includes tax increases on people making over $10 million a year, and implements a new corporate minimum tax of 15% on overseas profits.

**As I said, Democrats are going to get this done**. Governing is hard work and it is often messy and frustrating. But in the end, we are going to prove that good people can come together and figure it out—and deliver for the American people.

body:
Peter --

We've had a successful few weeks since launching Andy's re-election campaign.

Our team has been blown away by everyone who has stepped up. We know that with your support and energy, we can re-elect Andy in 2023.

As we round out October, here's a shout out of some Kentuckians who have donated so far: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38080669/313883512/-992136875?refcode=em21_211028_EOM2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211028_EOM2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDZkMDUzZi1lNjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RYL5PxTMkeVQtVpA2uRbLjzYXwAvLIQKMfST3LJzhlI=) Here's the deal, Peter: on November 1, we’re going to be taking a close look at our first month's fundraising total since Andy announced his re-election campaign. We'll discuss October highlights, where we're headed in the coming months, and how much money we raised.

Every dollar we raise is crucial. We need to know that we had a strong first month, so it would mean a lot if your name ended up on Andy's early list of supporters.

**[With just a few days until October's end-of-month deadline, we need your help to cross the finish line on the first month of this campaign. Show Andy you have his back by rushing a grassroots donation to his campaign now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38080670/313883513/-992136875?refcode=em21_211028_EOM2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211028_EOM2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDZkMDUzZi1lNjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RYL5PxTMkeVQtVpA2uRbLjzYXwAvLIQKMfST3LJzhlI=)**

Thanks,

Team Beshear | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38080671/313883514/-992136875?refcode=em21_211028_EOM2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211028_EOM2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDZkMDUzZi1lNjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RYL5PxTMkeVQtVpA2uRbLjzYXwAvLIQKMfST3LJzhlI=)

clean_body: Will you accept? | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, It’s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. I’m reaching out to you today to say “thank you” for everything you’ve done to support our America First Movement. In honor of your efforts and devotion to our cause, I want to extend to you an exclusive offer to join the Chairman’s Club : a select group of Republicans, hand-picked by me. This is a special honor, Peter, and I am not offering to every Republican. But your efforts stood out above the rest, and so I’d like you to join this exclusive group. | CHAIRMAN’S CLUB MEMBERSHIP OFFER EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | | I’m going to be checking the list of members tonight, Peter. I hope your name will be on there. Congratulations! Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Fox News Poll Alert
subject: Republican Glenn Youngkin pulls ahead in TOP TARGETED Race>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | **NEW Fox News Poll: Republican Glenn Youngkin pulls ahead in NEW Fox News Poll**
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58648423:68SVRa2NT:m:1:3298722022:21807B899BD18091208804882F37EFBF:r)
---
Peter, BIG NEWS: the Virginia Governor's race is a **TOSSUP and the latest poll has Republican Glenn Youngkin in the lead. **

Even better, the Democrats are getting _**nervous**_ and they're pulling out the big guns. Barack Obama and Jill Biden are on the trail whipping support while the Dark Money Democrat Machine is dumping cash across the state, launching smear campaigns to defame and deface him.

**[Because they know Republicans have what it takes to win NOW and in future elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58648423:68SVRa2NT:m:1:3298722022:21807B899BD18091208804882F37EFBF:r "Because they know
Republicans have what it takes to win NOW and in future elections.")**

---
| | | [STEP UP NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58648423:68SVRa2NT:m:1:3298722022:21807B899BD18091208804882F37EFBF:r "STEP UP NOW")
---
The momentum has never been more on our side. Your support has never been more critical. **[Can we count on you to get us to the finish line and secure victory for Republicans?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58648423:68SVRa2NT:m:1:3298722022:21807B899BD18091208804882F37EFBF:r "Can we count on
you to get us to the finish line and secure victory for Republicans?")**

Pollsters, pundits, and liberal media will be looking towards the outcome as an indicator of whether or not Republicans will take back the House, Senate, and White House.

What happens here sets the tone for all future elections. _We can 't afford to back down - not when we've been so close to restoring conservative leadership in statehouses, Congress, and beyond. _
**[Will you step up to secure victory for Republicans now and in future elections?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58648423:68SVRa2NT:m:1:3298722022:21807B899BD18091208804882F37EFBF:r "Will you step up to secure victory for Republicans now and in future elections?")**
---
| | | [STEP UP NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58648423:68SVRa2NT:m:1:3298722022:21807B899BD18091208804882F37EFBF:r "STEP UP NOW")
---
The Democrats have failed in Virginia, just as they've failed across the nation. And voters are sick and tired of it. Stopping their failed Radical Agenda here is the first step in thwarting it once and for all.

We're facing an uphill battle and we're going to need all hands on deck. _But with you on our side, we know we can win. _

**[Can we count on you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58648423:68SVRa2NT:m:1:3298722022:21807B899BD18091208804882F37EFBF:r "Can we count on
you?")**

Thank you,

House Conservatives

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: The NRCC is outraising the DCCC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I have some good news and some bad news to share with you, Peter:

I'll start with the bad news (I like to get that over with first!): Republicans are only FIVE seats away from taking back control of the House majority, and so far this cycle, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) is **_outraising_** the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee.

Now the good news: Team Kilmer's grassroots team has stepped up in a big way these past few months. We've been shattering our own fundraising goals! If we can keep up the good work, we'll be in a great position to run a winning campaign next year -- no matter what the NRCC throws our way.

**[With House Republicans' fundraising outpacing Democrats', we can't afford to take our foot off the gas. We've set a goal of raising $15,000 before the end-of-month deadline to keep our team's momentum going strong. Chip in to help us reach our goal. (We're already over halfway there!):](https://act.myngp.com/el/OheKD7m9GrrS2Ka5u5kUZlelcNCqvMA7-CAn0peZ6Qg=/AZ47S3SX0UmS112nkU7nhv91n5YTfjuFjoH224LtvCc=?refcode=em21_211029_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211029_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OheKD7m9GrrS2Ka5u5kUZlelcNCqvMA7-CAn0peZ6Qg=/AZ47S3SX0UmS112nkU7nhv91n5YTfjuFjoH224LtvCc=?refcode=em21_211029_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211029_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)
---
[RUSH A DONATION](https://act.myngp.com/el/OheKD7m9GrrS2Ka5u5kUZlelcNCqvMA7-CAn0peZ6Qg=/AZ47S3SX0UmS112nkU7nhv91n5YTfjuFjoH224LtvCc=?refcode=em21_211029_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211029_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)
---

The race for control of the House majority is already in full swing. With only five seats standing in the way of Republicans taking back control, we cannot assume any district is safe.

I'm already facing challengers from the far-right. Hitting Sunday's end-of-month fundraising goal will help ensure we have the resources we need to fight back. So, I'm humbly asking:

**[Will you rush a donation of $5, or whatever you're able, before the end-of-month deadline? Help us raise the resources we need to fight back against far-right challengers and defend the House majority.](https://act.myngp.com/el/OheKD7m9GrrS2Ka5u5kUZlelcNCqvMA7-CAn0peZ6Qg=/AZ47S3SX0UmS112nkU7nhv91n5YTfjuFjoH224LtvCc=?refcode=em21_211029_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211029_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/OheKD7m9GrrS2Ka5u5kUZlelcNCqvMA7-CAn0peZ6Qg=/AZ47S3SX0UmS112nkU7nhv91n5YTfjuFjoH224LtvCc=?refcode=em21_211029_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211029_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: John Kasich
subject: 🚨 Breaking News: House Democrats Fails to Pass Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
House Speaker Nancy Pelosi pulled the plug on passing the bipartisan infrastructure bill that already passed the U.S. Senate [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=ba9bb4985b114cd2a0b710c9802fab21&_e=is-hQm_kpPpepYgAtXfkCs_CftkQZr_g9dOhJa0VOWsDTv7-4FWL5UJcRc7Wv6hWNBk11t1kdTz4fUA4oDEquwVGvF9pVGXGeknVlMAJu9IJuMz1IrFbmLI1LiXM6ogrrauc8WU6BErYgyHI88P8Wo6kTVPvLAe-uoY69O9LdmJE-nT3tzcyvX2rYZrTTuI0Vjs8T4DdvwFcNLK-DM4N3qvH1s_tvyt85gecKu31yr0XvSDjSAhhbA9KQER0lwx_otamgqUBKaeBuGbxXiQsaA%3D%3D) Peter - Joe Biden was elected President of the United States because he promised to end the chaos and bring the American people together again after so many years of senseless division. Just last night, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi pulled the plug on passing the bipartisan infrastructure bill that already passed the U.S. Senate in August with 19 Republican votes. The Democrats continue to play a deadly game of chicken with each other and now their entire legislative agenda is collapsing. It's really a shame because the vitally important infrastructure bill could have been passed by the House months ago, creating jobs and building roads to the future. Americans did not elect Joe Biden to massively expand government and raise taxes. They elected him to bring Democrats and Republicans together again to solve big problems. **Peter - we have to continue to speak out and fight to get our government working again**. The stakes are too high for us to just sit by and watch this continue. I'm out there every day raising awareness about these issues and doing what I can to make a positive impact - to restore sanity to Washington. [But I need your help to keep up the fight](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=ba9bb4985b114cd2a0b710c9802fab21&_e=is-hQm_kpPpepYgAtXfkCj1IhP0dhVZRS5HzGXYcbFuIQAiutSCsjfjCvG7aQrzRpg-LW1GPM9a3VztvX-gDEUw1n7qTzzj-XKrIHaHw13aokw5-1vd11yG4b0BSwF7YdvwqcUv5VnGbpVrqhGk-0uCANlkdYQ_CEE9x9yk_Q9LFLmab3AsAG8Ioc0O94ezi4iM7kvkMa1MtnZVZPAx44ONlL9k9zeYQd5mp6ShLGK2LKEbL2HK8wiaT1EWoRfVT-mtPerV7vemxbzyZUfGcsg%3D%3D). clean_body: Rise to the occasion | Patriots, AOC and Nancy Pelosi have started to roll out their plan to flip NY-11 in 2022. They will spend millions of dollars to spread smears and lies about me. If we fall behind our monthly fundraising goals, we’ll have no chance to correct the record. I need your help if we are going to fight back against the Washington Establishment that puts bureaucrats over the people they are supposed to serve. They want to elect a liberal puppet who will defund our law enforcement, drive up our taxes, and make everyone conform to their radical ideology. I won’t let that happen, and I will continue to fight for the great state of New York and the GREATEST country in the history of the world. But I need your support immediately! | AOC is one of the most ineffective members of Congress, BUT she is effective in funding socialist candidates that will side with her radical policies that end up hurting more Americans than it benefits. God Bless America, Nicole Malliotakis Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal) Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

name: Derek Marshall
subject: 3 more days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
I’ll be honest. **The holiday season can be a hard time for candidates to raise money.** With so much going on, people need to stretch their resources, and political campaigns aren’t always the highest priority. I get that.

This month I’ve worked hard to help coordinate a massive community event that we’re supporting this weekend to celebrate Dia de Los Muertos & register folks to vote. Because I’ve dedicated extra time to planning it,**I’ve gotten up at 6am every morning and worked until 8pm every night to make sure we’re still fundraising.** **[That’s why I have to ask: will you consider investing in our campaign today and help us meet our goal for October?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38081525/313888340/-939586091?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTFkNjI3Mi1lYTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGr_oI7RvWrrZiRCGaYfDr2W9TbOv1XUdmOAyaPaatk=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38081526/313888341/-939586091?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTFkNjI3Mi1lYTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGr_oI7RvWrrZiRCGaYfDr2W9TbOv1XUdmOAyaPaatk=)

As a political organizer, my favorite times are the ones where we’re out in the community, working together to provide for people. But as a Congressional candidate, the vast majority of my time has to be spent fundraising. The unfortunate reality is that campaigns run on money, and a lot of it at that.**Progressive candidates like me have to work even harder, because I refuse to take money from corporate PACs and billionaires who bankroll establishment campaigns.

That’s why I’m so proud that we’ve raised nearly $300,000 to date as a completely grassroots, first-time campaign. **Every dollar comes from individual donors who believe in the work we’re doing to flip this district blue and replace a Trump-backed Republican with a progressive for the people.

Now for October, we have just 3 days left in the month and (drumroll please)... we’re only $5,000 away from our goal! We’re so close, and I know we can make it. **[Will you donate today and help us close the gap? Your contribution will help us stay on track and maintain our momentum.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38081527/313888358/-939586091?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTFkNjI3Mi1lYTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGr_oI7RvWrrZiRCGaYfDr2W9TbOv1XUdmOAyaPaatk=)

Remember, every dollar counts. **

In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

Members of the NYPD, FDNY, and other New York first responders were marching and protesting Biden and DeBlasio’s vaccine mandates—all of them chanting, _**“HOLD THE LINE.”**_ _ _

Peter, because of these mandates, we’re set to lose THOUSANDS of hardworking heroes who put their lives on the line every day for the city of New York.

Peter, these vaccine mandates aren’t just hitting our first respondersー** _millions of Americans in the private sector also have their backs against the wall._ **

clean_body: The Democrats are treating the American government like it's a game to be played and they have no problem cheating to win. The only thing I’m guilty of is making my opponent and national Democrats spend money to defend a congressional seat they think belongs to them | Peter, Peter, I know your inbox is flooded with emails asking for money... I wish it weren’t the case, but since we have just 2 days left until our critical deadline, we’re getting creative with ways to ask you to help us reach our financial goals. The Democrats are treating the American government like it's a game to be played and they have no problem cheating to win. The only games I play are bingo and baseball, Peter. But in the spirit of competition and to prove to the out-of-touch Democrats that I don’t have to cheat to win, | We have 30 squares with different donation amounts. | | Derek,

In August, National Republicans announced they were pouring millions into Virginia to fund a massive field operation for Glenn Youngkin.

Well, I just got out of a meeting with my team and we’re seeing just how big of an impact that investment is having.

**_Derek, Youngkin climbed in the polls. Then the experts at The Cook Political Report moved the race to a toss-up. And right now? Republican enthusiasm is at an all time HIGH._**

That’s really bad news because this election is almost over — we only have 4 days to turn this around.

Here’s the good news: we have a plan.

[**We need a historic grassroots field operation to turn out enough voters on Tuesday, but we can’t do that if we don’t have the funds. ****
The truth is, in a race this close, money makes a big difference when it comes to turnout.

With more resources, we can send teams of organizers to **every single corner of Virginia** , get mailers in **every single Virginia mailbox** , and build a massive turnout operation so every voter knows how, when, and where to vote.

**Glenn Youngkin has already committed to spending $75 million of his own money, now he has the financial backing of the national Republican Party too. If we’re going to match their turnout operation, I’m going to need your help right now.**

Here’s the good news: we have a plan. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = The truth is, in a race this close, money makes a big difference when it comes to turnout. With more resources, we can send teams of organizers to every single corner of Virginia , get mailers in every single Virginia mailbox , and build a massive turnout operation so every voter knows how, when, and where to vote. Glenn Youngkin has already committed to spending $75 million of his own money, now he has the financial backing of the national Republican Party too. If we’re going to match their turnout operation, I’m going to need your help right now. = Thanks for being on my team, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

body:
| | | _Jill Biden went to Virginia.
Stacey Abrams went to Virginia.
Barack Obama went to Virginia.
**Even President Biden went to Virginia!**_

These Democratic heroes all went to Virginia to **PREVENT** a total Republican takeover, **ELECT** Democrats, and **PROTECT** our progress -- _including our crucial House Majority!_

But they can't get the job done without help from grassroots Democrats like you.

****[So before our End of Month Deadline expires in just 48 hours, we're calling on 15,000 more of our best supporters to join Jill, Stacey, Barack, and Joe in the fight by chipping in $3 to protect our House Majority at this make-or-break moment for Democrats nationwide.](https://links.e.dccc.)****
| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: 10/31, 11:59pm
NAME:dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcX_)

[_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_)

---

**There 's no sugarcoating it:** Right now, Republicans have the money and the momentum to not only fight to take back Virginia, but also work to DESTROY our Democratic Majorities.

They're **SURGING** in the polls.

They're**SHATTERING** fundraising records.

And now, with just four days left before Election Day in Virginia, they could be on the verge of **SWEEPING** victories in this must-win state.

If Trump's Republicans retake power in Virginia, we know it will only embolden them -- _and let them think our House Majority is theirs for the taking._

We refuse to sit idly by and watch as Republicans attempt to pack every level of the government with Trump's loyalist cronies.

**[That's why we're calling on 15,000 of our best grassroots supporters -- including YOU \-- to unite behind our Democratic heroes and step up to DEFEND our House Democrats. Can we count on you before time runs out on our mission-critical End of Month Deadline in just 48 hours to show Republicans that no matter what happens in Virginia, our House Majority is here to stay?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)**

| | Hi Derek, I know I’m not going to be the first and definitely won’t be the last person to tell you this but -- **there’s so much at stake on November 2nd.** The election happening in 4 days isn’t just about the candidates running to represent you. **All the progress we’ve made over the last few years is at stake.** **Virginia Democrats lead by example.** We flip Congressional districts Republicans have held for decades, win statewide elections by record margins, take the General Assembly, and pass landmark legislation on a number of issues. I’ll be honest with you, Derek -- if we don’t continue to lead by example, all of the progress that we’ve made could be undone in November if we don’t elect Democrats up and down the ballot. That’s why I’m reaching out. **We’ve only got 4 days left and we have to make every minute -- _and every donation_ \-- count.** We have the power to keep Virginia blue and move our Commonwealth and our country forward. To do that, we need to get Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, and Mark Herring across the finish line, and we need to hold key House of Delegates seats. We’re counting on our supporters like you, Derek. **I’m teaming up with the DPVA to make sure each and every Democratic candidate in Virginia has the resources they need to win. Are you with me? ** **_[Can I count on you to donate to keep Virginia Democrats moving forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38082710/313892199/103945530?refcode=mw_em_211029_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGIzNDJkNy1lYzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmlY6FIGGZb7XVOtWy_YtTzNjUDo01ROrtJ7kKKUOaI=)_** Thank you for all of your support, Mark Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38082715/313892203/103945530?refcode=mw_em_211029_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGIzNDJkNy1lYzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmlY6FIGGZb7XVOtWy_YtTzNjUDo01ROrtJ7kKKUOaI=)**

subject: 6 Stops on Day 6!

body:
Yesterday we celebrated Day 6 of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour by making 6 stops. I am always encouraged by the energy and momentum that I see
| [ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VVWb4R4dl3_2W6dvMRq5VxlXvW1k1H6J4zfhjNN2_Qd4f3lSbtV1-WJV7CgNvcN7xzFpKWqbhCW3WZrYK6n6k09W5jpbBV5pywWrW7WB-0L2KQPz4W4pQ0VF6Gd33_W6c6vPH5bwSQHW8TrjWG7wp-DCW1kvBDC2R7tBhW28NnNQ4mKdSMW4qVKFj91MQbvW3F3bsg2nhhSBW6MKh7l6FZWZlW7Bn1LB8nh5T9W3skxkw5FHjZBW7LWDxX99d3KNW5Jhn_m2DY0vqW790cyp8ljkg2W42BTqP1tT7K-W4zr86V7CFL83N8FJ4xST6fbg34Pf1)

Dear Friend, Yesterday we celebrated Day 6 of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour by making 6 stops. I am always encouraged by the energy and momentum that I see from people all over the Commonwealth. Early voting ends tomorrow! If you have not already voted, make sure to head to the polls and bring 10 friends with you. Let's go, Virginia!
---
---
| [ **BUS TOUR** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VVWb4R4dl3_2W6dvMRq5VxlXvW1k1H6J4zfhjNN2_Qd4y3lSbNV1-WJV7CgCgZW8t1xsw900QK0W1-Dl165d9Q9gW60PfxT2GcTCgVkmspH6ry4WdW6jdPm58-L1v6W7qr2gs493ytDW6DkQMg6ZbT6bVzshPM7TJD5jW3fbRgW5xKY9-N27b1lWl04JXW2y9Pmf17ZqjcW7NX5WZ6sBFdqW3MGg-062sK0wW8CWgz28CjlP8W4Xpzds8-tMCJV-fP272sntzSW59w0mP4bHdlHW8zpcXz3fY65lW6BJxV86lZzcYW4w5XT22JKrgLW3FVPWq6CxF9lW49Pjfh6Q9HqV3ltk1)
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
---
I was blessed to be joined by my better half, Suzanne, yesterday in Fisherville! Day 6 also included stops in Bedford, Amherst, Farmville, Buena Vista, and Appomattox. Everywhere we go it is clear that Virginians are ready for a new leadership in Richmond.
---
---
Rain could not stop the energy in Augusta County last night! Over 1,000 Virginians showed up because they are sick and tired of the same old policies and politicians of the past. Together, we will make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.
---
If you thought Day 6 was busy, get ready for Day 7! Today we are making stops in Charlottesville, Fork Union, Ruckersville, and Warrenton. I cannot wait to meet you and add your signature to the #WinWithGlenn tour bus. See you there! For Virginia,
---
---
Glenn Youngkin
---
[ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VVWb4R4dl3_2W6dvMRq5VxlXvW1k1H6J4zfhjNN2_Qd4y3lSbNV1-WJV7CgSmrW1dYq942b7F3cW37j6Z25zfJQNW7pQg2_7DTXylW5tX-Zq8RR_vZW7B86c081Z-7DW29tKrr4Lbd5xW9kzmQc3Js8-sW1DksCD5xFR4BN5wDBCBGVmXMW2Y2DSl2Qz51CVHDJZK3nMyvZN2YFNXjQqfg9N2tL6kYVTgllW6W6Ks68fblq-W7Z8mC_3Lg7rRW5xwz7S7YXyLcW8_sClM1q-FLMW52N5QR4xdBJCW2VRZ4b7Nz-x7W2TXNk358FN6GW2dtRh02qKkw3W4WTGy74s_qVS2GN1)

I am always encouraged by the energy and momentum that I see | | | | ---|---|--- Dear Friend, Yesterday we celebrated Day 6 of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour by making 6 stops. I am always encouraged by the energy and momentum that I see from people all over the Commonwealth. Early voting ends tomorrow! If you have not already voted, make sure to head to the polls and bring 10 friends with you. Let's go, Virginia! | | | | ---|---|--- I was blessed to be joined by my better half, Suzanne, yesterday in Fisherville! Day 6 also included stops in Bedford, Amherst, Farmville, Buena Vista, and Appomattox. Everywhere we go it is clear that Virginians are ready for a new leadership in Richmond. Rain could not stop the energy in Augusta County last night! Over 1,000 Virginians showed up because they are sick and tired of the same old policies and politicians of the past. Together, we will make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. If you thought Day 6 was busy, get ready for Day 7! Today we are making stops in Charlottesville, Fork Union, Ruckersville, and Warrenton. I cannot wait to meet you and add your signature to the #WinWithGlenn tour bus. See you there! For Virginia, Glenn Youngkin Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc. Not authorized by any other candidate. Youngkin for Governor, PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Happy Halloween
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Halloween is this weekend and, like Jason, Freddie, and Mike Myers, the worst inclinations of the socialist left in Washington refuse to die. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470910?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Happy Halloween**_ Halloween is this weekend and, like Jason, Freddie, and Mike Myers, the worst inclinations of the socialist left in Washington refuse to die. We told you earlier this year that they would continue to attempt to weaken our election security, and they’re doing so. Unable to get a $3.5 trillion monstrosity passed, they’re still working to do so, and make no mistake, this is going to cause your taxes to go up. Now comes talk that Joe Biden and his handlers are working on a plan to give over $400,000 to families who entered this country illegally. It seems the only thing that has died and gone away are low gas prices, fully stocked grocery store shelves, and lower prices on consumer goods. Luckily, the Democrat horror show in Washington DC will end soon, and Indiana Republicans will be one of the major reasons their stranglehold in Washington ends.

As is usually the case, things in Indiana are much more productive than in Washington. Governor Holcomb has been on the road making jobs announcements, we’re welcoming over 55,000 FFA members to our capital city, and our state continues to be nationally recognized for our conservative leadership. As we enter the final 2 months of 2021, I take great pride in the work our team has done throughout the year, laying the foundation for a strong 2022. Of course, there’s no election in Indiana this year, but that hasn’t stopped many of you from continuing to volunteer, contribute, and help our party maintain the momentum we’ve built over the last several years. It’s because of all of you that the Indiana Republican Party has become the dominate political force in the State of Indiana.

Thanks
Kyle

_**Photo:** Governor Holcomb helps kick off the national FFA convention in downtown Indianapolis earlier this week._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana For All_**
**Governor Holcomb **welcomed the National FFA to Indiana. We're excited to be the home of their national convention and are proud of the way their members are pioneering the future of agriculture.

**Governor Holcomb** received his flu shot from Dr. Box. Getting your flu shot is a great way to protect yourself and others from the flu. For more information and to learn where you can get your shot, click here: [https://www.in.gov/health/erc/infectious-disease-epidemiology/diseases-and-conditions-resource-page/influenza/influenza-vaccination-information/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b03531df69&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb welcoming National FFA members for their national convention. Gov. Holcomb receiving his flu shot._
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Diversity Series Applications**_ Applications are now open for the second class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. [Click here to apply](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dee1d53e8d&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Todd Young on IN Focus**_ Senator Todd Young was on IN Focus earlier this week discussing Indiana’s booming economy and other important national issues.

You can watch his interview here: [https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/in-focus-sen-todd-young-and-commerce-secretary-gina-raimondo-discuss-indianas-economic-recovery/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=05d5d16fb9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer Op-Ed**_ Last week Chairman Hupfer penned an op-ed for the Daily Caller discussing another Democrat attempt to takeover state elections.

Read his piece here: [https://dailycaller.com/2021/10/13/hupfer-freedom-vote-act-more-like-freedom-cheat-act/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4a524aca21&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[October 29](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=77a92dc335&e=1acd9bb3d6): Crawford County Lincoln Day Dinner
[November 1](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bc05db9fa5&e=1acd9bb3d6): Marion County GOP Fall Dinner
[November 2](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=82c54c147b&e=1acd9bb3d6): Howard County Elephant Stampede
[November 2](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7b03b07e0c&e=1acd9bb3d6): Bartholomew County Fundraiser Featuring Mike Pence
[November 24](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d19089ad54&e=1acd9bb3d6): Henry County Annual Speech Contest for High School Students

---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[discusses Next Level Jobs](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=711a111de3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[joins Paoli police to break ground on a new police station](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=36afaefe61&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [speaks with the Ball state Economic Club](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=446a571fa4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[announces Indiana has received the highest award for financial reporting](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6b4de104d1&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Senator Todd Young** [meets with IU President Pam Whitten](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9fc2988719&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: Halloween is this weekend and, like Jason, Freddie, and Mike Myers, the worst inclinations of the socialist left in Washington refuse to die. | | | | | | | | Happy Halloween Halloween is this weekend and, like Jason, Freddie, and Mike Myers, the worst inclinations of the socialist left in Washington refuse to die. We told you earlier this year that they would continue to attempt to weaken our election security, and they’re doing so. Unable to get a $3.5 trillion monstrosity passed, they’re still working to do so, and make no mistake, this is going to cause your taxes to go up. Now comes talk that Joe Biden and his handlers are working on a plan to give over $400,000 to families who entered this country illegally. It seems the only thing that has died and gone away are low gas prices, fully stocked grocery store shelves, and lower prices on consumer goods. Luckily, the Democrat horror show in Washington DC will end soon, and Indiana Republicans will be one of the major reasons their stranglehold in Washington ends. As is usually the case, things in Indiana are much more productive than in Washington. Governor Holcomb has been on the road making jobs announcements, we’re welcoming over 55,000 FFA members to our capital city, and our state continues to be nationally recognized for our conservative leadership. As we enter the final 2 months of 2021, I take great pride in the work our team has done throughout the year, laying the foundation for a strong 2022. Of course, there’s no election in Indiana this year, but that hasn’t stopped many of you from continuing to volunteer, contribute, and help our party maintain the momentum we’ve built over the last several years. It’s because of all of you that the Indiana Republican Party has become the dominate political force in the State of Indiana. Thanks Kyle Photo: Governor Holcomb helps kick off the national FFA convention in downtown Indianapolis earlier this week. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | Building One Indiana For All Governor Holcomb welcomed the National FFA to Indiana. We're excited to be the home of their national convention and are proud of the way their members are pioneering the future of agriculture. Governor Holcomb received his flu shot from Dr. Box. Getting your flu shot is a great way to protect yourself and others from the flu. For more information and to learn where you can get your shot, click here: Photos: Gov. Holcomb welcoming National FFA members for their national convention. Gov. Holcomb receiving his flu shot. | | | Diversity Series Applications Applications are now open for the second class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. . | | | Todd Young on IN Focus Senator Todd Young was on IN Focus earlier this week discussing Indiana’s booming economy and other important national issues. You can watch his interview here: | | Chairman Hupfer Op-Ed Last week Chairman Hupfer penned an op-ed for the Daily Caller discussing another Democrat attempt to takeover state elections. Read his piece here: | | Upcoming Republican Events : Crawford County Lincoln Day Dinner : Marion County GOP Fall Dinner : Howard County Elephant Stampede : Bartholomew County Fundraiser Featuring Mike Pence : Henry County Annual Speech Contest for High School Students | | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Secretary of State Holli Sullivan Attorney General Todd Rokita Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Victoria Spartz Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved._

This is going to be a close race. Very close. Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again.

We are sorry to put that terrible thought in your head, but it's true.

**[That's why we’re asking for you to split a $25 donation between our campaign and Common Good VA before our fundraising deadline comes to a close.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FpvFie8ouG2ZpAUpf95TrI21wn0tdomPmhTivYl6OsjX3Ed-dA4nm7RQReKjyEiJoRl9nQKaPm5zdHhpTx1-BMpAW4D98Ege2QWl8GBkjyhFZUglPbb83dj_8VVFfeCH9KmZXbS3nwHvkGjl9yRd21aAJ1uvgsrfufsZgLxwjBjYTt3UPdnPkUFbqP3LlAdU_Cb7OxeBFOGXeDhNXviICnGsBqq8eduFP0Y3Ys1OEZnjuKdBKT-roaWv__qCMwKnPR6LxM5PiyrcDWHnQICeQN0/3gk/ZLZ4FI-4SdycJGdvPcr2-g/h1/K15WOfIvFpUedWZxicnmIiKvMTpzp-uOZ-0H8AktmoU)**

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1272%2E3611125%2ESWdZSv ][IMG]

Hoo boy, folks -- two pro-Mandel super PACs JUST placed a $1 million ad
buy in Ohio.

This is bad news for us. TV ads reach wide audiences and boost name
recognition like nothing else. These two right-wing groups are propping up
Josh Mandel’s candidacy EARLIER than ever and at a critical moment in this
race.

Josh is the only Republican candidate who is polling ahead of Tim in Ohio.
So, it’s incredibly important that we reach our end-of-month fundraising
goal or Tim’s message will get drowned out by far-right fearmongering.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5718?t=1007&akid=1272%2E3611125%2ESWdZSv ]Can we count on you to rush a donation to help us meet our $50,000 goal
and counteract these massive GOP ad buys?

body:
---
| | My name is Matt LaMirande, and I joined the Nelson for Senate team in August, as the Full Nelson Tour was in full swing. I’m a proud native of Dresser, Wisconsin and graduate of St. Croix Falls high school. My job has been to accompany Tom on the tour, and help plan the stops on the 72 country tour across the state of Wisconsin.

It was a long tour, as you could see from this photo:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38083784/313896609/67999095?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211029_1_1&refcode2=420f148f-f138-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjBmMTQ4Zi1mMTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6eb6QI9iJb5wS8May9mrKU-Z8rWnXI2oozNc1Q0qVUs=)
_This is Irene and I exhausted in campaign HQ after another leg of the tour._
As I sit here writing this email to you, I’m honestly still tired from all the traveling. But, this tour made one thing abundantly clear to me: **Wisconsin is clamoring for sincere, compassionate leadership in the US Senate.**

Tom is committed to being just that for our state. That is why he took the time to meet people from every county in Wisconsin to hear about their struggles and priorities for their next US Senator. _I didn’t see any other candidates doing the same (and I’ve been to every corner of our state)._

[Just cause the tour is over doesn't mean we can let up. Those gas receipts can pile up. We still need help from folks like you to power this campaign. Can you chip in now to ensure we can continue reaching voters all over Wisconsin?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38083788/313896612/67999095?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211029_1_1&refcode2=420f148f-f138-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjBmMTQ4Zi1mMTM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6eb6QI9iJb5wS8May9mrKU-Z8rWnXI2oozNc1Q0qVUs=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Dr. Mary L. Trump
subject: It’s official: My uncle is campaigning in Virginia
body:
He’ll do anything to get his candidate elected

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38083762/313896529/1300596418?refcode=211029_FR_btexmcauliffesplit2-marytrump_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhMGYxNDhmLWYxMzgtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=opZEQYowr6lwrWzgumxWqrOfkbNmCOaTE-2zKl8qnr4=)

It’s official, Peter, my uncle, the most dangerous man in America, just announced he’s going to campaign for Glenn Youngkin in the Virginia governor’s race.

**Terry McAuliffe needs your support right now — more than ever.** **[We have a rapid response goal of raising 10,000 grassroots contributions before my uncle’s rally in Virginia, and Terry needs your help. Will you split a donation between Terry’s campaign and Barrier To Entry PAC right now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38083763/313896531/-1412769256?refcode=211029_FR_btexmcauliffesplit2-marytrump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhMGYxNDhmLWYxMzgtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=opZEQYowr6lwrWzgumxWqrOfkbNmCOaTE-2zKl8qnr4=)** **______[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38083764/313896533/-1412769256?refcode=211029_FR_btexmcauliffesplit2-marytrump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhMGYxNDhmLWYxMzgtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=opZEQYowr6lwrWzgumxWqrOfkbNmCOaTE-2zKl8qnr4=)** Glenn Youngkin might pretend he’s a moderate, pragmatic Republican.

But the truth is, he’s just as bad as Donald Trump — that’s why Donald has endorsed him **_eight times._**

And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are attached at the hip — they’re gone now. **Donald Trump is _all_ in for Youngkin.** We worked much too hard to stomp out right-wing extremism last year — and I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up to make sure my uncle’s radical followers, like Glenn Youngkin, aren’t given the chance to gain power.

_**Are you going to stand by and hand my uncle a victory? But the truth is, he’s just as bad as Donald Trump — that’s why Donald has endorsed him eight times. And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are attached at the hip — they’re gone now. Donald Trump is all in for Youngkin. We worked much too hard to stomp out right-wing extremism last year — and I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up to make sure my uncle’s radical followers, like Glenn Youngkin, aren’t given the chance to gain power. Are you going to stand by and hand my uncle a victory? Or will you fight back and help Terry keep Virginia blue? = __= Thank you for urgently stepping up. Dr. Mary L. name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Thank you for joining our movement
body:
to put our Country First.

| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_survey_request&n=1)
---
| [](https://country1st.nationbuilder.com/welcome_survey?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_survey_request&n=2 "Take the 1-Minute Survey") [Take the 1-Minute Survey](https://country1st.nationbuilder.com/welcome_survey?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_survey_request&n=2)
---
Friend,
I would be remiss if I did not say "thank you." Thank you for proving there are SO many people out there who want what's best for America rather than just what's best for their "team." I've been so encouraged watching conservatives and progressives, Republicans and Democrats, and those who've felt without a home come together under the Country First banner. Sure, we may not agree on every public policy, but that's not what this movement is about. We agree on what's most important: saving the very foundation of our Republic, and building a brighter future upon it.
And if you've gotten this far, I'd like to ask for your help. For this movement to be effective and impactful, it's important that we understand each other. Would you please take 1 minute to fill out our very first Country First survey? It will be a huge help.
[](https://country1st.nationbuilder.com/welcome_survey?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_survey_request&n=3 "Take the 1-Minute Survey") [Take the 1-Minute Survey](https://country1st.nationbuilder.com/welcome_survey?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_survey_request&n=3)
---
Thank you again for your time and thank you for putting Country First.
Yours in service,
Adam
Country First · PO Box 2385, Ottawa, IL 61350, United States

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Many may look at me and see mostly what I have lost
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Many may look at me and see mostly what I have lost.
But instead of focusing on what I cannot do, I have tried to live life without limits. I’ve set tougher and tougher goals for myself.
Some of those goals I can only chase alone.
Others require teamwork and the commitment of many others to accomplish what most believed would be impossible.
Mark’s work as a Senator and his re-election campaign is not easy work. And the way he tackles that work takes courage.
Believe me, I am familiar with the pressure those in Congress face to cast votes for their communities knowing the extraordinary sums of money that could be spent against them by corporate special interests seeking retribution. He is facing that today.
Those are votes he must take alone.
But the work of keeping him in the Senate is something we all must do together. That is the only way he wins. And it is why I am asking:
[**Can you PLEASE make a contribution, of $3 or whatever you can afford, before Mark’s end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close? We are still short of our 75,000 donation goal and time is running out.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211029-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1590_6688874_NSTzJW&akid=1590%2E6688874%2ENSTzJW)

name: Claudia, Me (1)
subject: fwd: President Eisenhower warned us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
This is barely a political party anymore, it's a group of people in Washington... Peter 一 it’s Claudia. Democrats are _running sham political investigations against conservatives_ , _openly calling to remove the filibuster_ , and _packing the Supreme Court_. _**You know President Eisenhower once said,**_ **_“A political party must be dedicated to the advancement of a moral cause, otherwise it is just a conspiracy to seize power.”_** And unfortunately that’s exactly what we’re witnessing from the leadership of the Democrat party. Peter, this is barely a political party anymore, it's a group of people in Washington trying to consolidate their power. That’s why by no circumstance can we allow H.R.1 or H.R. 4 or any federal election bill to make it through Congress, _otherwise Washington will permanently control our election system!_ _[**Peter, this isn’t a fight I can win alone, it’s going to take every American to stand up and stop thisーwill you join the fight and rush a few dollars to help me?**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=6eb1a9fb64c74963bd1563889da158eb&_e=VPTgkVtSZq31uYnH9WABrkarv8uD0p2mqMsVUrHqlePKY8R2BOJD0xNJG9MYthV-xaVrP213IlPgeknlXHBrTrTZwi1AMAnWUa7RGzTkZc38PkK6bWGiBMitVLsA-MeaWyPu3bLq0ftiBNbHli2CeKns_YyqGYdEsHOm_EvW3fwftv1YaBLADnrdC6GSt4G3V4X46b-F8mD73DXWzaej3SNb5jh_-k60MfocaQAXFRWi5cM5htCPb7CROAEpQ45wU4xc_FF3p6aVXq4ERjkSopkA4s1mUCTuvXQvBFW1Bp2dM7RQpgoML3fJybh4OFWgA3P32Plis16VPyMpeJm_Bo_3KQccezuR7MoZrenxqzVHrEQCkr_XnqEyAPGNJhP9dREAA-wn3EtOWzP8HFC2Ke_gUxS1dfwpZONC5Df82CYZx7BR0_KNBF7BEbzJmmNWLX-lmHbNm8YrjUr_RxApLLUunKfMY3e6OoRElSdxfbzq4cYaILdqnYaKA1e-xln_)_ name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We're with Rashida, Ilhan & Bernie
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Rashida isn't interested in a vote on "BIF" — the corporate-backed, small
infrastructure "framework" that establishment Democrats are pushing. We're
with her.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/80274?refcode=em20211029-20230&t=1002&akid=20230%2E1203867%2ES0nSSx ]Tweet from reporter Sarah Mucha reads Rep. Rashida Tlaib walks out of
the progressive caucus meeting, says she's a 'Hell No on BIF'

She's reiterating what she's been saying, along with Bernie, Cori Bush,
AOC, Ilhan Omar, and Pramila Jayapal. A "framework" backed by corporate
lobbyists is a threat to the environment and the people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/80274?refcode=em20211029-20230&t=1003&akid=20230%2E1203867%2ES0nSSx ]Tweet from Rashida Tlaib reads 'I am not going to sell out my district
for a bill that was written by the fossil fuel industry and championed by
two Dem senators who bow down to Big Pharma & corporate polluters.'

Corporate Democrats have spent months stripping cornerstone policies from
the Build Back Better Act like free community college, Medicare expansion,
prescription drug reform, paid family and medical leave, a billionaire’s
tax, a pathway to citizenship for immigrants, and so much more. BUT these
so-called Democrats have been pushing this smaller infrastructure
framework (BIF) the whole time, because that’s what their wealthy donors
and corporate lobbyists want.

Rashida, AOC, Ilhan, and other Justice Democrats have made it clear: We’re
ready to legislate for the PEOPLE, not corporate lobbyists and Wall
Street.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/80274?refcode=em20211029-20230&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20230%2E1203867%2ES0nSSx ]We need to Hold the Line and continue fighting for the people and
action on climate change. Can you rush a contribution to Justice Democrats
right now to help us Hold the Line? We need the progressive movement
strong and united right now, and we have a $25,000 end-of-month goal to
hit!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/80274?refcode=em20211029-20230&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20230%2E1203867%2ES0nSSx ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=20230%2E1203867%2ES0nSSx ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=20230%2E1203867%2ES0nSSx ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211029-20230-footer&t=1026&refcode2=20230_1203867_S0nSSx&akid=20230%2E1203867%2ES0nSSx

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=20230%2E1203867%2ES0nSSx

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
