name: Karen Bass Finance Team
subject: Checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
300.

That's how many more contributions we need to receive before Sunday's end-of-month deadline when we submit our fundraising report.

**How did we get that number?** Based on giving so far, we need 300 more donations to hit our 1,500 end-of-month donor goal. Each donation -- no matter how small -- will prove the strength of our campaign before this critical deadline. And if just 300 more people chip in at least $3, that's already $900 raised before the deadline.

Karen wants support from every single zip code, and donating at least $3 proves we have 300 more people who are ready to see Karen's vision for Los Angeles become a reality heading into November.

**[Friend, will you be one of the 300 people we need to chip in before Sunday's deadline to reach our goal? Chip in $3, or whatever you can, to help fuel Karen's campaign.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cz3NSy1iaD5BhcAX7udtnkEbKFRY6ow48eVlQc8biss=/pBWf96aRiuUFVQ9gfPJUBJu3QC3241Fwd45q91760mQ=?ms=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cz3NSy1iaD5BhcAX7udtnkEbKFRY6ow48eVlQc8biss=/pBWf96aRiuUFVQ9gfPJUBJu3QC3241Fwd45q91760mQ=?ms=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_albbt1&refcode=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_albbt1&source=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_albbt1&utm_campaign=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_albbt1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass&am=3)
---
_*Individual donations from L.A. residents may be matched
6-to-1 by the city, so your $3 could become $21!*_
This Sunday is the single-most important deadline we've faced since our campaign started. The number of grassroots supporters who contribute will show how much momentum we have.

Not only that, what we raise now will help us plan our future investments. The amount of donations we receive before Sunday will determine how much we can invest in digital advertising, campaign staff, and community outreach.

We can't afford to come up short, friend. **[Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can afford, before Sunday's deadline to support Karen's grassroots campaign?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cz3NSy1iaD5BhcAX7udtnkEbKFRY6ow48eVlQc8biss=/pBWf96aRiuUFVQ9gfPJUBJu3QC3241Fwd45q91760mQ=?ms=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_alask2&refcode=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_alask2&source=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

Thank you for your support,

Karen Bass Finance Team

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A.. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cz3NSy1iaD5BhcAX7udtnkEbKFRY6ow48eVlQc8biss=/pBWf96aRiuUFVQ9gfPJUBJu3QC3241Fwd45q91760mQ=?ms=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_alftr&refcode=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_alftr&source=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_alftr&utm_campaign=em21_211028_eom2_fndd_gq_act___kbft_ettx_alftr&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)

subject: We need to keep up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mississippi Republican Party
body:

Fellow Republican,
The Mississippi Republican Party ensures that our values and freedoms are not lost to the Radical Left. We work with you and for you to keep America on track.

However, we are seeing Democrat's fundraising numbers getting too close to ours lately.

We must widen that gap and out fundraise the left! All donations will be applied to the federal account unless prohibited by federal election law. Mississippi law allows corporate contributions up to $1,000 per calendar year.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Will you make a $3 contribution towards our October goal?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Taking on tough challenges is in the DNA of our organization.
#

Because of supporters like you, we've accomplished so much in the fight against gun violence.
We’ve elected gun safety candidates up and down the ballot, and have been holding the gun lobby accountable so we can save lives. We appreciate you being on our team — but today, I am reaching out with a special request:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution towards our October fundraising goal before the Sunday, 10/31 deadline? Pitch in here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?refcode=em211029-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1147_3935704_iF53bW&akid=1147%2E3935704%2EiF53bW)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211029-1-30&t=20&refcode2=1147_3935704_iF53bW&akid=1147%2E3935704%2EiF53bW)**
---

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211029-1-30&t=22&refcode2=1147_3935704_iF53bW&akid=1147%2E3935704%2EiF53bW)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211029-1-30&t=23&refcode2=1147_3935704_iF53bW&akid=1147%2E3935704%2EiF53bW)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211029-1-30&t=24&refcode2=1147_3935704_iF53bW&akid=1147%2E3935704%2EiF53bW)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?express_lane=true&refcode=em211029-1-30&t=25&refcode2=1147_3935704_iF53bW&akid=1147%2E3935704%2EiF53bW)**
---
****
We’ve set a fundraising goal of $115,000, so your $3 contribution will bring us one step closer to hitting that goal.
And that’s so important. Make no mistake, the gun lobby and the members of Congress they’ve bought and paid for are not going to go down without a fight. They want to stop the progress we’ve made before it gets any further.
But we’re not going to give up either, because taking on tough challenges is in the DNA of our organization.
This has been a long haul. It was always going to be that way. But I’m optimistic that if we keep moving forward, we will emerge victorious.
Thank you for doing your part.
All my best,
Gabby

name: James Carville
subject: If Democrats lose in Virginia, it's game over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend, I won't lie to you -- if Democrats lose in Virginia, **_it 's game over_**.
**[Don't let it happen -- split a donation between Senator Blumenthal and Terry McAuliffe's campaign right now to help him in the final days of his campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal4mcauliffe?refcode=jtk1094-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**

If Donald Trump's handpicked candidate pulls off a win this year, Republicans will get a huge boost heading into next year's critical midterm elections.
And if Republicans do well next year, Donald Trump will be all set for his 2024 run for president.
It's that simple.

clean_body: | I’m reaching out personally because this can’t wait, friend. = = 2022 may feel like a long way away, but the fact is, we’re just about one year out from Election Day — and it’ll go by fast. If we’re going to build the ground game it takes to win — a first-class organizing operation with a base of support in every corner of the state — it’ll take hard work. We’re not afraid of hard work, friend. Not when it’s in service of something worthwhile. I don’t believe there’s anything more worthwhile than fighting for a better future for Ohioans — one where opportunity abounds and middle and working class families have the chance to get ahead. Peter, will you chip in to help my turnout team succe | Peter, It’s election week here in Ohio’s 15th! | My army of volunteers, grassroots patriots, and I are going door to door, making phone calls, and making sure that every single one of our voters knows that it’s time to cast their ballot. But Peter, if we can’t keep our operation funded we don’t have any time left to catch up. It’s now or never. My volunteers and supporters need to be focused on getting out the vote. Your support lets them focus on winning. I know that I have called upon you before Peter, but I need you to step up once more and help take back the house for the GOP and save our country. This election will be close Peter. Democrats have targeted this district. Their limousine liberal donors have poured in millions to steal this seat and to keep Pelosi and AOC in charge of congress. If we can’t win and stop them in Ohio’s 15th, we will have no hope in the midterms. So, Thank you, Mike Carey Trump endorsed candidate OH-15 | | Paid for by Carey for Congress P.O. name: Team Erica Smith
subject: You’ll never have to hear about Manchin or Sinema again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Erica is unbossed, unbought, and exactly who we need to pass progressive policy NOW
#
Hey there,
We know we’re all frustrated hearing about Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema but these are pretty condemning records:
* * *
**Joe Manchin:**
**❌** Had weekly meetings with ExxonMobil execs — who for 50 years denied climate change and lobbied against climate protection legislation.
❌ Profited MILLIONS from coal companies he founded in the 1980s
❌ Continually does the bidding of Big Pharma, Big Oil, and other corporate lobbyists who are spending millions of dollars to block President Biden’s agenda
**Kyrsten Sinema:**
**❌** Consistently blocks tax increases on the rich and voted against raising the minimum wage to $15
❌ Fundraises at a winery owned by a BILLIONAIRE — charging guests like Bill Gates and the CEO of Lyft $5,000 a ticket
❌ Raised over $1 million last quarter with HUGE donations from the pharmaceutical and financial industries
* * *
**We shouldn’t have to rely on Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin for YES votes on progressive legislation that are never coming.**
[**_Can you rush a donation of $5 to our campaign before the end-of-month fundraising deadline on October 31 so we_**** _never_****have to rely on these corporate Dems again?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/24290?t=1&akid=592%2E3698%2E33JPps)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/24296?refcode=em20211029-592&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=592%2E3698%2E33JPps)**
We need more progressives in the Senate. Voices that are unbought and unbossed — and spoiler alert: that’s Erica.
She intimately knows what it means to work hard and fight to make ends meet. Erica doesn’t take a dime of super PAC, fossil fuel, or corporate money. Erica refuses to be swayed by money and she has and always will fight for the people.
**Voters did their part in 2020.** Democratic voters delivered the House, Senate, and Presidency and we’re still not seeing the progressive policies folks were promised.
We deserve better. We need representatives who will deliver on the issues that they run on. That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we elect Erica to the Senate.
We can’t EVER let the Joe Manchins and Kyrsten Sinemas of the world block progress again.
[**_Can you donate $5 today to help us meet our end-of-month goal by midnight on October 31?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/24290?t=21&akid=592%2E3698%2E33JPps)
This is why we fight,
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211029-592-footer&t=22&refcode2=592_3698_33JPps&akid=592%2E3698%2E33JPps)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=592%2E3698%2E33JPps)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=592%2E3698%2E33JPps)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: It matters who's in office and who funds their campaigns.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
I refuse to take money from the corporate special interests that are trying to block popular policies like paid family leave.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085533/313906655/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_211029EOM-ND_EOM_CD_ND_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOThjODIwNi1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_rq9vx6G0f9H_QGqXASs-EldV8gNLCwMcBP7Zudtwk=)
---
Derek — the Build Back Better bill that Congress is preparing to vote on is a historic achievement that will make a meaningful difference in the lives of millions of Americans. But I'm outraged that corporate special interests, working overtime to pressure certain members of Congress, managed to get paid family leave taken out of the bill at the last minute.

It’s not radical to believe that no one should have to choose between caring for a sick kid or loved one and getting fired. **We need paid family leave in this country, and we need it now.**

I'm running for Congress because I'm fed up with lobbyists and backroom deals stopping popular policies that advance the common good. I'm refusing to take a single dollar of corporate PAC money, so I need grassroots supporters like you to help me fight for our values in Washington. [**Please make your first donation of $5 before our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Sunday. We're still $4,837 short of our goal, and anything you can give to close the gap will make a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085534/313906656/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_211029EOM-ND_EOM_CD_ND_7_NG_N_L1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOThjODIwNi1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_rq9vx6G0f9H_QGqXASs-EldV8gNLCwMcBP7Zudtwk=) ****[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085535/313906657/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_211029EOM-ND_EOM_CD_ND_7_NG_N_B1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOThjODIwNi1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_rq9vx6G0f9H_QGqXASs-EldV8gNLCwMcBP7Zudtwk=)**** My wife Zoë and I are the working parents of three young children, and we know firsthand the value of paid family leave. To all the forces trying to stop this policy, I'd ask them: do you ever talk to parents with young kids working hard to get by? Ever ask what happens when child care is too expensive? Or when a sick kid means a missed day of work?

I refuse to take money from the special interests trying to block popular policies like paid family leave. **The past few weeks have shown that it matters who is elected to office, and who funds their campaigns.**

But with a Republican opponent now in the race, you can be sure that special interests won't hesitate to spend endless amounts against me. And I can't take them on without your help.

[**So I'm asking you to chip in before our end-of-month fundraising deadline. Please give what you can to help us make up ground by Sunday.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085536/313906658/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_211029EOM-ND_EOM_CD_ND_7_NG_N_L1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOThjODIwNi1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_rq9vx6G0f9H_QGqXASs-EldV8gNLCwMcBP7Zudtwk=)

Thank you,

Chris | | | **Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085537/313906659/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_211029EOM-ND_EOM_CD_ND_7_NG_N_BioBox&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOThjODIwNi1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_rq9vx6G0f9H_QGqXASs-EldV8gNLCwMcBP7Zudtwk=)****

But I'm outraged that corporate special interests, working overtime to pressure certain members of Congress, managed to get paid family leave taken out of the bill at the last minute. It’s not radical to believe that no one should have to choose between caring for a sick kid or loved one and getting fired. We need paid family leave in this country, and we need it now. I'm running for Congress because I'm fed up with lobbyists and backroom deals stopping popular policies that advance the common good. I'm refusing to take a single dollar of corporate PAC money, so I need grassroots supporters like you to help me fight for our values in Washington. = **= My wife Zoë and I are the working parents of three young children, and we know firsthand the value of paid family leave. To all the forces trying to stop this policy, I'd ask them: do you ever talk to parents with young kids working hard to get by? Ever ask what happens when child care is too expensive? Or when a sick kid means a missed day of work? I refuse to take money from the special interests trying to block popular policies like paid family leave. The past few weeks have shown that it matters who is elected to office, and who funds their campaigns. But with a Republican opponent now in the race, you can be sure that special interests won't hesitate to spend endless amounts against me. And I can't take them on without your help. = Thank you, Chris | | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. =** Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- October 29****, 2021-** **\- INDems "Small Town, Indiana" Statewide Tour Kicks Off -** The Indiana Democratic Party kicked off its fourth statewide tour in five months last week. The focus for this effort is on small towns and rural communities across Indiana. During this fourteen-stop effort, Democrats like Dr. Jennifer McCormick, Jill Long Thompson, and Shelli Yoder will highlight how state and local Democrats are delivering on issues like agriculture and education in rural communities. Thanks to President Joe Biden's American Rescue Plan, Hoosiers in all areas saw their public schools receive full funding for the first time in a decade and the ag community received critical broadband investments needed for our farmers. Indiana Democrats will share this and so much more delivering on a promise to meet Hoosiers where they are regardless of the Zip code. Dr. Jennifer McCormick and Democrats are also calling out Indiana Republicans for their ongoing crusade against the state's public school system - particularly the upcoming goal to make school board elections partisan. This effort is hypocritical on the surface because [two years ago](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085661/313907093/-1972673576?FFF.10.29.21.=FFF.10.29.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcyZTQ3NC1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygoBzLFHL41RZ5NT67cYRlkDCWnpdawqxI25qST5tbc=&emci=0fbdf675-ec38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3f72e474-f738-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535), Governor Eric Holcomb and the INGOP supermajority at the statehouse voted to remove the Superintendent of Public Instruction office as an elected, partisan position. Indiana Democrats' next stop is November 2nd in Bedford. Combined with the American Rescue Plan. American Jobs Plan, Redistricting, and "Small Town" tours, the Indiana Democratic Party will have visited 55 out of 92 counties across the state in just a few months. Our goal is to meet Hoosiers where they are and celebrate how we are solving today's most-pressing problems facing families. We'll continue this effort through the 2022 election year. We hope you'll join us! **\- Indiana Republican Party's Partisanship Diminishing Indiana's Reputation -** Indiana Republicans' extreme partisanship continues to divide communities and Hoosier families across the state. From U.S. Senator Todd Young, State Senator Scott Baldwin, and to the INGOP Chair Kyle Hupfer, Republicans care more about what helps them win elections rather than delivering a better future for Hoosiers. Here's a reminder of how extreme and dangerous the Indiana Republican Party has become: 1\. [U.S. Senator Todd Young](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085662/313907094/743250593?FFF.10.29.21.=FFF.10.29.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcyZTQ3NC1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygoBzLFHL41RZ5NT67cYRlkDCWnpdawqxI25qST5tbc=&emci=0fbdf675-ec38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3f72e474-f738-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) claims he wants to "enrich" the childcare profession but voted "NO" on investments in updated provider facilities and higher wages for workers. 2\. [INGOP Chair Kyle Hupfer and Scott Baldwin](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085663/313907095/-1423160072?FFF.10.29.21.=FFF.10.29.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcyZTQ3NC1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygoBzLFHL41RZ5NT67cYRlkDCWnpdawqxI25qST5tbc=&emci=0fbdf675-ec38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3f72e474-f738-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) both refused to denounce a domestic terrorist organization (the Oath Keepers) after Baldwin was found to have an "annual membership" with them. 3\. INGOP Chairman Hupfer refused to denounce the [Nazi flag](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085664/313907096/1937374816?FFF.10.29.21.=FFF.10.29.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcyZTQ3NC1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygoBzLFHL41RZ5NT67cYRlkDCWnpdawqxI25qST5tbc=&emci=0fbdf675-ec38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3f72e474-f738-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535), which was found flying outside Macy, Indiana. 4\. All Republicans voted "NO" to form a nonpartisan commission to address the domestic terrorist attack executed by extremist groups like the Oath Keepers. 5\. The entire Indiana Republican Party plans to vote "NO" on the Build Back Better agenda, calling it a "reckless tax-and-spend- proposal". This is after the INGOP added [$7.8 trillion to the national debt](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085665/313907097/27844957?FFF.10.29.21.=FFF.10.29.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcyZTQ3NC1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygoBzLFHL41RZ5NT67cYRlkDCWnpdawqxI25qST5tbc=&emci=0fbdf675-ec38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3f72e474-f738-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) under the Trump administration. 6\. [Jim Baird, Jim Banks, Greg Pence, and Jackie Walorski](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085666/313907098/21719698?FFF.10.29.21.=FFF.10.29.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcyZTQ3NC1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygoBzLFHL41RZ5NT67cYRlkDCWnpdawqxI25qST5tbc=&emci=0fbdf675-ec38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3f72e474-f738-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) all voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election results, which contributed to the January 6 Insurrection against the United States. The Indiana Republican Party is providing Hoosiers lip service on a string of promises that they continue to vote against like broadband, childcare, and liveable wage jobs. The INGOP is putting their extreme partisanship ahead of a brighter future for struggling Hoosier families. In contrast, Indiana Democrats are focused on delivering a better future for Hoosier families. This includes saying "YES" to the American Rescue Plan and its investments that will create better opportunities for Hoosiers. The Rescue Plan is delivering for Hoosier families on issues that matter to them, and Democrats look forward to passing the rest of President Joe Biden's transformational agenda because every person in Indiana deserves to have a brighter future. **\- Opportunities -** **\- Annual Holiday Party -**
[**Get Your Tickets Here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085667/313907099/-710561404?FFF.10.29.21.=FFF.10.29.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcyZTQ3NC1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygoBzLFHL41RZ5NT67cYRlkDCWnpdawqxI25qST5tbc=) **\- Federal Election Commission Upcoming Trainings -** The Commission will host several training events this fall to help political committees understand and comply with the federal campaign finance regulations. Our [Virtual Conference](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38085668/313907100/-1174116220?FFF.10.29.21.=FFF.10.29.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcyZTQ3NC1mNzM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygoBzLFHL41RZ5NT67cYRlkDCWnpdawqxI25qST5tbc=&emci=0fbdf675-ec38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3f72e474-f738-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) on November 16 - 17 will offer two days of in-depth training in an online, interactive format. The conference, led by FEC Commissioners and staff will feature group sessions and breakout workshops tailored to meet the needs of campaigns, party committees, and corporate/labor/trade PACs. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- October 29, 2021- \- INDems "Small Town, Indiana" Statewide Tour Kicks Off - The Indiana Democratic Party kicked off its fourth statewide tour in five months last week. The focus for this effort is on small towns and rural communities across Indiana. During this fourteen-stop effort, Democrats like Dr. Jennifer McCormick, Jill Long Thompson, and Shelli Yoder will highlight how state and local Democrats are delivering on issues like agriculture and education in rural communities. Thanks to President Joe Biden's American Rescue Plan, Hoosiers in all areas saw their public schools receive full funding for the first time in a decade and the ag community received critical broadband investments needed for our farmers. Indiana Democrats will share this and so much more delivering on a promise to meet Hoosiers where they are regardless of the Zip code. Dr. Jennifer McCormick and Democrats are also calling out Indiana Republicans for their ongoing crusade against the state's public school system - particularly the upcoming goal to make school board elections partisan. This effort is hypocritical on the surface because , Governor Eric Holcomb and the INGOP supermajority at the statehouse voted to remove the Superintendent of Public Instruction office as an elected, partisan position. Indiana Democrats' next stop is November 2nd in Bedford. Combined with the American Rescue Plan. American Jobs Plan, Redistricting, and "Small Town" tours, the Indiana Democratic Party will have visited 55 out of 92 counties across the state in just a few months. Our goal is to meet Hoosiers where they are and celebrate how we are solving today's most-pressing problems facing families. We'll continue this effort through the 2022 election year. We hope you'll join us! \- Indiana Republican Party's Partisanship Diminishing Indiana's Reputation - Indiana Republicans' extreme partisanship continues to divide communities and Hoosier families across the state. From U.S. Senator Todd Young, State Senator Scott Baldwin, and to the INGOP Chair Kyle Hupfer, Republicans care more about what helps them win elections rather than delivering a better future for Hoosiers. Here's a reminder of how extreme and dangerous the Indiana Republican Party has become: 1\. claims he wants to "enrich" the childcare profession but voted "NO" on investments in updated provider facilities and higher wages for workers. 2\. both refused to denounce a domestic terrorist organization (the Oath Keepers) after Baldwin was found to have an "annual membership" with them. 3\. INGOP Chairman Hupfer refused to denounce the , which was found flying outside Macy, Indiana. 4\. All Republicans voted "NO" to form a nonpartisan commission to address the domestic terrorist attack executed by extremist groups like the Oath Keepers. 5\. The entire Indiana Republican Party plans to vote "NO" on the Build Back Better agenda, calling it a "reckless tax-and-spend- proposal". This is after the INGOP added under the Trump administration. 6\. all voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election results, which contributed to the January 6 Insurrection against the United States. The Indiana Republican Party is providing Hoosiers lip service on a string of promises that they continue to vote against like broadband, childcare, and liveable wage jobs. The INGOP is putting their extreme partisanship ahead of a brighter future for struggling Hoosier families. In contrast, Indiana Democrats are focused on delivering a better future for Hoosier families. This includes saying "YES" to the American Rescue Plan and its investments that will create better opportunities for Hoosiers. The Rescue Plan is delivering for Hoosier families on issues that matter to them, and Democrats look forward to passing the rest of President Joe Biden's transformational agenda because every person in Indiana deserves to have a brighter future. \- Opportunities - \- Annual Holiday Party - = \- Federal Election Commission Upcoming Trainings - The Commission will host several training events this fall to help political committees understand and comply with the federal campaign finance regulations. clean_body: Just when you thought they couldn’t get crazier! | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, It seems like every day Socialists Democrats say something crazy. But we never imagined they’d go as far as this. Now, they’re accusing energy companies of “White Supremacy” because they sell oil and natural gas. And they’re planning to pay $450,000 per person to illegal immigrants as “reparations” for being deported. These Socialists are a danger to our nation and our values, and we cannot allow them gain ground in Battleground States like Missouri. | Official Donor File EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #0119683 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via The Missouri Republican Party

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Humbly asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | | Friend,

I'm urgently reaching out to you with a humble request.

My election is in just 5 days, ballots are already being cast, and time and resources are running critically low.

We are so close to pulling off a victory in Virginia, but this race is so tight that every single dollar will make or break the outcome of this election.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c404e51e757e42929df99c3b8d764024&_e=18ip0NjZhoxEjQWgLu9xDgr_S1kNP9ra5FV-DobK0ReesdTKpKlN09CZbCZ2gqMaBFHz00-XnWVBuUlULNIiQr-P9h4W-gfN5AJ2z65LdR7TMgc6h4upIHAjHiJZNFa-W37P31J0wpXbrIX8zNVBaNCyD4qtaaGRHtUftlFfk6AJdLcMvur-KK1j4yVujFaSj9S0UrF6SieIMu9Uq7asC_sr3Mhilis-Dv1ZcON3tk4-Ej95MI4rKY4WQqa0VNDzEWcbjZ4x8IDc-JNJ8kUH_FZUvc1hac7tH06_vO_Spy5g1aWDCE175CAwsN4Qaza8LnYG1z8Ik76mVPGbDZp8n9oRrjj7rLj7wLlPkIRSs9tQSYMpvC9yehfA_D1fkGo0sI2OVhlakA5TACpsUejAvbI4fRS9hDM1A3ViKlA5FPWOv5JRoyK9EslIb7f-JibuxStvVJVqa_xWpGVPac1xH8VvZLPT0wi7MXk1ggiv9itE6qSKYu7MylFq3tP-GjTVfPl2KLIfQUkbrwG_ZFiVLuWCZUZZKcdNZYomXL3ae0s%3D "If you have anything to spare, I’m humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c404e51e757e42929df99c3b8d764024&_e=18ip0NjZhoxEjQWgLu9xDgr_S1kNP9ra5FV-DobK0ReesdTKpKlN09CZbCZ2gqMaBFHz00-XnWVBuUlULNIiQr-P9h4W-gfN5AJ2z65LdR7TMgc6h4upIHAjHiJZNFa-W37P31J0wpXbrIX8zNVBaNCyD4qtaaGRHtUftlFfk6AJdLcMvur-KK1j4yVujFaSj9S0UrF6SieIMu9Uq7asC_sr3Mhilis-Dv1ZcON3tk4-Ej95MI4rKY4WQqa0VNDzEWcbjZ4x8IDc-JNJ8kUH_FZUvc1hac7tH06_vO_Spy5g1aWDCE175CAwsN4Qaza8LnYG1z8Ik76mVPGbDZp8n3PEZcAhywrOgK8a-CWUcU0HDV4p0UuUW4dscJvnkZU7zi_CHxnr5LA1LkuNIre_HTP6h8PhyMZaRCe373pTsQBQVy4nTydpoVz3QLBpRsVhIXZ3_fbOTQF2Xw-irlN1WDeWf6EHRj_PrMAROZVYEis-buL9gmTzZ2m64t5aItFbxh5QZiZRKRSa2NwfwI7wB6JyFEwhLrD6JcawaRC66Uc%3D)
---

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this governors race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

Winning in Virginia will set the tone for 2022, but we're running out of time. _**[That's why I'm hoping you'll step up with any amount you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c404e51e757e42929df99c3b8d764024&_e=18ip0NjZhoxEjQWgLu9xDgr_S1kNP9ra5FV-DobK0ReesdTKpKlN09CZbCZ2gqMaBFHz00-XnWVBuUlULNIiQr-P9h4W-gfN5AJ2z65LdR7TMgc6h4upIHAjHiJZNFa-W37P31J0wpXbrIX8zNVBaNCyD4qtaaGRHtUftlFfk6AJdLcMvur-KK1j4yVujFaSj9S0UrF6SieIMu9Uq7asC_sr3Mhilis-Dv1ZcON3tk4-Ej95MI4rKY4WQqa0VNDzEWcbjZ4x8IDc-JNJ8kUH_FZUvc1hac7tH06_vO_Spy5g1aWDCE175CAwsN4Qaza8LnYG1z8Ik76mVPGbDZp8n_wBnBUUShcHBAm7M3N-8_MnI3hH_jzMXuxUbwNcioQf2PaO9Q9FlPtSbHCpsoOdXFO9UpNv9LhGyRFJ-loizKZUqfpq2LRkk37jZpBYrrTheAa4N0fhjFC1e3n8GaVns4IjkWbBYCI-u-cP-Nf1Fo4fAiMAQ6ztbgpSKaaqC1wSLToSn1GV6AwTiiMky43qx2gxD34RZJIBXJmTVpPmqYQ%3D "That’s why I’m hoping you’ll step up with any amount you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1. ")**_

_We can win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe in a dead heat with less than a week to go._

---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c404e51e757e42929df99c3b8d764024&_e=RVpef3VtrEkVShoc5nrYEnAG2Tn6MKw1P2LJ5Q0bXzn2LoQ-HG-P1ZnoA1LoJ2QKyTj26CtoYip_mvo8cKcpiefvjwhrhLw37uY2A0zjWlzdV2Ebf6h0IBMosm9E3UN8YF6VsSGmsDGdtTSH92RWbA-dGwODGspdvZ86JkPmNniLgZbyl_5gn9-Pi1t3S0LKZIWIiSCo8AGZCxhIW7Y38wXTIto3-uw6wn7d2ga_SdgoNb6CXy10RbrD26ukqWRXSP-1nSIXxCoEZRdikkclNxYW4LWlPLhC217QmYmROPA%3D)
---

**But, the latest polls make fully funding these final days even more critical.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in right away to help me win the race for governor in just 5 days?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c404e51e757e42929df99c3b8d764024&_e=18ip0NjZhoxEjQWgLu9xDgr_S1kNP9ra5FV-DobK0ReesdTKpKlN09CZbCZ2gqMaBFHz00-XnWVBuUlULNIiQr-P9h4W-gfN5AJ2z65LdR7TMgc6h4upIHAjHiJZNFa-W37P31J0wpXbrIX8zNVBaNCyD4qtaaGRHtUftlFfk6AJdLcMvur-KK1j4yVujFaSj9S0UrF6SieIMu9Uq7asC_sr3Mhilis-Dv1ZcON3tk4-Ej95MI4rKY4WQqa0VNDzEWcbjZ4x8IDc-JNJ8kUH_FZUvc1hac7tH06_vO_Spy5g1aWDCE175CAwsN4Qaza8LnYG1z8Ik76mVPGbDZp8n2gigMvxXmLnviRYuAJmCR5Nu8Eom0dnha5usmF0TXW2m0cURWXKhI6ko5TxzdPYijot4Qe7NiE_ibSjjt62PBCmE8fFAv0PaEiSB18xTR5GV6SC61L96ph1GDljie5aukd8odalTfmu5WhBwy7bYq6DKEXeVY964jwF-gW2aCgtsAnnG5lPBqFI6yC03Bmb_UdE7EZXTk-Uh9Or_3SiDr4%3D "So, can I please count on you to pitch in right away to help me win the race for governor in just 5 days?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Glenn Youngkin

clean_body: | | | Friend, I'm urgently reaching out to you with a humble request. My election is in just 5 days, ballots are already being cast, and time and resources are running critically low. We are so close to pulling off a victory in Virginia, but this race is so tight that every single dollar will make or break the outcome of this election. "If you have anything to spare, I’m humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections." | | | If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this governors race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools. If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory. Winning in Virginia will set the tone for 2022, but we're running out of time. "That’s why I’m hoping you’ll step up with any amount you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1. " We can win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe in a dead heat with less than a week to go. | But, the latest polls make fully funding these final days even more critical. Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. "So, can I please count on you to pitch in right away to help me win the race for governor in just 5 days?" Thank you in advance for your generous support. Sincerely, Glenn Youngkin | | | | | | | "Nikki Haley Image" EXCLUSIVE MESSAGE FROM NIKKI HALEY: I'm focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values. Please help me fight back against the Democrats and their radical agenda. We can only defeat them if we stand united. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We have no choice but to keep this fight going.
#
Peter,
I wanted to update you on where things stand after this busy week.
Yesterday, I helped lead our charge to hold off mounting pressure on progressives to do something we’ve consistently said we will not do: **We will not approve _only_ a smaller physical infrastructure bill without President Biden’s larger Build Back Better Act that makes long-overdue investments in working people, families, and our communities.**
I have worked with each and every stakeholder in the Democratic caucus and the White House to advance the popular Build Back Better Act — with historic investments in childcare, affordable housing, pre-K, health care, climate action, and much more. Progressives have been the biggest, most consistent, most enthusiastic champions of this popular Democratic agenda that voters want us to deliver on.
While corporate lobbyists, Big Pharma, and Wall Street have tried to stop us from fighting for the people, we’ve kept the President’s Build Back Better agenda on track and moving forward.
Now, we are organizing inside and outside of Congress to get it over the finish line so we can secure real change that will allow people across America to wake up feeling different about their lives and the opportunities their family has.
I’m optimistic but we are again at a crossroads: **Democrats have a chance to deliver for the people who delivered us the House, the Senate, and the White House. The people are relying on us to get it done now, and not leave anyone behind.**
**[Can you support my fight for the people with a $3 contribution today? We are once again up against corporate America’s big money and influence, so we need to be as strong and united as possible right now.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8502?refcode=em20211029-758&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=758%2E420207%2E6RKvpw)** _Every dollar you give will help us hit our $25,000 end-of-month goal, to stay strong for each and every day of this pivotal fight._
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8502?refcode=em20211029-758&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=758%2E420207%2E6RKvpw)**
So much is on the line, and I could not continue this urgent fight without your support.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211029-758-footer&t=21&refcode2=758_420207_6RKvpw&akid=758%2E420207%2E6RKvpw)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

[](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=bd5543f064ff46ada84ea216a08e6dcb&_e=iIhpCEbIw_gQBMq84OQE-dzRL6s_OklsS8dZGnot148F9o_hDXSV7y3Zr8Uv40LnLhfadkuVZDqvA517S1ZZfMncICpuP-wF0xjhdZMQ-zVNXs9JL8-KSqHY_ED6HB_wH2WMy2uikKQ6z-yOkeNGwD_XlabGitNfiH5Q5lYq-7x1NCNx1IQBbkemjb_3pIrvY4OB7EEJuMpDn-2g_O18Qrn-sU7bPgXaEcmYRuSnbgCZJ5w32mk0Lcfp42ymiWfwmip5hMn25BytwPIJicTfrUkvoT3XNU4m7ul5OEd7Q0ThnzNDOG6SLVglPvU2797DsAmbT49V5a2tgYVq0eXORuGreciusGTDUbgkVXZgmiHftwghbi_tXkHbRJ6_NsXMXlmr4Rkmd60scOCxzSotCB4bAjF_qb0VyEnhrCPvgXgqTWCH4B9HS7LFg_r0Z-6A56ETDp56OMYffsK673mStiFTB5M_NMdM8-LmHRWO5BLf0HobUIJoXEn-ciXl9AvG) | |

Friend,

Late last night, Democrats in the Illinois legislature passed new maps that will determine our state’s congressional districts for the next decade. What does this look like to you?
[](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=bd5543f064ff46ada84ea216a08e6dcb&_e=iIhpCEbIw_gQBMq84OQE-dzRL6s_OklsS8dZGnot148F9o_hDXSV7y3Zr8Uv40LnLhfadkuVZDqvA517S1ZZfMncICpuP-wF0xjhdZMQ-zVNXs9JL8-KSqHY_ED6HB_wH2WMy2uikKQ6z-yOkeNGwD_XlabGitNfiH5Q5lYq-7x1NCNx1IQBbkemjb_3pIrvY4OB7EEJuMpDn-2g_O18Qrn-sU7bPgXaEcmYRuSnbgCZJ5w32mk0Lcfp42ymiWfwmip5hMn25BytwPIJicTfrUkvoT3XNU4m7ul5OEd7Q0RsC4Y7Rn8gLbSnlAwhUFiQtZmaBJwFT5Bn7kGhrcOua9YecHqVHr-Z8P6i1E0b8PZJvScMdyzmHyis9mfldr3KfArTvPvWA2l2_HBy0Ci_Nnn7LsZo6crCe9BJOcmp1E9Ux3mxM3qUSXTX6OPG0gQ0XvfDPJyFmtxTDTPtn8ldR0f72U6G52Zx_5usUhKNC_w031MfFANAVN0E5yfZTo-s)
**I’ll tell you what it looks like to me: gerrymandering.**
[**STAND UP AGAINST GERRYMANDERING**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=bd5543f064ff46ada84ea216a08e6dcb&_e=iIhpCEbIw_gQBMq84OQE-dzRL6s_OklsS8dZGnot148F9o_hDXSV7y3Zr8Uv40LnLhfadkuVZDqvA517S1ZZfMncICpuP-wF0xjhdZMQ-zVNXs9JL8-KSqHY_ED6HB_wH2WMy2uikKQ6z-yOkeNGwD_XlabGitNfiH5Q5lYq-7x1NCNx1IQBbkemjb_3pIrvY4OB7EEJuMpDn-2g_O18Qrn-sU7bPgXaEcmYRuSnbgCZJ5w32mk0Lcfp42ymiWfwmip5hMn25BytwPIJicTfrUkvoT3XNU4m7ul5OEd7Q0ShiYRrbrrd_QFaK-DCbcFkU02U_xm988LBohgPYPv9AorbbZfI4puFPh9Dxid88HDhvDfk45Ga_RZTuh8LHdzwi6ELEJhqGbAwGyQsIWfXxZOayuT49c-JE5wzo3pevgUZW-_1lo_1OjquoDr91MSaknSYo5V4EXgTlwed6SEC6_82rAQQNZUmGsUuQQZ8zX50gp2mhF6-WzIx0dufmhQA)
You can’t look at this crazy map and believe that this is fair. Anybody with half a brain knows that something this important should be decided by an independent, non-partisan commission.

**But Illinois has one-party Democratic rule.** They have all the power - and they draw the maps to benefit themselves.

What’s the result? A map that looks like a five-year-old drew it with a crayon. Except that it’s no accident: It’s drawn with an intentional design to disenfranchise certain kinds of voters so Democrats can get re-elected.

**Governor Pritzker promised that he would veto any partisan map.** Well, guess what? Now’s your chance, JB Pritzker. Keep your word!

Where I come from in central Illinois, your word is your bond. It means everything.**Join me in telling Gov Pritzker to do the right thing and veto this unfair, partisan, gerrymandered map. **
[**SIGN THE PETITION TODAY**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=bd5543f064ff46ada84ea216a08e6dcb&_e=iIhpCEbIw_gQBMq84OQE-dzRL6s_OklsS8dZGnot148F9o_hDXSV7y3Zr8Uv40LnLhfadkuVZDqvA517S1ZZfMncICpuP-wF0xjhdZMQ-zVNXs9JL8-KSqHY_ED6HB_wH2WMy2uikKQ6z-yOkeNGwD_XlabGitNfiH5Q5lYq-7x1NCNx1IQBbkemjb_3pIrvY4OB7EEJuMpDn-2g_O18Qrn-sU7bPgXaEcmYRuSnbgCZJ5w32mk0Lcfp42ymiWfwmip5hMn25BytwPIJicTfrUkvoT3XNU4m7ul5OEd7Q0QtO6X7CLtppo1oBj_0grD1MA6CTaqF3K5b6dXCGeneFrpefCsLQoAWCm9MAUkO9DF3lcLipzYCqE8NKZMqfYugXreUcTomASRZqu9kjbH7oo_77TgWpmyO3oECmqaPDumiNM1eKXYaLP4h1QqwCTstOlOC0-VUcy2kBCvm-3tx7xHnbzABzNA3xLiNnHE2LQee83CzDmGQEOFnWwiHHZPc)
Thank you,

Jesse Sullivan

P.S. One thing you might not have noticed: _Illinois lost a congressional seat in this new map._ Our state’s corruption and failed leadership have driven so many residents away that our representation in Congress is shrinking. How many more people need to flee our state before we make a change? [**Stand up for our state with me today - we need to act NOW to save Illinois.**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=bd5543f064ff46ada84ea216a08e6dcb&_e=iIhpCEbIw_gQBMq84OQE-dzRL6s_OklsS8dZGnot148F9o_hDXSV7y3Zr8Uv40LnLhfadkuVZDqvA517S1ZZfMncICpuP-wF0xjhdZMQ-zVNXs9JL8-KSqHY_ED6HB_wH2WMy2uikKQ6z-yOkeNGwD_XlabGitNfiH5Q5lYq-7x1NCNx1IQBbkemjb_3pIrvY4OB7EEJuMpDn-2g_O18Qrn-sU7bPgXaEcmYRuSnbgCZJ5w32mk0Lcfp42ymiWfwmip5hMn25BytwPIJicTfrUkvoT3XNU4m7ul5OEd7Q0TYv31grMLsaHEmxCi3kVY3kVS1Z71Vqm7blIoLsAhzSMeCbEbMo5yCRZHen2_UGiJDTVTsMjQv48VXzwGo6WDjSpxEfaiIpt-7T5b3J_ra0f5FQi1Pz085xbypKGFt17hfZtxQWY2J6TRCcPiCjSsH8xLHiSOxJgwbY5xFu46a5Frlswi45DnEeFh891Lqs_N8LMH7dXJi_ZLUR_u8ROcT)

Did you see my message, friend? **Time is running out before our end-of-month deadline, and I urgently need your help.** With our Senate majority split 50-50, we can't afford to fall behind. Republicans are already coming after me as their top target, spending millions to smear my record and rally their far-right base. And now I'm trailing in the polls. If we're going to close this polling gap and protect this critical Senate seat, I'm going to need your support. **That's why I have to ask: will you please rush $5 or more right now to defend our fragile Senate majority? Here's the best link to give at:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mwh-em-oct21](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38086990/313912307/-214106137?refcode=e20211029_mwh-urgent-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBhNjNjZC1mYjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wvSgAFZp4TMlQjv8BaPQw5rqRqHRzdpoIZwbdBUfWT0=)** I really appreciate your support! With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Maggie Hassan**

Subject: We urgently need your help [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38086991/313912308/-214106137?refcode=e20211029_mwh-urgent-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBhNjNjZC1mYjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wvSgAFZp4TMlQjv8BaPQw5rqRqHRzdpoIZwbdBUfWT0=) Hi there, I hate reaching out with bad news, but this can't wait. **Two recent polls are showing me down by single digits.** With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, we cannot afford to fall behind. **If we're going to protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we have to win here in New Hampshire.** But the GOP has endless resources, and they're pulling out all the stops. So far, top Republicans like Betsy DeVos and Mike Pence have visited the Granite State to rally their far-right base. And GOP super PACs and special interest groups have spent over $4 million in New Hampshire to defeat me. Most recently, Mitch McConnell's dark money super PAC unleashed yet another massive ad buy in New Hampshire, targeting my campaign in an attempt to flip this seat. If these recent polls indicate anything, it's that the constant Republican attacks are breaking through. But the polls are within the margin of error, which means that we can turn them around. My team and I are working hard to keep New Hampshire and our Senate blue – **but we urgently need your help.** If we're going to win, it's going to take a grassroots effort. **[We don't need mega-donors like Republicans, but we do need people like you friend to give $5 or more before our end-of-month fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38086992/313912309/-214106137?refcode=e20211029_mwh-urgent-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBhNjNjZC1mYjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wvSgAFZp4TMlQjv8BaPQw5rqRqHRzdpoIZwbdBUfWT0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38086993/313912310/-214106137?refcode=e20211029_mwh-urgent-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBhNjNjZC1mYjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wvSgAFZp4TMlQjv8BaPQw5rqRqHRzdpoIZwbdBUfWT0=)

New Hampshire is a real swing state. In 2016, I won by 1,017 votes–less than half of a percentage point, and news outlets across the country are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection. This is a critical moment in the campaign, and it's vital that we have the resources to take the lead.
Your support is so important to me and my campaign, and we're counting on you. **[So please, if you can, chip in $5 today to help keep New Hampshire and the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38086997/313912314/-214106137?refcode=e20211029_mwh-urgent-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBhNjNjZC1mYjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wvSgAFZp4TMlQjv8BaPQw5rqRqHRzdpoIZwbdBUfWT0=)**

clean_body: | | | Did you see my message, friend? Time is running out before our end-of-month deadline, and I urgently need your help. With our Senate majority split 50-50, we can't afford to fall behind. Republicans are already coming after me as their top target, spending millions to smear my record and rally their far-right base. And now I'm trailing in the polls. If we're going to close this polling gap and protect this critical Senate seat, I'm going to need your support. That's why I have to ask: will you please rush $5 or more right now to defend our fragile Senate majority? Here's the best link to give at:= I really appreciate your support! With every good wish, Maggie Hassan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Maggie Hassan Date: Fri., Oct. 29, 2021 Subject: We urgently need your help = Hi there, I hate reaching out with bad news, but this can't wait. Two recent polls are showing me down by single digits. With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, we cannot afford to fall behind. If we're going to protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we have to win here in New Hampshire. But the GOP has endless resources, and they're pulling out all the stops. So far, top Republicans like Betsy DeVos and Mike Pence have visited the Granite State to rally their far-right base. And GOP super PACs and special interest groups have spent over $4 million in New Hampshire to defeat me. Most recently, Mitch McConnell's dark money super PAC unleashed yet another massive ad buy in New Hampshire, targeting my campaign in an attempt to flip this seat. If these recent polls indicate anything, it's that the constant Republican attacks are breaking through. But the polls are within the margin of error, which means that we can turn them around. My team and I are working hard to keep New Hampshire and our Senate blue – but we urgently need your help. If we're going to win, it's going to take a grassroots effort. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = New Hampshire is a real swing state. In 2016, I won by 1,017 votes–less than half of a percentage point, and news outlets across the country are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection. This is a critical moment in the campaign, and it's vital that we have the resources to take the lead. Your support is so important to me and my campaign, and we're counting on you. = Thank you for being on my team! With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: Culp for Congress
subject: The Biden Disaster on the Southern Border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=Byc34S&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EhoTFzB&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/b29763d2-a470-4730-9850-7585850ed12e.png]

Every American can see the disaster taking place on our southern border.

Human trafficking has increased, drug flow into our states and communities has increased, and the safety of every American is in jeopardy with an open border.

Those who are living in the southern communities know firsthand what life on the border is like, but soon every city, including here in Washington State will be a border town.

In border towns you see people being trafficked, you may find drugs on your property, you see an increase in crime in your community because the drug cartel has recruited people into their destructive trade.

As all this takes place the American People are treated worse than individuals who broke our laws by illegally coming into our country. We the people are being told we must take the COVID vaccine or risk losing our jobs, where we can go, and even our freedoms that are constitutionally protected, while hundred of thousands of illegal migrants cross our border unchecked. Not only are they not being checked for their "COVID Vaccine" status, we have no idea if these people have a criminal record or not.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/c7cbf4a3-cd58-42e1-afc6-23d832cfe87d.jpg]

If our government can tell us to inject something into our bodies and not allow us to make our own health choices, what else will they try to force us to do? There will be no end to the left's tyranny.

This isn't a fight against those who have received and believe in the benefit of the COVID shots. This is a fight for our unalienable rights guaranteed to us by our federal and state constitutions. As I've said publicly many times before, if you want to get the shot or have gotten the shot--that's fine. It is wholly your decision. If you have not gotten the shot or do not intend to get the shot--that's fine. It is wholly your decision. My issue isn't with the shot, my issue is with the mandate and the threats.

Across our country, there is also a movement of patriots refusing to comply.

An airline pilot spoke out against the forced vaccination mandate being pushed by private companies saying, "If we give into these mandates and we do not stand up for our freedom of choice, we dishonor every armed service person over the last 257 years. A disservice to the people who have fought and bled for the very freedoms we enjoy."

Under the Biden administration, they believe they have the right to control every aspect of our lives. Our businesses, our land, our children, and now our bodies.

I will not comply...I'd encourage all of you to do the same.

The American Spirit is alive and strong but we must work together and encourage our fellow Americans to hold the line. When I'm your Congressman, I will fight to bring the power back to the states and to the local communities. Together we can save America for our generation and for our children and grandchildren.

Honored to serve.

Don't Tread on Me. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SoiTnQ&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EJvsJeY&]

Loren

PS: We still need to your support to keep up with our opponents who are dumping huge amounts of special interest money and their own personal money (because he doesn't have very many supporters) into this race.

I have news for them: We the People's vote isn't for sale.

I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SoiTDp&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EC3GtxL&]

THIS IS IMPORTANT. I CAN DO $100! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SoiT4W&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EyYLwwE&]

I CAN PLAY BIG LEAGUE AND DO $250! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SoiTAA&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EhNWMQz&]

I WANT TO GO ALL IN FOR $2,900 TO GET RID OF NEWHOUSE [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SoicE8&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EJVzwZV&]

PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS

, 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States

You may unsubscribe [https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=Byc34S&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EhT7SOt&pt=unsubscribe] or change your contact details [https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=Byc34S&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EtMXCe7&pt=change_details] at any time.

subject: Our first end-of-month fundraising deadline since we launched the BMRC >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
We’ve set a goal to raise $3,500 more before the end of the month to demonstrate the strength of our campaign and show extremist legislators that we’re ready to fight back against their attacks on the ballot measure process. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38087304/313913674/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjkyNjYyOS1mZDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TNvzZ0YO8r49f5jHxndjSD6C-Lts-3ZiXRZFP1vEOxo=&emci=f6faefbe-f238-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=22926629-fd38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582) | Hi Friend, We’re closing in on the end of October and [_**our very first end-of-month fundraising deadline since we launched our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38087305/313913675/-908472492?refcode=E12165-20211029-EOM1-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjkyNjYyOS1mZDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TNvzZ0YO8r49f5jHxndjSD6C-Lts-3ZiXRZFP1vEOxo=) Since 2016, we’ve dedicated ourselves to fueling and funding ballot measure campaigns that change the lives of working people across America. We’re proud that in the face of partisan gridlock, we’ve won 20 of the 21 campaigns we’ve worked on, bringing real change to more than 17 million Americans. When we launched the Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign earlier this month, we knew we were exploring some uncharted territory, but friend, defending the ballot measure process is so critical, we knew we had to do it. Ballot measures are one of the most democratic tools available to Americans. _But as of late, extremist legislators have started fighting back against the ballot measure process_ — introducing legislation that would make it harder to pass important measures at the ballot box. **Since the beginning of 2021, at least 87 bills have been introduced that would burden or harm the ballot measure process.** _**[So, as we come up on our first end-of-month deadline since launching the Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign, will you consider making a donation of $8.70 or whatever you can afford to fuel our campaign?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38087306/313913676/-908472492?refcode=E12165-20211029-EOM1-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=8.70&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjkyNjYyOS1mZDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TNvzZ0YO8r49f5jHxndjSD6C-Lts-3ZiXRZFP1vEOxo=)**_ [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38087307/313913677/-908472492?refcode=E12165-20211029-EOM1-SB-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjkyNjYyOS1mZDM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TNvzZ0YO8r49f5jHxndjSD6C-Lts-3ZiXRZFP1vEOxo=) **Friend: We’ve set a goal to raise $3,500 more before the end of the month to demonstrate the strength of our campaign and show extremist legislators that we’re ready to fight back against their attacks on the ballot measure process.** How will we use the resources collected as part of this campaign? Where we need to bring litigation, we will litigate. Where we can stop bad laws from being passed, we will run aggressive campaigns to stop these anti-democratic bills. name: Alex Padilla
subject: Your $5 today will go a long way toward setting our campaign up for success next year.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Look, the truth is that this should not be a particularly controversial agenda.
#

In just a minute, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate. But first, please let me explain what we are doing here on this campaign, and why your contribution today is so important to our success.
I’m running to keep fighting for:
* Immigration reform
* Medicare for All
* Making the wealthy pay their fair share
* Protecting voting rights
* A Green New Deal

[**If you believe that this is an agenda worth fighting for, please make a $5 contribution to my campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211029-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=422_159979_9159fq&akid=422%2E159979%2E9159fq)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211029-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=422_159979_9159fq&akid=422%2E159979%2E9159fq)**
Look, the truth is that this should not be a particularly controversial agenda. In fact, it's what the overwhelming majority of Californians support, and it's what's necessary to save our democracy and our planet.
But the unfortunate reality is that Republicans, both in California and across the country, are more committed to preserving the status quo than solving the problems we’re facing.
And now they’re going to be coming after us. They’ll do — and spend — whatever they can to try to stop us. _Because they’d love nothing more than to replace California’s first Latino U.S. Senator with a right-wing Trump supporter who will vote in lockstep with Mitch McConnell._
**It’s incredibly important that we have the resources to take on the deep-pocketed Republicans and special interests who want to see us fail, so I am asking you directly:**
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution to my campaign today? It might seem like a small action, but your $5 today will go a long way toward setting our campaign up for success next year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211029-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=422_159979_9159fq&akid=422%2E159979%2E9159fq)
Thank you for everything.
\- Alex Padilla
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211029-1-subs&t=4&refcode2=422_159979_9159fq&akid=422%2E159979%2E9159fq)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=422%2E159979%2E9159fq)

Team, Since we launched the Bennet Defense Fund, 364 people have pitched in to fuel Michael’s re-election campaign, keep Colorado blue, and defend our slim majority in the Senate. Michael is continuing to fight to extend the expanded Child Tax Credit and get the historic infrastructure bill across the finish line which will invest in Colorado’s roads, expand broadband, and build climate resilience. His work makes him a top target for Mitch McConnell, Rick Scott, and the National GOP. They want to halt his progress and misrepresent his record and they raised $76 million to do _just that_. We don’t have to raise $76 million to combat their attacks and misinformation, but we do need to stay on track with our fundraising to counter these attacks and amplify Michael’s record across the state. **So team, will you chip in $10 or more now before Sunday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline to defend Michael’s seat, keep Colorado blue, and defend our slim Senate majority?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38087990/313916529/-677291793?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211029_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTY4MWY5OC1mZjM4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=usCAHlEi_8ei6H87KJxCdN8koaieF3GIPtMtu2rjtEw=)**

clean_body: | = Team, Since we launched the Bennet Defense Fund, 364 people have pitched in to fuel Michael’s re-election campaign, keep Colorado blue, and defend our slim majority in the Senate. Michael is continuing to fight to extend the expanded Child Tax Credit and get the historic infrastructure bill across the finish line which will invest in Colorado’s roads, expand broadband, and build climate resilience. His work makes him a top target for Mitch McConnell, Rick Scott, and the National GOP. They want to halt his progress and misrepresent his record and they raised $76 million to do just that. We don’t have to raise $76 million to combat their attacks and misinformation, but we do need to stay on track with our fundraising to counter these attacks and amplify Michael’s record across the state. So team, will you chip in $10 or more now before Sunday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline to defend Michael’s seat, keep Colorado blue, and defend our slim Senate majority? name: Ted Cruz
subject: Ted Cruz: Send Illegal Immigrants to Martha's Vineyard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
For the last ten months, Joe Biden and his pals have SURRENDERED our border. They’ve willfully unleased complete and total ch
| | |
---
Friend,
For the last ten months, Joe Biden and his pals have SURRENDERED our border.

They’ve willfully unleased complete and total chaos...

Texas border towns like McAllen and Del Rio are under siege – with an unprecedented surge of more a 1.3 MILLION illegal aliens and the dangerous criminal cartels exploiting this crisis – and these coastal “elites” have ABANDONED our Border Patrol agents!

I’ve seen the suffering endured by our South Texas families, farmers, ranchers, and small businesses up close. And I’m FURIOUS over it.

That’s why I’ve introduced a plan to force the Democrats to face this crisis...

My **Stop the SURGE Act** would create new ports of entry in 13 communities where these open borders leftists like to hide away from the impact of their disastrous policies at fancy cocktail parties and high-dollar fundraisers.

**_Let’s send these illegal immigrants to Martha’s Vineyard, Nantucket, and Silicon Valley!_**
[**Support my Stop the SURGE Act with an urgent contribution >>>**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zorbrpdpjh1h36l0pfg9d5ot95mrhgukrrum1hd0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgmco36cth2bs)
The Democrats have held hearing after hearing on amnesty, federalizing our elections, and other extreme far-left proposals.

**At the same time, they have COMPLETELY IGNORED this security and humanitarian crisis and the plight of the hardest hit communities in South Texas.** It’s absolutely inexcusable.

Joe Biden and his pals need to hear a loud and clear message from the American people.

[**Let’s build a massive wave of public outrage and support for my Stop the SURGE Act.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zsikq8983bm1har8c9if2pvh38aqaq14slgbr7q0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgmco36cth2bs)

[**_THANK YOU in advance for stepping up to help today! _**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zc8cl4s4h54s66l7580npld6s7nas4t2sefjur40_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgmco36cth2bs)

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

| October 31st has always been an important day for our family— and this year, it’s more important than ever, Peter.

It’s Halloween, it’s our end-of-month fundraising deadline, it’s two days before the Virginia election, but most importantly: [_**it’s my amazing wife Melissa’s birthday.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38088219/313917729/2074217903?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDhjZDU4MC0wMTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJB3FQnRr8dCMs44yIQFEUd8vqaFES8EOXj9j2mL2zI=&emci=0f2f3bcc-ff38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a08cd580-0139-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635484)

Ever since I’ve known her, Halloween has always been her favorite holiday, and each year she always has the best costume ideas. Here we are last year as a Zoom meeting!
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38088220/313917730/2074217903?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDhjZDU4MC0wMTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJB3FQnRr8dCMs44yIQFEUd8vqaFES8EOXj9j2mL2zI=&emci=0f2f3bcc-ff38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a08cd580-0139-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635484)
This year for her birthday, I can’t wait to celebrate with her and our daughters by enjoying our favorite holiday together— and **I was hoping you could help me pull off a birthday surprise for her.** Before Sunday, can you sign this Halloween-themed birthday card for Melissa? I want to make sure she has a spooktacular birthday and I know she will be so happy to see everyone from the team was a part of making this day special.

clean_body: It’s my amazing wife Melissa’s birthday. | = | October 31st has always been an important day for our family— and this year, it’s more important than ever, Peter. It’s Halloween, it’s our end-of-month fundraising deadline, it’s two days before the Virginia election, but most importantly: Ever since I’ve known her, Halloween has always been her favorite holiday, and each year she always has the best costume ideas. Here we are last year as a Zoom meeting! This year for her birthday, I can’t wait to celebrate with her and our daughters by enjoying our favorite holiday together— and I was hoping you could help me pull off a birthday surprise for her. Before Sunday, can you sign this Halloween-themed birthday card for Melissa? I want to make sure she has a spooktacular birthday and I know she will be so happy to see everyone from the team was a part of making this day special. | Thanks for helping me make this a great birthday, John P.S. = * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, visit his . **This week, we learned that several Members of Congress — my colleagues, who, like me, took an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States — were involved in the planning and coordination of the rally that led to the deadly attacks.**

During my time serving in Congress thus far, I have been a strong voice against the Members of Congress who have no respect for our rule of law, including introducing a resolution to censure Marjorie Taylor Greene. name: Mark Herring
subject: Jason Miyares is flat-out dangerous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ONE COMMONWEALTH PAC

Despite what we are up against, I know we have the grassroots team we need to fight back. So even though $5 might not seem like much, when [**everyone donates when they can**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38088480/313918922/-846547794?refcode=em_fr_2021.10.29_b2_lm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjY4MWU1My0wMzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJVAc-16UE80T7EHJlTB57XihK-mR7LP8DiSiagKhkI=), it adds up fast.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Ted Cruz: Send Illegal Immigrants to Martha's Vineyard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
For the last ten months, Joe Biden and his pals have SURRENDERED our border. They’ve willfully unleased complete and total ch
| | |
---
Friend,
For the last ten months, Joe Biden and his pals have SURRENDERED our border.

They’ve willfully unleased complete and total chaos...

Texas border towns like McAllen and Del Rio are under siege – with an unprecedented surge of more a 1.3 MILLION illegal aliens and the dangerous criminal cartels exploiting this crisis – and these coastal “elites” have ABANDONED our Border Patrol agents!

I’ve seen the suffering endured by our South Texas families, farmers, ranchers, and small businesses up close. And I’m FURIOUS over it.

That’s why I’ve introduced a plan to force the Democrats to face this crisis...

My **Stop the SURGE Act** would create new ports of entry in 13 communities where these open borders leftists like to hide away from the impact of their disastrous policies at fancy cocktail parties and high-dollar fundraisers.

**_Let’s send these illegal immigrants to Martha’s Vineyard, Nantucket, and Silicon Valley!_**
[**Support my Stop the SURGE Act with an urgent contribution >>>**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zto8he1rnb7kdp37j5o77gk5q82q9acoupqnqn88_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72cjh2bs)
The Democrats have held hearing after hearing on amnesty, federalizing our elections, and other extreme far-left proposals.

**At the same time, they have COMPLETELY IGNORED this security and humanitarian crisis and the plight of the hardest hit communities in South Texas.** It’s absolutely inexcusable.

Joe Biden and his pals need to hear a loud and clear message from the American people.

[**Let’s build a massive wave of public outrage and support for my Stop the SURGE Act.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zd6i0rsu0tgmkbrafskrm4diaprk3834p0lh42tg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72cjh2bs)

[**_THANK YOU in advance for stepping up to help today! _**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcmgm4d557mj2a0gmr85ko1luit3m4pa4m3vu1no_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72cjh2bs)

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
---
[**DONATE HERE**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zkk5ema2bbfabpm5g5crg2besiuo65o736p1be30_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72cjh2bs)
