name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Biden White House CAUGHT!
body:
Newly unsealed records prove that the Biden White House COLLUDED with the National School Board Association (NSBA) to produce th
_Sponsored message_
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmaa3ttg0k1g121v9ecvkurppub5s5u2c76cstgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zl3hvair4k3c6hcpnic740jmdjk86fm79sjom9h0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72c3h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m furious. **Newly unsealed records prove that the Biden White House**** __COLLUDED__****with the National School Board Association (NSBA) to produce that letter asking the Justice Department to investigate concerned parents as domestic terrorists!** If you needed any further proof that the radical Left has it out for Real Americans, look no further! **_But what can we do about it?_** I’ll tell you. [**The most powerful thing you can do right now is to partner with Turning Point USA by making a generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or more right now**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znj082t95c5nb7t07jqu37ts2kk8rot6vui4soq0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72c3h2bs) to support our **School Board Watch List,** a first-of-its-kind project we launched this summer to arm Real Americans with the information and the tools they need to stand up to radicals in their public education systems.
---
[**Support the School Board Watch List**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5k9lhg5b4hk0su2496hvsprm19mt0orubu88tho_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72c3h2bs)
---
In emails made public on October 21, members of NSBA admitted to swapping emails with White House officials for __WEEKS__ before that infamous letter was made public. They admitted that White House officials went back and forth with them multiple times, asking for details on specific incidents at school board meetings, in an effort to help them craft the best possible case for why parents should be treated as a domestic terrorism threat. **It's time for the gloves to come off.** Now that we know the White House isn’t just complicit in the Left-wing counterattack—but is actually __COORDINATING__ it—it’s more important than ever that we empower parents to take back their local school systems! [**And with your partnership today, the School Board Watch List will do just that.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0ng6iqeds9ljsoflcm3oiqh21t6ta4bsct5fmeg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72c3h2bs) It’s the nation’s _**_FIRST EVER_**_ school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts’ acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA’s School Board Watch List exposes: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation’s largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We’ve published all of our findings at **SchoolBoardWatchlist.org** ... and we’re using our TPUSA megaphones — online, on campus, and over the airwaves — to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I’m asking for your generous financial support right now. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by the end of this month.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9ueukjj1sbj7qj2omur8sgekap9223han20taog_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8or5u1ibq99l4b8jkgf3ma0btnbihke32l0mms8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72c3h2bs)
---
My friend, if we don’t stand up to Left-wing influence in our local school districts, these radicals __WILL__ indoctrinate our nation's children in anti-Americanism, socialism, Marxism, Critical Race Theory, radical gender ideology, and much more. You can bet on it. But if Real Americans rise up... If we take control of our local school boards and demand accountability from them... we __WILL__ save this nation. You can bet on that, too! TPUSA’s School Board Watch List will be a central tool in that fight, and a key to victory. But only if we can get it into the hands of as many patriots as possible—as soon as possible! [**Please help us spread the word with your generous, tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or more right away.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zua3sskt7m1cmkrq4uovrgrbhdj244lqkedothn0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72c3h2bs)
---
[**Give Now**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbosabn4c6ihnrk0r5fqaovu4g28csq2qeg4hio0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o72c3h2bs)
---
Thank you for standing with us for America’s future! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

The country is watching, Derek.

After Americans turned out in record numbers to defeat my uncle last year, it’s terrifying to think he could make a comeback via Virginia this year. And make no mistake: a Youngkin win would give Donald and the Republican party a major boost going into the 2022 elections.

But if Donald Trump campaigns in Virginia to rile up Glenn Youngkin’s right-wing base, it could spell disaster.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Peter, we put you down to sponsor Monroe County!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’ve assigned each person a county to help distribute our fundraising as strategically as possible.
#
Peter,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to please _[**send $5 our way before Sunday's fundraising deadline to help elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35555?County=Monroe+County&refcode=em20211029-3261&t=1&akid=3261%2E434096%2Evvyt9B)_
Before I get to that, I want to show you this map showing the voter registration breakdown of each PA's 67 counties:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35555?County=Monroe+County&refcode=em20211029-3261&t=2&akid=3261%2E434096%2Evvyt9B)
Clearly we've got our work cut out for us. But John's strategy has been the same from the start: We're going to fight for every county + every vote. No place written off as too red, too blue, or too _anything._
**But honestly, Joe Biden won Pennsylvania by only 1%. In a year with record turnout, no less!** So if we’re going to flip this Senate seat blue in a midterm election, we can’t just rely on turning out the same people who always vote.
So we're going to need your help. We’ve assigned each person a county to help distribute our fundraising as strategically as possible:
_[**Can you sponsor Monroe County and help register more Democrats to vote in this key swing state? Every dollar will help us resource a big push in all 67 counties.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35555?County=Monroe+County&refcode=em20211029-3261&t=3&akid=3261%2E434096%2Evvyt9B)_
**You have been chosen to sponsor Monroe County. Can you chip in $5 to help us close the registration gap statewide?** | Democrats | 54,657
---|---
Republicans | 40,588
**[Yes, I can help with $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35555?County=Monroe+County&refcode=em20211029-3261&t=4&akid=3261%2E434096%2Evvyt9B)**
We can't let Republicans have any kind of advantage when it comes to registering new voters. They want to make Pennsylvania a permanent red state by out-registering us — so we need to register more Democrats ASAP, or we risk getting overwhelmed in 2022.
**Every dollar we raise ahead of Sunday's important fundraising deadline will go a long way in making sure that crucial organizing work happens.** John’s already proven he can win statewide. He’s a candidate who will bring a lot of independent voters into our fold. And, last but not least, he’s running a grassroots campaign that will reach out to new voters in every single one of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties.
_[**Can you chip in $5 to sponsor our efforts to bring in new Democratic voters in Monroe County? The pace at which we can launch our statewide, 67 counties organizing plan depends entirely on whether we reach Sunday night's fundraising goal — so your contribution today is incredibly important.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35555?County=Monroe+County&refcode=em20211029-3261&t=5&akid=3261%2E434096%2Evvyt9B)_
We know that not everyone who reads this email can afford to chip in today. And that's alright. But if you can afford even a modest donation, I know John, Gisele, and the entire Fetterman team would be eternally grateful. ❤️
Celeste
Celeste Trusty
Political Director
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
1 - [PA Dept. of State Data](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30771?t=6&akid=3261%2E434096%2Evvyt9B)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211029-3261-footer&t=7&refcode2=3261_434096_vvyt9B&akid=3261%2E434096%2Evvyt9B)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=8&akid=3261%2E434096%2Evvyt9B)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=3261%2E434096%2Evvyt9B)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: THAT’S A LIE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Setting the record straight. I need you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58648256:JBpALP2Nx:m:1:3253819041:C770EA24C8ED8AD13B20F7DB531E0D95:r)
---
Peter,
---
I needed you to hear this _directly_ from me.
---
The media claims that I'm in so much "excruciating" trouble that I'm about to "FLIP" on President Trump.
---
**_That's a damn LIE._**
---
Here's the truth: President Trump is an innocent man. I didn't turn on him when 7 FBI agents raided my home -- and I'm not betraying him now -- or _EVER._
---

body:
How much more time are you willing to give them? |
---
**Joe Biden** , first elected in _**1973.**_

**Chuck Schumer** , first elected in _**1981.**_

**Chris Van Hollen** , first elected in _**1991.**_

_**Over 114 years in public office combined.**_ That's how long Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Chris Van Hollen have spent as elected officials. **Tell me, Fellow American, have things gotten better since 1973, 1981, or 1991?**

**These are the men that were in charge when they let the same Taliban that supported the 9/11 attacks, to murder Americans and retake Afghanistan.** These are the same men who were supposed to "unify" the country, and yet more people than ever are be persecuted for their beliefs, political opinions, or skin color.

**At what point will you say enough is enough? At what point are you fed up with everything they've done to divide this nation?**

[** HELP JAMES TARANTIN WIN BACK A GOP SENATE MAJORITY **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1dde9e978b264e6d86c9735c6d57f8c0&_e=XcLa3FEHKdLqHD1WbEYH9WcqZUKRktd66UE0SdgDWOaj06K3vmGiulB6sgXVRNsoVKxQ9GbrOQH_IOTXQxrDiDjLI0ZaixWQTsuDYzmoR3SFkzjp0DmHErmXUa82u_21-BbTF_JLwR2Y7CSpMmLT4vl4e-nseg83rqJ3y_MptRRduMCP_q9jAAO6cKNw-8mBW8iQHvfxK69SxTMpt9Nms9Er28FYwAtkiz2pch1hCwlojpjcO63I-tAzxg52gbmVhHo3erZj_7iejZS4ZJfivi9alLPtlOcggw9coXTtGyrja7toIj2-7ST5Iof-t7KElMrtt0NrEszboU5dm39MHkvwERNbJeb-3vd71BxaHJ2cLbZLIhIeclfMUHSyOMFa_BvGOA3NFfzckGUF8Wjt2WGHruYbglvQbjq1W03F4lm5G3mneLgj7zIqk1xruIBUC2N6QrQ_ZzzPD-gmRZNd86Cps9lisT-ZzW8VNSc49vc%3D)
Nothing is going to change if we keep allowing _**over 114 years of combined political life**_ to be wasted on liberal career politicians like these. **They have done absolutely nothing but TAKE YOUR TAX DOLLARS, LIE ABOUT HELPING AMERICANS, AND RERUN FOR OFFICE.**

We don't need anymore lies, we don't need anymore failed policies, and we certainly don't need anymore liberal politicians who serve decades and do absolutely nothing.

_**After 114 years of combined political life,**_ all we've gotten from their continued "service to America" is cancel culture, Christmas gifts stuck outside American ports, and allowing terrorists to walk all over our military.

**That's why I'm running against a liberal yes-man who does whatever Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden tell him to do.** I need your help to kick him out of office, and the only way I can do that is if you [**pitch in $10, $20, $50, or even more if you're able to.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1dde9e978b264e6d86c9735c6d57f8c0&_e=XcLa3FEHKdLqHD1WbEYH9WcqZUKRktd66UE0SdgDWOaj06K3vmGiulB6sgXVRNsoVKxQ9GbrOQH_IOTXQxrDiDjLI0ZaixWQTsuDYzmoR3SFkzjp0DmHErmXUa82u_21-BbTF_JLwR2Y7CSpMmLT4vl4e-nseg83rqJ3y_MptRRduMCP_q9jAAO6cKNw-8mBW8iQHvfxK69SxTMpt9Nms9Er28FYwAtkiz2pch1hCwlojpjcO63I-tAzxg52gbmVhHo3erZj_7iejZS4ZJfivrJvRbX8NKurqljBDCMpPsmnMuccBdMDH7xNHOWZbQsK3smHtKml-hQzlBez4H6K_I1Xs-45fHr5QcZnkBiQI9bivmkM7fRQ2OrqC1jrIBqdKIZ7U-r0SJ0viE-mtkf2s63JY2hxQ6yRXLC41DgbmHH3PONXhE_z2gctUGslPi4nMz9OiMya-4FrvlnQhwpP6CLD3kN2o4iuq8sTMzPLlp4%3D)

These are the same men who were supposed to "unify" the country, and yet more people than ever are be persecuted for their beliefs, political opinions, or skin color. At what point will you say enough is enough? At what point are you fed up with everything they've done to divide this nation? Nothing is going to change if we keep allowing over 114 years of combined political life to be wasted on liberal career politicians like these. They have done absolutely nothing but TAKE YOUR TAX DOLLARS, LIE ABOUT HELPING AMERICANS, AND RERUN FOR OFFICE. We don't need anymore lies, we don't need anymore failed policies, and we certainly don't need anymore liberal politicians who serve decades and do absolutely nothing. After 114 years of combined political life, all we've gotten from their continued "service to America" is cancel culture, Christmas gifts stuck outside American ports, and allowing terrorists to walk all over our military. That's why I'm running against a liberal yes-man who does whatever Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden tell him to do. I need your help to kick him out of office, and the only way I can do that is if you We cannot allow them to keep walking all over us, we have to do something, and that starts now. Thank you James Tarantin for U.S. Senate | | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Election Integrity Update
subject: Racine Bombshell & Audit Bureau Report
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=racine_bombshell_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Hi Friend -- It has been a busy week for election investigations. We wanted to make sure you were up-to-date on the two biggest stories this week: 1) yesterday's bombshell from the Racine Sheriff’s Department, and 2) the election report from the Legislative Audit Bureau. **Racine County Sheriff’s Office Makes Bombshell Announcement**
**** Yesterday, the Racine County Sheriff made a bombshell announcement highlighting the Wisconsin Elections Commission’s violation of the law in their handling of voting in nursing homes. After WEC suspended special voting deputies for nursing homes, they told nursing home staff to commit a felony by voting on the behalf of residents who could not vote themselves -- some of whom were in cognitive decline. As WisGOP Chairman Paul Farrow said in our [**statement**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R72aAQRdpUWAFwuxNARiAXmB4Iggy19d7tH3LbXcHQ544TYOyKq6S6ZvOKD-1QxwJ9H4i_QxxHqkzEtLiIvRSA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=racine_bombshell_3&n=2) yesterday: _“Anyone who cares at all about election integrity owes the Racine County Sheriff’s Department a debt of gratitude for their work today. It is horrific that WEC’s choice to violate state laws may have led to bad actors taking advantage of vulnerable citizens in nursing homes. It’s time for Democrats, the Department of Justice, and the mainstream media to take election integrity concerns seriously.”_ **Legislative Audit Bureau Releases 2020 Report** The Legislative Audit Bureau’s forensic audit report was released earlier this week, and it uncovered some serious problems with Wisconsin’s election administration. Some of the findings include:
* WEC had never run a report on whether people had multiple registrations in Wisconsin or died in other states going back to 2016
* After 169,901 new individuals marked themselves as indefinitely confined in 2020, 48,554 indefinitely confined voters did not have a photo ID on file with their local clerk
* 45,665 new voters registered with driver’s license information that did not match DMV records
* WEC violated state law by not issuing rules on how to train special voting deputies or election inspections.
* WEC told clerks they could go home on election night and return the next day to finish counting, in violation of the law
* Local clerks failed to remove over 12,500 dead voters from the rolls before election day
* At least 17.5% of municipal clerks did not complete their required training by election day

To make matters worse, many clerks declined to participate in the review at all. Only 48 percent of municipal clerks responded to the LAB’s request. Auditors were even barred from handling election-related materials from the city of Madison. You can read the full report [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=cj1hBL8U4-SRnSTVTJJYTiqUZfISUcLSe6MJaeRJ7aahnDOKEDolgC7S3w_CETvjprGxCXSVsYYap56EKPEiTA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=racine_bombshell_3&n=3) , or read a full summary of the report from MacIver News [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=a9lVzACUQtvW78T1Y1IgXSTAWhYy73r-ZfSkFnsT9TGkk7dma97o0ozRwapy-Dl-F-6yDVoogdCmjX_SPjd16Ee4rDWvOHlJe37Uzj9CauXvqGCGFOhtgxb58OSZf3t6Qw8Ylyo-KsClSwSIqrMjvA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=racine_bombshell_3&n=4). Election officials need to follow the law. End of story. While Republicans in the Legislature work to resolve the issues outlined by the audit, the Republican Party of Wisconsin is still hard at work recruiting poll workers for every polling location ahead of our crucial elections in 2022\. You can sign up to serve as a poll worker in your community [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R_kNr4x5AW03jFWL_9dJJI&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=racine_bombshell_3&n=5). Thanks, Team WisGOP
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=racine_bombshell_3&n=6 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=racine_bombshell_3&n=6)
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=racine_bombshell_3&n=7).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=racine_bombshell_3&n=8) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=racine_bombshell_3&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=racine_bombshell_3&n=10), software for leaders.

clean_body: we don’t want to think about what could happen if we don’t. | | | This is it, Derek. We are only four days from Election Day, and that means we only have four days to turn out all the voters we need to defeat Trumpism in Virginia. If that sounds like a tall order, that’s because it is. We’ve been working hard this entire year building up to this moment, but with days left the polls show the races for Virginia’s Governor, Lt. Governor, AND Attorney General are still TIED, with some even showing Trump-backed Republicans and GOP extremists in the lead. This is our final chance to turn out all the voters we need. If we don’t ... we don’t even want to think about that possibility. We could see ALL the progress that Virginia has made disappear in an instant. On Tuesday, we have the opportunity to stop Trumpism and block an extreme culture warrior from becoming Virginia’s next Governor. Let’s make every day count. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/b6333d43e3570e14c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, Team ’22 is on the move! Here are some important updates from this week. **GO BRAVES!**
---
---
# **_B.I.G. Event In Northeast Georgia!_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/d5faa252cb016f1fc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Thank you to everyone who joined us last night for our Believe In Georgia tour stop in Cornelia! And a special thank you to our friends Doug Collins, Nathan Deal, and Sandra Deal for joining us. I couldn't be prouder to have their full support.
---
---
# **_Yard Signs Update_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/63b1b9396522c6e1c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
B.I.G. thank you to everyone who stepped up to sponsor our first yard sign orders of this campaign. Our volunteers had a great time at the barn on Tuesday building 3,000 signs — coming soon to a yard near you!
---
|
---
---
# ** _Agriculture Makes Life Better_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/5938fd8f4918eb2ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Was honored this week to receive the National Friend of the Extension Award from Epsilon Sigma Phi, the national association of Agricultural Extension professionals. Agriculture makes life better for every Georgian!
---
---
# **_Join Us At A B.I.G. Tour Stop!_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/c0f813a38ac41ae6c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/1319f60de74cfa71c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Hope you'll join us at one of our upcoming B.I.G. Tour stops! We'll be in Watkinsville on November 4th and in Middle Georgia on November 8th. [**Claim your ticket for Watkinsville here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/33789078cc004157c3d6b838967d376c/37793) [**Claim your ticket for Fort Valley here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/62bf9a414434640ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/cd0e6b0da2bdaa8dc3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/4e394b1308af786ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/b21d29e11ab4467cc3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! Lastly, the end of October is rapidly approaching. That means we're a third of the way through the final fundraising quarter of 2021. For this campaign to continue to succeed, we must finish the year strong and head into 2022 with the wind at our backs. [**If you haven't already contributed — or if you have and are able to do so again — please act now. Every donation makes a difference.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/e449578ecf853321c3d6b838967d376c/37793) Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support! More good news to come next week.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/a31c101bad168b91c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/581be6da143cebabc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2f2d80914d5b723b/b870cd1c62622872c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=2f2d80914d5b723b&d=b4b6cc7de7c22510c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=2f2d80914d5b723b).
---

Athens, GA 30604

**We can’t defend America from the radical Left without you, Fellow conservative.**

name: Jamie Raskin
subject: I’m asking you personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
It's Jamie Raskin.

As the DCCC's first-ever Organizing Chair, I'm reaching out with a critical request:

**[Can you chip in $3 to defend our House Majority? House Democrats are making HISTORIC and early investments in organizing and outreach to win every last vote in every last district all across the country -- but we need your help before our End of Month Deadline in just 48 hours to help us protect and expand our House Majority. Can I and all of our House Democrats count on your support?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: 10/31, MIDNIGHT
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Our Democrats are in for a tough road ahead to protect our House Majority.

**1 --** Republicans have already amassed a staggering war chest,
**2 --** They're pass voter suppression laws and gerrymandering our districts,
**3 --** And our House Majority is already one of the slimmest in modern history.

So this is an urgent request: **We can 't let the party of insurrection and corruption retake power. We need to roll up our sleeves and get to work -- _NOW._**

And with margins this thin, every vote in every district matters.

That's why I'm so proud to be leading our community engagement and organizing efforts, including Democracy Summer with hundreds of high school and college students working to turn out every last vote all across the country.

But I can't hope to fund these critical voter outreach programs and all of the DCCC's other efforts without meeting our essential deadlines at every stage.

**[So I'm asking you personally: Can I count on you to help meet our must-hit goal by chipping in $3 before our End of Month Deadline in just 48 hours? It will go a long way in our efforts to protect our House Majority.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs3Nm~)**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_8wc6DZk_)
---

Thanks you,

Jamie

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45859286&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMzIwOTU4MQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $26. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45859286&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMzIwOTU4MQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

And Joe Biden's response? Paying ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS $450,000 PER PERSON.
[SIGN THE PETITION. You can't make this up. President Biden is planning on spending your taxpayer money to pay for the "forgiveness" of illegal immigrants who were treated "unfairly" under President Trump.
Rather than working to secure our border and deport illegal immigrants, Joe Biden wants to enrich them. To put this in perspective, if a service member is killed in action, their next of kin gets an insurance payment of $400,000.
You can't make this up. It's time to fight back against Joe Biden, take back the House and Senate, and fire Joe Biden for good.
Are you with me?

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]

Dear friend,

I'm running to represent the people of Southern Arizona, not special interests. I want to help create a strong and sustainable economy for generations to come. That's why I've got to ask: will you chip in before our critical end of month fundraising deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-for-arizona-1?refcode=X_102821_EOM_A&amount=25]

Like any working mom I understand that planning ahead is everything. That's why I'm asking you now, four days from our deadline, to pitch in.

Because when we report that we’re bringing in a substantial grassroots fundraising haul, we can keep potential opponents from jumping into the race and plan more strategically.

What’s more, I guarantee our extreme right-wing opponents and their dark money funded campaigns will be among the first to look at our fundraising reports.

So I have to ask, will you make a donation to help us reach our fundraising goal before our end of month deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-for-arizona-1?refcode=X_102821_EOM_A&amount=25]

name: Susan Wild
subject: too much at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Sabato’s Crystal Ball has rated our district as a toss-up

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38090346/313926099/1089549382?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211029-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDQyMjdlMy0wOTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3r3dUENvPx_HgnlMcfGAOE1DrgqT_zvSyjcJq58RDlA=)
---
| Peter,

In 2020, I won one of the closest House races in the country — and experts are predicting an even closer match in 2022.

**In fact, Sabato’s Crystal Ball has rated our district as a toss-up.** That means that if the election were held today, I would only have a 50/50 chance of defeating my far-right extremist opponent. [_**We absolutely can’t take those chances, which is why I’m counting on you to rush a contribution to my campaign before our crucial end-of-month deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38090347/313926100/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211029-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDQyMjdlMy0wOTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3r3dUENvPx_HgnlMcfGAOE1DrgqT_zvSyjcJq58RDlA=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38090348/313926101/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211029-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDQyMjdlMy0wOTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3r3dUENvPx_HgnlMcfGAOE1DrgqT_zvSyjcJq58RDlA=)
---
**PA-07 isn’t the only thing at stake: if we lose here, Democrats have no chance of holding on to the House majority in 2022.** That means all of our progress on issues like affordable health care, good jobs, and strengthening American infrastructure will have been for nothing.

[_**That’s why I’m asking, Peter — can you chip in whatever you can spare to my campaign before our October fundraising deadline to ensure I have the resources to fight off Republican attacks and stay in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38090349/313926102/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211029-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDQyMjdlMy0wOTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3r3dUENvPx_HgnlMcfGAOE1DrgqT_zvSyjcJq58RDlA=)
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38090350/313926103/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211029-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDQyMjdlMy0wOTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3r3dUENvPx_HgnlMcfGAOE1DrgqT_zvSyjcJq58RDlA=)

Targeting the middle class to fund reckless spending
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001acC6kBatXf_ch-zSCrEUotIbCAVNHksPzCoyXFl5pjWGMqgIsWT9S_lHcOaaMdN54PdjS5q87YPhsJ__ZrCdmOaSlKCsVcgLEHL1fOp-UOpr9vMZZPtv-R6Oj5TzWM9i9R367ZIj73obvn3OpSdREpX3GaksISyT&c=Ppi3VxtUt_2trLF2lOCfT9YAZ1rqohh5VqW01Mi3RBME6oI6y29Lhw==&ch=aqri8CoqI1RbrRaJUODI83G4j3hryM5ws9muZL_GezlwPkoNO0jhyQ==)

# Real consequences to Americans
---
Senate Democrats have introduced, under the cover of their usual talking points attacking the success of "the wealthy", legislation to levy taxes on unrealized increases in the value of investments.
What's not said by these grandstanding politicians is that their impetus for increased taxes comes from the reckless spending they're attempting to force on Americans. As the progressive machine turns from a botched response to the now-ending COVID pandemic towards a larger, more insidious plan to transform our society according to impossible fantasies, it becomes clear that its thirst for our dollars to fuel its endless requirements over us cannot be sated by tolerable means.
We should all be thinking ahead to the point at which our greedy "ruling class" attempts to expand taxation like this to our middle class, without regard to its unconstitutional nature. A tax on assets is clearly outside the bounds of allowable tax policy as set forth by our Founders. Furthermore, the strain on our liquidity from a regressive direct tax will only serve to bankrupt ordinary citizens and further concentrate wealth upwards--where Big Government, despite its rhetoric, thrives by seducing a small elite into its utopian schemes.
And if this economically unsound plan comes to a vote, we will all be able to observe, to our disgust, the moment when Michael Bennet rolls over and votes in favor of onerous taxation without regard to the disastrous effects it will have on his constituents.
If you are sick and tired of exploitative misrepresentation from out-of-touch elites and reckless politicians in Washington, please support my campaign by donating here.
Citizens like you deserve servant leadership from people who have fought and struggled for their families in the same ways you do. I need your support today.
---
|
---

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38090678/313927969/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20211029_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTBjOGZmYi0wYjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Olm1mCOI5J-DiLc_BKk2gSi6Qbaob8p7clNGdPfi2_o=) Hi Peter,

My name is Paul Begala. I’m a Democratic campaign strategist, former counselor to President Bill Clinton, bestselling author, and Virginian.

**I’m reaching out to you tonight about the absolutely critical election in Virginia in just 4 days.** I was proud to vote early for my good friends Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, and Mark Herring, and I hope you vote for them too.

[**We must make sure a blue wave happens in Virginia on November 2nd, so I need your help. Can I count on your $3 to elect Hala Ayala as Virginia’s first ever woman and Afro‐Latina as Lt. Governor? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38090684/313927974/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20211029_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTBjOGZmYi0wYjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Olm1mCOI5J-DiLc_BKk2gSi6Qbaob8p7clNGdPfi2_o=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38090688/313927980/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20211029_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTBjOGZmYi0wYjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Olm1mCOI5J-DiLc_BKk2gSi6Qbaob8p7clNGdPfi2_o=)
---
Peter, I’m going to give it to you straight here.

**I have a lot of concerns about the extreme Republicans running against our Democratic ticket.**

_They are promoting an agenda Virginia just can’t accept:_ Promising to undo abortion rights, challenging our vote at the ballot box, ignoring the ongoing pandemic, and snubbing the gun violence epidemic.

**These far‐right, Trump‐endorsed opponents cannot win on Tuesday — we’ve fought too hard for that to happen.**

So I’m throwing my weight behind Hala Ayala for Lt. Governor. She will continue the historic progress of our Democratic majorities, and serve as a crucial tie-breaking vote in our 21-19 split Senate.

[**But she can’t cross the finish line ahead without your donation today. I’m personally asking, Peter: Will you chip in $3 toward Hala’s FINAL goal? She needs $4,550 to stay on track in these critical days.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38090690/313927984/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20211029_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTBjOGZmYi0wYjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Olm1mCOI5J-DiLc_BKk2gSi6Qbaob8p7clNGdPfi2_o=)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nati
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpttnkhgara2lpcpk7v7vs2r65oe5k2p11oaqdb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o77cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkndm19raqgu5qiueaq2cucaqgds5e8d5t9ubm08_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o77cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9hfsf6ih2b7gqvi9em6m32dh420nselge0ou7c0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o77cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zunqkbtlrfl9rat56sp93glvbmsdo8kchvl1l4d0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clgm2o77cdh2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0omnnskean4q2fr01kfj14hnhqmbjkd93m9pvm8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9jle8r7ccjkm1on9dtjmppq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuju1df34kqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr69bls2on2s3isujqact4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf8pnm9qrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprf972u9hf9djmm3h34t32cup60t776oq64tpieupj7dr1mtg71o356oo6cctmcpij2p5ie1h238h1e8he4933cpimaob1c3jm6oh5u)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc1k00pom0qk3he9kciotmhlg7j0b1ps27okujeo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6clim2ob0sthm49fg)

body:

Friend, I have good news and bad news.
**The good news is that experts agree we have a real chance at flipping Arizona blue and electing a Democratic governor – the very thing The Washington Post says we NEED in order to defeat GOP extremism. **Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling our battleground governor's race a TOSS-UP – and considering that POLITICO already called this the most competitive open-seat race in the country, this rating is a HUGE deal.
**But the bad news is that we have a long way to go to reach our end-of-month goal**** – while our new extremist opponent is steadily rising in the polls****. name: James Tarantin
subject: Over a century
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
How much more time are you willing to give them? |
---
**Joe Biden** , first elected in _**1973.**_

**Chuck Schumer** , first elected in _**1981.**_

**Chris Van Hollen** , first elected in _**1991.**_

_**Over 114 years in public office combined.**_ That's how long Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Chris Van Hollen have spent as elected officials. **Tell me, Peter, have things gotten better since 1973, 1981, or 1991?**

**These are the men that were in charge when they let the same Taliban that supported the 9/11 attacks, to murder Americans and retake Afghanistan.** These are the same men who were supposed to "unify" the country, and yet more people than ever are be persecuted for their beliefs, political opinions, or skin color.

**At what point will you say enough is enough? At what point are you fed up with everything they've done to divide this nation?**

[** HELP JAMES TARANTIN WIN BACK A GOP SENATE MAJORITY **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=09eb4706d2e048ccaf05e0208e5b3741&_e=ICpS6rgTuVzR2XS65JR-Gg5aJd7wXiwKmGnXnxjqzLpytz9P7l_mp2kQvL31P5GeoHKlrlzSyY9cWzhxW60YBoVKo9X7jznfUUpBCaHUABfiCyMdkuFFuwuh5-nkVO-DxedFtXqmd5KPlo1dRUCONOxDGV1_ldJ1aWpoaY0pNa74yHb3820HYDVah6d0DonOiz3LMtG587u3D4zwn2mm1x-xm0RtVEMs2M07mWVhGIerQ9FLOnLpXHr7ngTWkANXZNmsmnHrtms1YWSzmwrQYHOyQPCdDsn9ULsoqGE9XyyM3JlkXrolWNXasfTPBOe3vVnpCTjB2noUpdTXc2joEK_--QxtBRKrslgPxHCyNLSDjP_yHXMogLpfKo4GShywS7oAmMQ4pVcesFSQZVNd1hyo-pjPP7RpNSufDU7LhcWbK810Ub61HjLkv6GnCqQ_wYvEAm6Wyw_xk-XTbyGhWJ1Bh31HXAtBHB52_38B0rw%3D)
Nothing is going to change if we keep allowing _**over 114 years of combined political life**_ to be wasted on liberal career politicians like these. **They have done absolutely nothing but TAKE YOUR TAX DOLLARS, LIE ABOUT HELPING AMERICANS, AND RERUN FOR OFFICE.**

We don't need anymore lies, we don't need anymore failed policies, and we certainly don't need anymore liberal politicians who serve decades and do absolutely nothing.

[** HELP JAMES TARANTIN WIN BACK A GOP SENATE MAJORITY **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=09eb4706d2e048ccaf05e0208e5b3741&_e=ICpS6rgTuVzR2XS65JR-Gg5aJd7wXiwKmGnXnxjqzLpytz9P7l_mp2kQvL31P5GeoHKlrlzSyY9cWzhxW60YBoVKo9X7jznfUUpBCaHUABfiCyMdkuFFuwuh5-nkVO-DxedFtXqmd5KPlo1dRUCONOxDGV1_ldJ1aWpoaY0pNa74yHb3820HYDVah6d0DonOiz3LMtG587u3D4zwn2mm1x-xm0RtVEMs2M07mWVhGIerQ9FLOnLpXHr7ngTWkANXZNmsmnHrtms1YWSzmwrQYLitZFSinzfDLwViejSTm5e49aIM0iI--Q0Qp-0riXOrBr794OervqmVtIxcB-jFv6ofdDlwhoIdNTY8Henc75URu79dYr44ClqT72CvfKz8HTWzU0c1wFLnXdgDvqNTZQbwXuzVvPMIme6wTwbm_ZAEmjZKV-86qtVzGClRbj0PMsxay2_Bul7Rh-LxBqsEhQq5j8P-0Ys5tFDiwWgznL0%3D)
_**After 114 years of combined political life,**_ all we've gotten from their continued "service to America" is cancel culture, Christmas gifts stuck outside American ports, and allowing terrorists to walk all over our military.

**That's why I'm running against a liberal yes-man who does whatever Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden tell him to do.** I need your help to kick him out of office, and the only way I can do that is if you [**pitch in $10, $20, $50, or even more if you're able to.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=09eb4706d2e048ccaf05e0208e5b3741&_e=ICpS6rgTuVzR2XS65JR-Gg5aJd7wXiwKmGnXnxjqzLpytz9P7l_mp2kQvL31P5GeoHKlrlzSyY9cWzhxW60YBoVKo9X7jznfUUpBCaHUABfiCyMdkuFFuwuh5-nkVO-DxedFtXqmd5KPlo1dRUCONOxDGV1_ldJ1aWpoaY0pNa74yHb3820HYDVah6d0DonOiz3LMtG587u3D4zwn2mm1x-xm0RtVEMs2M07mWVhGIerQ9FLOnLpXHr7ngTWkANXZNmsmnHrtms1YWSzmwrQYA_9GD6g35vviQHwvfLwmSWacKudvfC6zDldx9VSp5T0H0j27WF-P60zSjryio8jGt0hpsM-8Myg3wPWGUaWLGSaLATGF1Ps2AAh13oemq1Duufzy35QvQtL57SdUsh7uaWDJTDmpKZTz5ECdhtMkPe-4f4WEsOWU_U5XVuIkWPSf4wudZWu2z6cphNyde2Rt5LgXjgZG5VbbZxZ9KA6kKU%3D)

We cannot allow them to keep walking all over us, we have to do something, and that starts now. body:
Violent crime in Las Vegas this year alone is higher than the national average... | |
---
|
---
[](http://links.donatetodean.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=ddf2bc2670cd4783a40d790215caa508&_e=kR0z4Jr_db5TV4Au7Qe4bMFP3FpQ-OfT8d9_5pIzyBZkgY3Y7xPp3hwtFX3DnXx1Gi8L8d14tyDqpk-t1AIVwl7aY7zKRxWwg1n18gkf-5gLQD-2pcF8M4ocEr3IX53Z5GPfx0vu8UpDAt7O6jIDlCVUZTbjRkPuB6p57Bu-qwmwHqtd8SDBI8Owd23gWN06TwPLmIe-f4lS2eyRO-sI5KP-5iWJ3wV3515PgUqjRgACtcTl9eypSvkY2FvZsp-z6Hdgl1vwCcRV-mE01jBUjqhTt0JENcg-vGnjgTT-E0fhGCXhD_0cqm5fIwVZOfirycNXwxJCfFCWaTiK4EzUqs0VB4OnUtrl59Z7sTkObEvLID_NiAoLtQTC4gFKNPOGNN_TPMKxHKFN9m75OK6U_eLrS6tPfWBVu76G_QVnnJeMzvSreStp0VgQCJs4L1MsKB9qnCuA6SO7Nr6ZEhRibOuf4t-3emZhJvEEP0xZZJmjBOLUer-oW_XocTqmtl1v)
|
---
Peter,

I know I’m biased, but Nevada is the best in the West. I love celebrating Nevada Day every year because it reminds me of all the hardworking people who make the Silver State what it is.

I am always proud to be a Nevadan, but this time of year makes me especially proud.
[](http://links.donatetodean.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=ddf2bc2670cd4783a40d790215caa508&_e=kR0z4Jr_db5TV4Au7Qe4bMFP3FpQ-OfT8d9_5pIzyBZkgY3Y7xPp3hwtFX3DnXx1Gi8L8d14tyDqpk-t1AIVwl7aY7zKRxWwg1n18gkf-5gLQD-2pcF8M4ocEr3IX53Z5GPfx0vu8UpDAt7O6jIDlCVUZTbjRkPuB6p57Bu-qwmwHqtd8SDBI8Owd23gWN06TwPLmIe-f4lS2eyRO-sI5KP-5iWJ3wV3515PgUqjRgACtcTl9eypSvkY2FvZsp-z6Hdgl1vwCcRV-mE01jBUjqhTt0JENcg-vGnjgTT-E0c-jkja1VdJgUGom6fNWjDK8svX7620SOGI9BAHnR1HFDcln5bHeZkDasVM_AaBIDYq--ue11VrTAR8-F_FgUBpS0a4DOupPdVS10VN0izLM8ICpmzN3ThGmU6D3An86N3l_2ldbOkhrussqpXf9-kl0eg1Mm2MW0aUs5qEwSuavqtyv73_IWz2wCcHeWHB6tJQiJP9gD5_JSlI4hEKpkab)
Nevada is full of ranchers and farmers, small businesses owners and teachers, and of course, the men and women who keep the show going on the Strip.

Peter,

I’m everything AOC hates about America. I love my Country, I’m a devoted mother, a small businessowner, a pro-Trump Conservative, and I’m an unapologetic Christian.

**Now I’m running against a radical Georgia Democrat who took thousands of dollars in donations from AOC and was lauded as a "HERO" by the Socialist darling.**

Peter, this is one of the most vulnerable seats in the Country, and voters are enraged by my opponent’s close relationship to AOC and the Squad.

We have a real chance of flipping this seat and dealing a major blow to AOC and her squad. [**Can I count on your support to take this fight to AOC and flip this seat RED?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e6a6be51106e40a0931067d806091bcd&_e=bGjFtgpui6Zw_KSj53xNtJ6qL_NaTT-C5Ho0O2V7PcFjFONauNJBBiwhEcjVWAP5vuAeTBR4nLwFlk4prfp58CS-P_IFcQAoJtoh5fpwby8Dd3BLxmJgLVjZ3xInHX-Em2AaMMJZ3tONGFqQcxjP_AQJuq8o3ZQoSgZqx3Vn0Br7LSx9PoNSoZC4a2A8GmatzxCAdh9CdR_3f-5SnrprRpitzPeROuQaisicQYLNHdDhzHa624LrZT3H8qd5-tjoo1IADCutmksV6Mz5pBXJkuBnNMqEVux1r29pvBIfl1yLqtxi8RVWeSNrN4kYH3FeSdd790senoA0u0rxDeJgMSghKNllSAa5xaUEneyTnlvmkeWr0Pp_B-d7rr0x2B0FQHEfoLfIz_d2VQqoJWxhkEmhuZaNn09tI36RjtGrhBR4L2UEPNgndmm6YMnL2o0h4XjS1wOmXqXOFgcSlnpEJVVe9B--rToI7ZaaMF7pvWw%3D)

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: We have 4 days left, and we’re blowing it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
How are we letting this guy win?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38091465/313930664/-2023814932?refcode=20211029.10_TM_10JG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTE3MDUyOC0xMDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EoH-TWOSYkijySU8r-DV9WIB4bvNwScczA5L3sPZJgw=)

| | Right now, I’m in the most competitive race of 2021 — **a recent poll from an A-rated _FiveThirtyEight_ pollster shows a DEAD HEAT, and it’s Donald Trump and the Republican party’s best shot at picking up a big win this year.** My Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has promised to spend $75 million of his own fortune on buying the Governor’s office. Youngkin’s a GOP extremist — he was caught on video pledging to defund Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+, anti-woman, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump SIX times. So you can imagine how confused I am about why people aren’t stepping up and donating. We’re blowing this one, Derek. [**We have our final fundraising deadline coming up Sunday at midnight, and with just 4 days left in this election, we can’t afford to slow down. clean_body: How are we letting this guy win? | | | = | | Right now, I’m in the most competitive race of 2021 — a recent poll from an A-rated FiveThirtyEight pollster shows a DEAD HEAT, and it’s Donald Trump and the Republican party’s best shot at picking up a big win this year. My Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has promised to spend $75 million of his own fortune on buying the Governor’s office. Youngkin’s a GOP extremist — he was caught on video pledging to defund Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+, anti-woman, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump SIX times. So you can imagine how confused I am about why people aren’t stepping up and donating. We’re blowing this one, Derek. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = I just don’t get how we’re letting Youngkin roll over us and outspend us. People are acting like this is a sure thing — that Virginia is a blue state. Let me tell you: it isn’t.** People need to start stepping it up. This is a must-win race, and we’ve got to stand up to this guy. Let’s get this done, folks. – Terry = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Florida is worth fighting for
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team,

I wanted to pass along a note of encouragement and a quick request for the weekend.

So many pundits across the country have written off Florida. After Trump won Florida again, they started calling us a red state.

We’re going to prove them wrong again. I won statewide as a Democrat in 2018, and we’re going to do it again next year. And I need you to know that I’m in this race because Florida is worth fighting for.

It’s impossible to overstate how much is at stake in this election. We need to stop DeSantis from doing more damage in Florida and prevent him from ever reaching the White House.

If you agree that Florida is worth fighting for and believe we can and we will win this race, I need your help. In just over 48 hours, we’re facing a huge fundraising deadline. Every dollar counts, so please
use this link to chip in now if you can: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=10292pm [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=10292pm]

Thanks,

Nikki

| | Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Media. | | | **Forced Vaccinations Threaten Your Freedom and Christianity**
David Horowitz has been warning Americans that leftist agenda items like forced vaccinations are the opening salvo in their real target – banning Christianity _and the Bible._
“This is about control, not public health,” he says.
The far left wants to control you, your kids, and your religion.
This famous _Jewish thinker reveals his latest warning._
**Read below.** ******_Urgent Message From David Horowitz_** Dear Reader, Remember: _The first thing they did_ during the COVID lockdowns was to close churches and synagogues. They shut down churches as these same blue state COVID demagogues allowed mass and maskless protests after George Floyd. The closed down almost every business in America, _but kept open bars and abortion clinics._ Now, the Biden administration and the "woke" left are embracing a radical new approach: _forced vaccinations._ Don't get me wrong: Everyone at risk should get the vaccine. But the science clearly shows that if you have already have had COVID or you are young and healthy – the virus is like any other flu.
_Mortality is almost zero._ But Biden and the CDC are racing to force vaccinations among the military, school teachers, employees of private companies . . . even our children. Even if they are healthy and not in a risk group . . ._why?_ _Because this is all about control._ And then there was Obama's recent 60th birthday bash. More than 300 people crowded into a small tent in Martha's Vineyard. The media reported wild music, dancing, _and no one wearing masks._ This was _just two weeks after Nancy Pelosi_ and the House Democrats sought to arrest Republican congressmen who did not wear masks even after _they had been vaccinated!_ If you don't see the shocking hypocrisy of the left and their real agenda in this, you should stop reading this! Make no mistake about it, the left's anti-Christian and anti-Semitic agenda is being ramped up dramatically . . . . . . _and it's frightening._ Think about it. The governor of California, Gavin Newsom, actually banned private home Bible studies, while OK'ing mass BLM protests and worse . . . This is a sickening violation of religious freedom. It's a threat to Christianity. And I am Jewish! Newsmax calls me one of the “most important conservative and Jewish thinkers in America.” I have authored numerous _New York Times_ bestsellers. But my book **_Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America_** is the most important. My book reveals the left's dangerous agenda against Christianity. When I began research for the book, I thought this war against Christians would be sometime in the future. Instead I found that Obama and others _had already started this war._ Now they are accelerating their **power grab to systematically dismantle religion and banish God** from the lips, minds, and hearts of the faithful . . . . . . remove His holy name from our civil society, even destroying religious symbols and artifacts along the way. _Think about this:_ The media was so proud of tens of thousands of BLM protesters last year who rampaged through our cities . . . And yet, in San Francisco the Roman Catholic archdiocese was slapped with a cease-and-desist order saying some churches violated a local ban on large outdoor gatherings. Some churches were even fined and threatened with criminal prosecution for holding services outdoors, with social distancing and masks . . . Under **critical race theory, the BLM protests are "good"** even if they violate public health orders, but if Christians want to meet and pray -- _that's bad and evil!_ **Oh, but it gets worse . . .** Unable to attend worship services, people are becoming disconnected and distanced from their faith. But the Constitution provides you with a basic and unlimited freedom of religion. **This new war on Christianity, using COVID, demonstrates the Constitution doesn't matter, that you can't worship as a right, and you must follow orders made up by leftist officials.** Everything you need to know about what is happening is exposed inside _**_[Dark Agenda](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgt2vbge915ei92hmi7m2lsj2s4cbaaltmu4auso_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clim4o34cph2bs)_**_[.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfnupctd7m2u78lgbmsf7q39b3f4d0b883bkanho_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clim4o34cph2bs) I am deeply troubled by what I see . . . You may remember this:
* Bill Maher shouting "death to religion" on national TV . . .
* Monuments in Washington whitewashed of God and
prayer . . .
* Religious crosses confiscated . . .
* Lenten ashes on children's foreheads being scrubbed off at school. . .
* Prayer in school being ruled unconstitutional overnight . . .

Whether you do or don't remember any of the above, please keep reading. This is serious stuff. Our faith and our ability to worship freely is in serious jeopardy. If you're a person of faith, this directly impacts you, your family, friends, and loved ones -- and it's terrifying. Every day the writing on the wall becomes clearer. Listen . . . Hatred is growing in our nation toward Jews and Christians -- being spread like wildfire. Why? What is behind this evil movement? Everything you need to know is laid out in my runaway bestselling book, _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqe3bjucpq9k6lg02jd99ecut00i56lva67rdsq0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clim4o34cph2bs)_. _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqrugv0je7gai1b7kl5ngf59nprsh182d76o6uv8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clim4o34cph2bs)_ has rocked the media and political world. **Tucker Carlson** said he couldn't put the book down. Tucker said you must "read this disturbing but vital book." **Mike Huckabee** has urged every Christian to get and read this book. Gov. Huckabee said this book was the best one he had ever read defending Christians -- and it was written by a Jew!

And **Glenn Beck** reports __[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztr1actb6m8usu5tkq9743dutkckfi9oj64ue9so_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clim4o34cph2bs)__ reveals a "dangerous" situation we all face. I uncovered the roots of this hateful, deadly movement and put it all in my new book, _[**Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf1luu6h1ffmkrf7ulmrc3f5gso8hohgfj8qafrg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clim4o34cph2bs)_[.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsfn7nvnak4726q3ogd0a0c0h16el0gfpqv77t0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clim4o34cph2bs) Look, there's no other way to say this . . . **If you're a Christian or Jew or a faithful follower of God, you must read this book.** Folks, this is religious intolerance fueled by the left for 60 years -- a deep-seated animosity inciting vicious hate crimes and gaining momentum fast. Just look at this: _A headline that recently appeared on CBS News:_ **"U.S. 'moving into a dangerous phase' as anti-Semitic incidents surge."** Everyone must WAKE UP, which is why Newsmax is **_[giving you _Dark Agenda_ for FREE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrtg11tucfdsg9o487l3vkt6tlekqmi1tob9vff8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clim4o34cph2bs)_**[!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp9ob13lj0pah3n33n4e8b309krubpc9pq17o40g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clim4o34cph2bs) This is all part of the plan set in motion decades ago to rid God from public life. In fact . . . After a nearly 15-year drop, the Anti-Defamation League found acts of anti-Semitism started spiking in 2016.
What's worse, the most recent numbers show the highest number of anti-Semitic incidents in its recorded history. There were over 2,100 acts of violence -- assaults, vandalism, and harassment -- against Jews. Please, for all these reasons and atrocities being committed, I urge you now more than ever . . . [**Read this book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7qihns8k8vhshfjgubvkq04skkgs5tno1i183fg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clim4o34cph2bs). I name names -- Obama, Hillary, and the big media pushing this secular agenda. There are new ones now: **Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Andrew Cuomo** , and more. **They want a Godless society**. The closed down almost every business in America, but kept open bars and abortion clinics. Now, the Biden administration and the "woke" left are embracing a radical new approach: forced vaccinations. Don't get me wrong: Everyone at risk should get the vaccine. But the science clearly shows that if you have already have had COVID or you are young and healthy – the virus is like any other flu. Mortality is almost zero. But Biden and the CDC are racing to force vaccinations among the military, school teachers, employees of private companies . . . even our children. Even if they are healthy and not in a risk group . . .why? Because this is all about control. And then there was Obama's recent 60th birthday bash. More than 300 people crowded into a small tent in Martha's Vineyard. The media reported wild music, dancing, and no one wearing masks. This was just two weeks after Nancy Pelosi and the House Democrats sought to arrest Republican congressmen who did not wear masks even after they had been vaccinated! If you don't see the shocking hypocrisy of the left and their real agenda in this, you should stop reading this! And yet, in San Francisco the Roman Catholic archdiocese was slapped with a cease-and-desist order saying some churches violated a local ban on large outdoor gatherings. Some churches were even fined and threatened with criminal prosecution for holding services outdoors, with social distancing and masks . . . Under critical race theory, the BLM protests are "good" even if they violate public health orders, but if Christians want to meet and pray -- that's bad and evil! Oh, but it gets worse . . . are you a domestic terrorist? The FBI thinks so. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/the-swamps-out-of-control-hatred-for-conservatives?e=645b3b1338)

| | | Dear Peter,

I have more perilous news about the Swamp's dangerous and out-of-control hatred for conservatives.

Now, the FBI will investigate "threats" towards school officials:

[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=dd44b976a2&e=645b3b1338)

The DOJ and the FBI are upset that conservative parents have been speaking their minds at school board meetings.

They have been protesting vile, anti-White Critical Race Theory, and mask mandates for children.

_And make no mistake: the plan is label those conservative protestors as "domestic terrorists."_

Just like they did after the mostly-peaceful January 6 protests, the feds are trying to criminalize dissent against the authoritarian Biden Regime, and I'm one of the only members of Congress who is fighting back.

[**So join me in the fight today with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=8f831a3258&e=645b3b1338).

Do you think the FBI can be trusted after their constant persecution of conservatives?

_The same FBI that planted at least one informant/agitator, and likely many more, in the crowd on January 6_.

Their agitator even entered the Capitol Building, which Democrats say was an act of "terrorism."

Not only did they set up Trump supporters that day, but they've been after us for years.

We've known it since they illegally spied on President Trump's campaign.

_The FBI has gone totally rogue, and cannot be trusted to honestly "investigate" the "threat" of conservative parents in schools_.

[**Help me ensure accountability from the FBI and DOJ by chipping into my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f9b9b7968f&e=645b3b1338).

[**With a generous campaign donation today, you too can be an accountability partner to the rogue FBI**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f843b5c0e2&e=645b3b1338).

The Biden Administration is becoming more sinister by the day.

Its goal is to label ordinary conservatives like you and me "domestic terrorists."

_And they're using the partisan FBI to do it, because it's the only way they can stop the America First movement from gaining ground_.

[**That's why I'm in urgent need your support today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=64d852bcbb&e=645b3b1338).

[**A contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or more to my reelection campaign will help me retain my seat in Congress so I can check the power of the Deep State and the FBI**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f872059c6b&e=645b3b1338).

Thank you in advance for helping me in this crucial mission.
---
| For America,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d8aee3f930&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** The FBI will now investigate conservative parents who have attended school board meetings.

They want to label parents who oppose mask mandates and CRT as "domestic terrorists."

[**_Chip into my reelection campaign today and help me fight back before it's too late_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=eb3d644997&e=645b3b1338).

name: Team AOC
subject: AOC grilled Exxon’s CEO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
“Some of us have to actually live in the future that you all are setting on fire for us.”
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211029-2615-header&t=1&akid=2615%2E2526796%2EzzqQtx)
Alexandria isn’t afraid to speak truth to power and yesterday was no different.
For the first time ever, oil executives were questioned under oath about whether their companies misled the public about the reality of climate change.
Alexandria had the chance to ask Exxon CEO, Darren Woods, about the company's lobbying efforts – specifically in regards to the two pieces of legislation currently being negotiated in Congress. Through her questioning, **he admitted to meeting with members of Congress during the reconciliation and infrastructure process.**
She then confronted the President of the American Petroleum Institute about their $55.6 million in lobbying over the last 10 months alone. But she didn’t just focus on figures alone, because this crisis is personal.
**She said: “I think one of the things that often gets lost in these conversations is some of us have to actually live in the future that you all are setting on fire for us.”**
Exposing the role of dark money and Big Oil lobbying in Washington is vital, but it also makes our campaign a key target of attacks.
The American Petroleum Institute spent almost half a million dollars on ads opposing Democratic members of Congress. Those ads, which include ads that targeted individual members of Congress for their support of climate action policies, were viewed at least 21 million times, according to Facebook data.1
**We’re nearly one year out until Alexandria’s re-election and we need to be prepared to fight back against Big Oil’s disinformation campaigns. We’re counting on the power of many small-dollar donations to go up against their millions.**
[If you’re able – can you chip in $3, or anything you can, to help us stand up to Big Oil’s attacks and reach our end-of-month goal before the deadline in 2 days?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211029-2?refcode=em20211029-2615-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2615_2526796_zzqQtx&akid=2615%2E2526796%2EzzqQtx)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211029-2?refcode=em20211029-2615-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2615_2526796_zzqQtx&akid=2615%2E2526796%2EzzqQtx)**
Alexandria will continue to fight for climate justice and to hold fossil fuel companies accountable for their lies. Your support makes that possible.
With thanks,
Team AOC
1 - [New York Times](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10123?t=22&akid=2615%2E2526796%2EzzqQtx)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211029-2?refcode=em20211029-2615-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=23&refcode2=2615_2526796_zzqQtx&akid=2615%2E2526796%2EzzqQtx)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211029-2615-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=24&akid=2615%2E2526796%2EzzqQtx)**

body:
Happy Fall, Peter! The turning of the seasons is all about change. As we watch the leaves change color and set our clocks back an hour, it’s also important to note that **_real change is happening right here in Alabama’s U.S. Senate race_**. Last quarter, YOUR contributions took Katie’s grassroots campaign to the next level. Not only did we raise enough to keep up the fight for Alabama First, but **88% of the donations we brought in also came straight from Alabama** , NOT from D.C. insiders, and **95% came from**** _individual_****donors**. **_That is HUGE, Peter. _**
Katie’s campaign is about bringing together grassroots supporters to CHANGE the political landscape in Alabama. She’s already made a huge splash, and _she’s not slowing down_. clean_body: Happy Fall, Peter! The turning of the seasons is all about change. As we watch the leaves change color and set our clocks back an hour, it’s also important to note that real change is happening right here in Alabama’s U.S. Senate race. Last quarter, YOUR contributions took Katie’s grassroots campaign to the next level. Not only did we raise enough to keep up the fight for Alabama First, but 88% of the donations we brought in also came straight from Alabama , NOT from D.C. insiders, and 95% came from individualdonors. That is HUGE, Peter. Katie’s campaign is about bringing together grassroots supporters to CHANGE the political landscape in Alabama. She’s already made a huge splash, and she’s not slowing down. Our End-of-Month fundraiser ENDS this Sunday at midnight. We’ve still got $6,618 to raise before then, but with your help, we can CRUSH this goal: Your support has already been instrumental in changing the layout of this Senate race. With your continued support TODAY, Katie will make it to Washington and continue her mission to CHANGE politics from the inside out. . Thank you, Wesley Britt Katie Britt for Alabama Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=20Birk?=
subject: Before the weekend hits
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
Are you in | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4b74fba5f570/before-the-weekend-hits?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

When Dr. Jensen asked my wife Adrianna and me to be his Honorary Campaign Co-Chairs, I don't think either one of us could have imagined the momentum his gubernatorial campaign would maintain. I mean, I knew the guy was good --- but Minnesotans are _REALLY_ responding! When I was in the NFL, overcoming adversity and turning it into momentum meant the difference between winning and losing close games.

Just this week, we saw Dr. Jensen come under investigation yet again for speaking truth to power! He didn't balk and he didn't back down! Instead, he's helping shine a light on Minnesota and all the problems that need to get fixed here; whether it's on [Fox News](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=6f505a7a76&e=33b11688c1), [Newsmax TV](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=ff2083aab9&e=33b11688c1), or [on the campaign trail](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c77c71dbfb&e=33b11688c1) talking directly to Minnesotans, Scott is a steadfast advocate for those who have been targeted politically and cancelled!

Peter - before the weekend is here, please consider joining our team. We run on small dollar contributions, and [giving $5, $10, $25, or $50](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=d0dcfc43f2&e=33b11688c1) would help us continue this incredible momentum.

We're seeing what's happening in Virginia right now: Republicans are on the verge of flipping a governor's race because they have a candidate who's built a movement and is addressing critical issues voters care about! We have the same thing in Dr. Scott Jensen for our great state of Minnesota! [Donating](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c7cb0f960d&e=33b11688c1), getting [some signs and banners](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=dff4e3d688&e=33b11688c1), or purchasing [exclusive "Jensen" merchandise](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=5823e7566b&e=33b11688c1) all helps get us closer to the goal of defeating Tim Walz. Aren't you ready?
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=0e133a1a44&e=33b11688c1)
---
| From the Iron Range, to the Twin Cities, to the Southern tip of Minnesota, our people want the same thing: a fair shake, a safe neighborhood, and the freedom to pursue a future.

That’s what a Scott Jensen administration would mean to Minnesota families. He grew up here; he's seen the challenges; he's stood in the breach of those challenges and not backed down. Minnesotans don’t want to be smothered by a culture war or far-left politics any longer. We want someone who shares our brave and pioneering spirit. That's Dr. Scott Jensen.

Before the weekend hits, say it loud and proud with me: ["I'm on Team Jensen!"](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=7576b1ee95&e=33b11688c1)

With our Shared Values in Mind,

Matt Birk
Former Viking and Super Bowl Champion
Proud Jensen Campaign Co-Chair
