Before the weekend hits, say it loud and proud with me: With our Shared Values in Mind, Matt Birk Former Viking and Super Bowl Champion Proud Jensen Campaign Co-Chair | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Dr Scott Jensen for Governor, All rights reserved. PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR. SCOTT JENSEN FOR GOVERNOR.

subject: No Tricks - All Treats! Join Amanda in Pinellas Park This Halloween!
body:
Halloween Treat Trail at England Brother's Park on Oct. 31st at 6 p.m. | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=d92f981896&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | |
## **Bring the Family and Meet Amanda on the Halloween Treat Trail!**
Hi Friend,

I wanted to invite you to the 2021 Halloween Treat Trail in Pinellas Park. It's a fun and safe way to enjoy Halloween with the whole family. I'll be there to pass out candy and I would love to see you and your little ghosts and goblins!

The event starts at 6 p.m. on Halloween
at [England Brothers Park](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=02ea39de6d&e=c2296cffff)
(5010 81st Ave. N. in Pinellas Park)

It's FREE and boys and girls of all ages can Trick or Treat for candy donated by local businesses and organizations. The Makki Campaign is proud to be among them! [You can find more details here. ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=b21ddec6c1&e=c2296cffff)

There will also be children's activities, refreshments, and a DJ.

I hope you'll come out and say hello!

Happy Halloween!

Amanda Makki
---
|
---
| [Chip In For Amanda Now!](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=02826600cb&e=c2296cffff "Chip In For Amanda Now!")
---

Join Amanda at these upcoming events in
Pinellas County!

Amanda would love to have the chance to speak with you about the issues in person. Join her at Caddy's in Madeira Beach on Wednesday, November 3rd from 5:00 - 7:00 p.m. [RSVP H](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=5683c52621&e=c2296cffff)[ERE](mailto:info@amandamakki.com?subject=Amanda%2C%20I'll%20see%20you%20at%20Caddy's%20in%20Madeira%20Beach!) or by clicking the photo.

Amanda will be at 3769 50th Ave. S in Saint Petersburg on Thursday, November 4th from 5:00-7:00 p.m. [RSVP HERE](mailto:info@amandamakki.com?subject=Amanda%2C%20I'll%20see%20you%20in%20Clearwater%20on%20November%208th!) or by clicking on the photo.

clean_body: | | | | Help end it! Friend, Did you see the memo that Biden’s Attorney General sent out about parents speaking at school boards?! AG Garland is pushing the FBI to pursue investigations of Parents who disagree with school officials over racist or sexual material taught to their children! Even worse , his son directly profits off of Critical Race Theory being taught in thousands of schools! This isn’t off-brand for Garland. His record of opposing the 2nd amendment and going after conservatives is very public. So why was Liberal Lisa Murkowski one of the few Republicans who confirmed Merrick Garland as Attorney General? We need to hold these D.C. Insiders accountable! Garland and Murkowski don’t care about children's education, they care about indoctrination! Thanks, Kelly | | | | =

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, With three great performances at U.S. Senate candidate forums and a big push to support local school board candidates, Jane once again proved why she is the grassroots, America First candidate for U.S. Senate this week. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Take Back Our Schools** As Ohio Republican Party Chairman, Jane made local races like school board a priority and she continues to lead on this issue as she marches toward becoming Ohio’s first female U.S. Senator. Teachers unions and the Liberal left continue to put special interests ahead of our children’s well-being and education and parents across Ohio are fighting back! That’s why Jane contributed more than $40,000 to over forty school board candidates across Ohio who will stand up to unconstitutional mandates, Critical Race Theory, and the indoctrination of our children by the Liberal left. This Tuesday, it is crucial for Republicans to get out to the polls and support their conservative candidates for school board. Below is the list of candidates Jane is supporting across Ohio. If you live in their area, make sure to get out and vote anytime between now and Tuesday. You can go [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b9eb2e55970b416f9abf37418b00badf&_e=Hiql6k0ZiGZb_677_W2noopevsN3QktP4G8ow6HPB2bn8-KLQz9UaKmD2PsC81hTfqjzLRWVFq-azYHEtHSjkrJHa75z1OajoOs5c53_omGs-TS57JdH_WTxJ1tcPckWFZpUwA9T6dRvGbEKJdBz1PJdxPEkPS2Tu-fCuJw2FuovsjOSv5YA74PXzjMgRuDuKUcz_WqDLWvq59UZxGHz45QeGNMRnKx-hvdit42G3eCKgS6wd8XC__QAXa1vC0kg) to find your polling location or early vote center. Let’s take back our children’s education! **From The Trail** Last Saturday the Cuyahoga, Geauga, and Lake County Republican Parties co-hosted a U.S. Senate Candidate Forum. Jane shared her record as an America First fighter who will never back down in Washington and will always work for Ohio families. On Wednesday night, after contributing over $40,000 to school board candidates across Ohio, Jane held a conference call with these candidates to thank them for stepping up and make sure Jane was doing everything she could to help them get across the finish line. It was a great conversation and these candidates have put in the work and are ready to win on Tuesday. On Thursday, Jane exercised her right to vote by voting early at the Stark County Board of Elections. You still have time to make your voice heard by voting early at your county’s early voting center or by going to your polling location on Election Day. Find all the information about how and where to vote [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b9eb2e55970b416f9abf37418b00badf&_e=Hiql6k0ZiGZb_677_W2noopevsN3QktP4G8ow6HPB2bLaeyCcVDVEg2RaUu5obeZh0cn78U5gwDkjgLBwokOxZMXpYBOO5ilweiLDOrluxVXY2CgmIpWodEaKZiKwXZSErMnPkaIG7_YLUvngplqKeX75erNguernhUzbKxqp6tVoheGV5hdbiRh7325xby6gTqfkUHK2YpUNGip1LkHTu8QNy3rljHI0ZQtpdaeNhA6S9YjDPSc-9F18mhx3vv2). [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b9eb2e55970b416f9abf37418b00badf&_e=Hiql6k0ZiGZb_677_W2nooUOxIjtDNO0Ub6t0OciEPgwiPQXEjxGVJzp2ombRW5ZcbRDFZS0w9vm2x_3A0xBN7PSzfpBU31iZdD2ja3RhCYrpXyRcHI9uK5Sr1OJiZFuLJTe6UwqttYqmcq366q97CbgdN2tdXVMIzmL9o7y7iFB-ojFAkLBsGAqcwtQ8ALE_qY9VtDVUN4pHJckbz2zqOwfWQYcZaueXy2xggFz2mRa069j7xb2iES-2vpYukBhYG0-Px4cNjEW_z1YvDmbEg%3D%3D)
Jane also toured the Mahoning County Career and Technical Center Thursday afternoon. Workforce development will be a major focus for Jane to ensure Ohio’s workforce is skilled and ready. Places like these are doing great work to train students for the jobs of tomorrow.
Finally on Thursday, Jane joined the Greater Akron Chamber of Commerce and the University of Akron’s Ray C. Bliss Institute of Applied Politics for a candidate forum. Jane shared her vision for the U.S. Senate on key issues like workforce development, jobs & the economy, and how we can bring about a brighter future for Ohioans.
**Jane Proves She's the True America First Fighter in Ohio GOP Senate Forum**
At Sunday’s Ohio GOP Senate Forum hosted by Hugh Hewitt and the Center for Christian Virtue, Jane Timken proved that she is the true America First fighter that can win and deliver for Ohioans.

But don’t just take my word for it, here’s what **Madison Township Trustee Michele Reynolds** had to say about Jane’s performance:

“Jane Timken lives her faith through her actions - standing up for the unborn, promoting policies that strengthen the family, and protecting our Constitutional right to religious liberty. These values are what we need in a U.S. Senator, and tonight, Jane Timken proved that she is the conservative champion with the integrity and strength of character that we need in Washington.”

The forum covered a wide variety of issues and here are a couple of highlights.

**Jane on how our education system is failing our children:**
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b9eb2e55970b416f9abf37418b00badf&_e=Hiql6k0ZiGZb_677_W2noo7Y6NOfT3DnGyJJWi_wSnClJN8gJ1eqkBbF9sYhzHTLbN6P3C5XiHpGuCKsPA-PF9hYyFujAdiXvCPkqhmLfQ4RlG65K7OtaN7oKeMgQpSWtI1fSFH0t18n8-e7X_tuh7FxVq1DSVaOPsOzjkQbmEvLYGsU7QWd8DkBl62_PYuxm7MNhv2RzfnnlncoH11QJSqXL6vLoSBaRZvE77hKQbdxZ7YhkYyw2fsvetxRxZNoNKvRDyhvGrnIwWMlnLBLAQ%3D%3D)
**Jane on China and Biden's Sputnik Moment:**
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b9eb2e55970b416f9abf37418b00badf&_e=Hiql6k0ZiGZb_677_W2nohtmOtkA33C_XBemv6wo9BcBtFTjZUKxgvQfKTm60Mc_LJQpdfxntXFOFP9L_kwUobZi-GCNghID_ZnY4iDQ-RO6TntFMraCxYPeEkkKSRdPLrmBnnX-ZrhiKmKkRNP-D5jE7zcZqqPaFF8nc9zY1kzPiGdCu9O5rIPQjKyubwKtQTvzPgt55CyySJIQXuQSqjArJf62Nyp2uSJSsbmM40GoUXNdcl0SRANq72mFJ8Z0UKpc50xEa7MHGXsRaXTdrg%3D%3D)
**Jane on the Left's attacks on women:**
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b9eb2e55970b416f9abf37418b00badf&_e=Hiql6k0ZiGZb_677_W2nolvcokcYWqP_XzSYVoBRElFUHSLLQrpRLBL5WAhOqnrPG_YpJmR1ktNQjRcC7dFNvf5n_Bt3MzAbKaXJ49tBQSDpTlBlIMENHFdA0kiO7KAptVqD23OMR9B1Cbd6nfFUGazlPzmKGeDq3uyeyjOeHqoKJrxjgF4NFkAepXiBpnaQG833FyGEubb0mAoV1DoQF8zP7zuKx8TlxsKERKUJJZb9p_ai7uSdzt2aLeco4cLSiYErQFD_J4MWhqhZxCzDeg%3D%3D)
Now more than ever, leadership matters. We need leaders like Jane that will stand up for our country, not cower and cave to the Democrats. And that’s exactly what she proved at Sunday’s forum.

I hope everyone has a great weekend.
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio

clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, With three great performances at U.S. Senate candidate forums and a big push to support local school board candidates, Jane once again proved why she is the grassroots, America First candidate for U.S. Senate this week. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. Take Back Our Schools As Ohio Republican Party Chairman, Jane made local races like school board a priority and she continues to lead on this issue as she marches toward becoming Ohio’s first female U.S. Senator. Teachers unions and the Liberal left continue to put special interests ahead of our children’s well-being and education and parents across Ohio are fighting back! That’s why Jane contributed more than $40,000 to over forty school board candidates across Ohio who will stand up to unconstitutional mandates, Critical Race Theory, and the indoctrination of our children by the Liberal left. This Tuesday, it is crucial for Republicans to get out to the polls and support their conservative candidates for school board. Below is the list of candidates Jane is supporting across Ohio. If you live in their area, make sure to get out and vote anytime between now and Tuesday. You can go to find your polling location or early vote center. Let’s take back our children’s education! From The Trail Last Saturday the Cuyahoga, Geauga, and Lake County Republican Parties co-hosted a U.S. Senate Candidate Forum. Jane shared her record as an America First fighter who will never back down in Washington and will always work for Ohio families. On Wednesday night, after contributing over $40,000 to school board candidates across Ohio, Jane held a conference call with these candidates to thank them for stepping up and make sure Jane was doing everything she could to help them get across the finish line. It was a great conversation and these candidates have put in the work and are ready to win on Tuesday. On Thursday, Jane exercised her right to vote by voting early at the Stark County Board of Elections. You still have time to make your voice heard by voting early at your county’s early voting center or by going to your polling location on Election Day. Find all the information about how and where to vote . Jane also toured the Mahoning County Career and Technical Center Thursday afternoon. Workforce development will be a major focus for Jane to ensure Ohio’s workforce is skilled and ready. Places like these are doing great work to train students for the jobs of tomorrow. Finally on Thursday, Jane joined the Greater Akron Chamber of Commerce and the University of Akron’s Ray C. Bliss Institute of Applied Politics for a candidate forum. Jane shared her vision for the U.S. Senate on key issues like workforce development, jobs & the economy, and how we can bring about a brighter future for Ohioans. Jane Proves She's the True America First Fighter in Ohio GOP Senate Forum At Sunday’s Ohio GOP Senate Forum hosted by Hugh Hewitt and the Center for Christian Virtue, Jane Timken proved that she is the true America First fighter that can win and deliver for Ohioans. But don’t just take my word for it, here’s what Madison Township Trustee Michele Reynolds had to say about Jane’s performance: “Jane Timken lives her faith through her actions - standing up for the unborn, promoting policies that strengthen the family, and protecting our Constitutional right to religious liberty. These values are what we need in a U.S. Senator, and tonight, Jane Timken proved that she is the conservative champion with the integrity and strength of character that we need in Washington.” The forum covered a wide variety of issues and here are a couple of highlights. Jane on how our education system is failing our children: Jane on China and Biden's Sputnik Moment: Jane on the Left's attacks on women: Now more than ever, leadership matters. We need leaders like Jane that will stand up for our country, not cower and cave to the Democrats. And that’s exactly what she proved at Sunday’s forum. I hope everyone has a great weekend. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | ---|---

clean_body: We need to know right away! | | | Do you support President Trump in starting his own social media site? | | | | We’ve have been emailing, Peter! But we haven’t heard from you!! We would hate to see your name to be left off the list we send to President Trump. Do you support President Trump in starting his own social media site? | Thank you. Trump Social Media Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Humbly asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | | Peter,

I'm urgently reaching out to you with a humble request.

My election is in just 4 days, ballots are already being cast, and time and resources are running critically low.

We are so close to pulling off a victory in Virginia, but this race is so tight that every single dollar will make or break the outcome of this election.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=de5f6875d7e14174abe1c26b69335072&_e=Py_Y2QoXSYAcG6S-RbnTQXUjjOHCoOSJFtaUBJgCllwppyb7EB8GM2iyn1ZUklgGSG3VXJtPjO0EHA8_EUvJItZkLZ5eZC-S2tcrF-V5iC82CPxFLdCQT4P_H4hsMFeuJmbzrKLYrflm74dEmbbOFHtaNNYwtY5388voDaWtzdmEdoC3aHjYmFj7nDKaVeeqnTd1GFZeqtG3usx_G068qnFY7VGVnMZLBplc2HHCPkyedQ0xFZJQSPn-QdwPFzHc4tV1HwzIFFePV_mw3o0DMGA4_oz-ghoJfT1PC_fYtm-_iN4F0IiZ6EDQD5U62Yr9gfnvs9BtxvIPgwiGBdqlaQskglfWgBWYHR1MUovCv4fQ-OZweBk3f1Ue_Dz69or1CfJiztsjE9zB4z-3cteYNL-W0Ekip9vQUL6LYVV-zlCgpOTIS23F5G6S9OoxYiL73nO7Mw6G-MP0kP1RbobSMsfDGtJRFTMXs5uJJS8602hVdU51PLQLvmUuUozULvr1Zw2pPBo29_7KO0jy7tS-JB-MoGnt8sQA733abLsJ5KzL5U-ijPeepTlALIYj6fsc "If you have anything to spare, I’m humbly asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this governors race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

Winning in Virginia will set the tone for 2022, but we're running out of time. _**[That's why I'm hoping you'll step up with any amount you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=de5f6875d7e14174abe1c26b69335072&_e=Py_Y2QoXSYAcG6S-RbnTQXUjjOHCoOSJFtaUBJgCllwppyb7EB8GM2iyn1ZUklgGSG3VXJtPjO0EHA8_EUvJItZkLZ5eZC-S2tcrF-V5iC82CPxFLdCQT4P_H4hsMFeuJmbzrKLYrflm74dEmbbOFHtaNNYwtY5388voDaWtzdmEdoC3aHjYmFj7nDKaVeeqnTd1GFZeqtG3usx_G068qnFY7VGVnMZLBplc2HHCPkyedQ0xFZJQSPn-QdwPFzHc4tV1HwzIFFePV_mw3o0DMGA4_oz-ghoJfT1PC_fYtm-_iN4F0IiZ6EDQD5U62Yr9gfnvs9BtxvIPgwiGBdqlaT49LvVzNSxy7xf6OAaX-vnkT9Gc5N88gJtiblcVMMF6DtXsgNiKf4f399GVm8sPS28peK84A5QueLXg54VvCViMawWVQKX66JHiZ314edwH2_kbmD6e_Ctb8B2MqvMTzGJDuwsJZ1goRa1e5q9cfwkmNLBsoscs6iJRtrMkudXKDFsOmUd5VKzxNbMGp9tV-ynhKMDIlCnVBwgCKZxpNTn26iREP1uS1YpZQ8lpgvfr "That’s why I’m hoping you’ll step up with any amount you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1. name: John Fetterman
subject: I’ll be brief, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
In just a few words, I hope I can count on you.
#
Listen, it’s the Friday before Halloweekend. You'd probably rather be handing out candy to kids in costumes than reading this email, so I’ll be brief, Peter.
This week, my team shared with you that our campaign is closing in on $10 *million* raised since we first launched, **and that we're pushing really hard to get there by our deadline this Sunday, October 31 at 11:59 p.m.**
I’m so humbled + grateful for the support that has allowed us to even *think* about meeting this goal.
[**It would make my day Peter if you would make your first donation tonight of $****5 to help us meet $10M.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35266?amp%3Brefcode=em20211029-3258-el&t=1&akid=3258%2E434096%2Epx1R5k)
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35266?amp%3Brefcode=em20211029-3258-el&t=2&akid=3258%2E434096%2Epx1R5k)
Like I said, this email is short (even if I’m not). Have a happy Halloweekend, Peter — and my deepest thanks for your support. 🎃
In gratitude,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35233?refcode=em20211029-3258&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3258%2E434096%2Epx1R5k)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211029-3258-footer&t=22&refcode2=3258_434096_px1R5k&akid=3258%2E434096%2Epx1R5k)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3258%2E434096%2Epx1R5k)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3258%2E434096%2Epx1R5k)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Shawn Collins
subject: Taliban tried to kill me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA**
body:
I’m running for Congress to keep America safe by securing our border and supporting our military and law enforcement. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=598efb2e2e0c4e8f8775c79fe1128aa5&_e=xRKosxEJrL9nhoHhPJZ9Ojda80enZ0isdAWJ7slUB3WzRDwU9ZgmOZhvyBo23j5vnA4dtqJa2BK7XHDRcUbiEJeTQ9-BoGTWLh4LjSj2YfiwORNORWspSjIUhQrTRlXRXBgfNG6X9Jgv2u4Sy617D0_BxyOawcF1RdB8NeTVUukD6s6RLPAYitJvsg4T7GxT00n4mDf44qMAFD3T7OLwPQ_fWw_TbfbUNHNKwQWD53OWzVENhjP1DTAxJk6YZ5AaX0rlV6IQ7oVkyefHrC3gIOqwpvP3hUP2dMEUuUwyfvrJvg1-Ag3GHxeigVbd4s6cUtAs7lEieXZX72Kv8PQbrpyv92kbvjasEKyCS0n_0vU1xDGs9i5rM3IwXhM3HrD-M4ujHvGxCLMeNNUPoFIS8_WalC0wxSZ-8bbqlZ6_vW_c9-Ac7eNyglDpwrjMsXtGwQV-8NZSjiEx7FE4Wy73rA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow patriot,

I’m Shawn Collins – **a proud black conservative Republican, Navy combat veteran, and active Navy reservist running for Congress in California’s 45th District.**

I’m running against liberal Congresswoman Katie Porter – a self-proclaimed socialist who hangs out with the squad and co-chaired Elizabeth Warren’s presidential campaign.

[**I need help from grassroots conservatives like you to flip this top-target House seat and win back a Republican House majority so we can put a stop to the Biden agenda.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=598efb2e2e0c4e8f8775c79fe1128aa5&_e=xRKosxEJrL9nhoHhPJZ9Ojda80enZ0isdAWJ7slUB3WzRDwU9ZgmOZhvyBo23j5vnA4dtqJa2BK7XHDRcUbiEJeTQ9-BoGTWLh4LjSj2YfiwORNORWspSjIUhQrTRlXRXBgfNG6X9Jgv2u4Sy617D0_BxyOawcF1RdB8NeTVUukD6s6RLPAYitJvsg4T7GxT00n4mDf44qMAFD3T7OLwPQ_fWw_TbfbUNHNKwQWD53OWzVENhjP1DTAxJk6YZ5AaNQVdp-UUhIPDSEPvUpoCaTQ6jqISwlOZRwfrgn3cbNYPePhfDeDmRkFKsYT2EwAwQobKG0VKjrG2OEhaqcVtZBA4jBWG4moOX9CgcXO18bJCw9B-caOih3s7TzffALoaO0579Ic_C9jSe-l7SKtrgX-4iqgs9SQMyvp_c3-E3WOMLyEs0ts2RTW6XwrDAR6ocmPcn4UBBMAL3z4Fj49B2A%3D%3D)

But first, I want to tell you about my service in the Navy...

After I graduated from law school, I answered the call to serve my country and enlisted in the United States Navy.

Just one year after my wife Zeina and I got married, I volunteered for a combat deployment to Afghanistan.

While stationed near Kandahar City, Afghanistan – the birthplace of the Taliban – I coordinated with Special Forces units to help them track down and arrest suspected terrorist suicide bombers. Our work saved countless lives.

But wearing the American flag on my sleeve made me a target, **and I was fortunate to survive two suicide bombing attacks.**

Now, everything I and thousands of other soldiers fought for – and even died for – in Afghanistan has been undone by Biden’s failed military withdrawal.

This failure has left Americans and our allies stranded, left our weaponry and supplies in the hands of the Taliban, and resulted in more deaths of innocent civilians – including woman and children – along with American troops.

Yet Biden, my opponent Katie Porter, and the Democrats have moved on and are seemingly ignoring what happened and what is still happening.

**This failure, combined with the lack of security at our southern border which would permit even terrorists to cross unnoticed, means America is less safe than it was a year ago.**

There’s absolutely no doubt – [**American needs new leadership, and I’m running for Congress to give it to us.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=598efb2e2e0c4e8f8775c79fe1128aa5&_e=xRKosxEJrL9nhoHhPJZ9Ojda80enZ0isdAWJ7slUB3WzRDwU9ZgmOZhvyBo23j5vnA4dtqJa2BK7XHDRcUbiEJeTQ9-BoGTWLh4LjSj2YfiwORNORWspSjIUhQrTRlXRXBgfNG6X9Jgv2u4Sy617D0_BxyOawcF1RdB8NeTVUukD6s6RLPAYitJvsg4T7GxT00n4mDf44qMAFD3T7OLwPQ_fWw_TbfbUNHNKwQWD53OWzVENhjP1DTAxJk6YZ5AaGyXsFX2OqWjw6wRXD43nCilpI44GWCou9AM90Lrdb_wOxBfsw_Nz3PfX3U_3eccynRiPHRgoTCVANahatWSenc9BZEWxSK22ygIh8lQKtCQxEwh-Pp_-9bOkCi2cJJZkLTNpCGkLxAH3MBKb3NhtkFKHjUxLgQD3fOfunavvJhTwfYN7piu-392wf2VSi-UjJTnXudlqUnjn1cL_RzsLvw%3D%3D)

But I need your help. The Left knows that a **black, conservative, Navy veteran with Afghanistan combat experience who is focused on real solutions** is exactly the kind of candidate who can defeat them in this current climate, _which is why they’re already targeting me._

I’m running for Congress to keep America safe by securing our border and supporting our military and law enforcement.

[**Will you help me fend off attacks from the Left and restore responsible conservative leadership in America by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or more to my campaign today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=598efb2e2e0c4e8f8775c79fe1128aa5&_e=xRKosxEJrL9nhoHhPJZ9Ojda80enZ0isdAWJ7slUB3WzRDwU9ZgmOZhvyBo23j5vnA4dtqJa2BK7XHDRcUbiEJeTQ9-BoGTWLh4LjSj2YfiwORNORWspSjIUhQrTRlXRXBgfNG6X9Jgv2u4Sy617D0_BxyOawcF1RdB8NeTVUukD6s6RLPAYitJvsg4T7GxT00n4mDf44qMAFD3T7OLwPQ_fWw_TbfbUNHNKwQWD53OWzVENhjP1DTAxJk6YZ5Aa0yZBEF8wWiZZJ531JeVmdzXGidzJRMHlyoxR3gcXBC36tkad1fhXGZPmBjxv817-mAeRRvM3o0RflsA4D5lD29qXNs6IuCMiXvjBgeR_incssDeF5YE8YdPyIeU-SWjYCFFbeNgBuSoA8eCNkjJ2g6z3r40YWuhh2pkaU2n6CC61g354P99OMyJP-lhZ2JgODXp9SwmNtCs_FCksEoV8VQ%3D%3D)

Thanks,

Shawn Collins
U.S. Navy veteran
Republican for Congress

[**BACK SHAWN COLLINS**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=598efb2e2e0c4e8f8775c79fe1128aa5&_e=xRKosxEJrL9nhoHhPJZ9Ojda80enZ0isdAWJ7slUB3WzRDwU9ZgmOZhvyBo23j5vnA4dtqJa2BK7XHDRcUbiEJeTQ9-BoGTWLh4LjSj2YfiwORNORWspSjIUhQrTRlXRXBgfNG6X9Jgv2u4Sy617D0_BxyOawcF1RdB8NeTVUukD6s6RLPAYitJvsg4T7GxT00n4mDf44qMAFD3T7OLwPQ_fWw_TbfbUNHNKwQWD53OWzVENhjP1DTAxJk6YZ5Aa8rDHvAysLkmZG4FUe2n8mY2R60HPQMD2w7MuS5rkb_DVEnPJKBc-ZNjP6l0cfUaCFK1f5Q4e20BsxYDpNkJKWtKYrW-kgmE6-jqVvlZp-XQtV6f5whxxd2TL9g4IpP1hY7V-J1avIal9Pathl3_aJuyGaTSO6Ge5h2fSBM9i2SRV7vz7-euOlfwV5hUdqqAp7vlwvUOBK3l5u63WLTtgLg%3D%3D)

clean_body: I’m running for Congress to keep America safe by securing our border and supporting our military and law enforcement. | Fellow patriot, I’m Shawn Collins – a proud black conservative Republican, Navy combat veteran, and active Navy reservist running for Congress in California’s 45th District. I’m running against liberal Congresswoman Katie Porter – a self-proclaimed socialist who hangs out with the squad and co-chaired Elizabeth Warren’s presidential campaign. But first, I want to tell you about my service in the Navy... After I graduated from law school, I answered the call to serve my country and enlisted in the United States Navy. Just one year after my wife Zeina and I got married, I volunteered for a combat deployment to Afghanistan. While stationed near Kandahar City, Afghanistan – the birthplace of the Taliban – I coordinated with Special Forces units to help them track down and arrest suspected terrorist suicide bombers. Our work saved countless lives. But wearing the American flag on my sleeve made me a target, and I was fortunate to survive two suicide bombing attacks. Now, everything I and thousands of other soldiers fought for – and even died for – in Afghanistan has been undone by Biden’s failed military withdrawal. This failure has left Americans and our allies stranded, left our weaponry and supplies in the hands of the Taliban, and resulted in more deaths of innocent civilians – including woman and children – along with American troops. Yet Biden, my opponent Katie Porter, and the Democrats have moved on and are seemingly ignoring what happened and what is still happening. This failure, combined with the lack of security at our southern border which would permit even terrorists to cross unnoticed, means America is less safe than it was a year ago. There’s absolutely no doubt – But I need your help. The Left knows that a black, conservative, Navy veteran with Afghanistan combat experience who is focused on real solutions is exactly the kind of candidate who can defeat them in this current climate, which is why they’re already targeting me. I’m running for Congress to keep America safe by securing our border and supporting our military and law enforcement. Thanks, Shawn Collins U.S. Navy veteran Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. Having served in Afghanistan, Shawn has spent his life fighting for the Constitution he swore to uphold and defend. He will take that same fighting spirit to the halls of Congress. ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Shawn Collins is a former member of the US Navy. name: Cicely Davis
subject: Ignore the lies: The Democratic Party belongs to Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Minnesota doesn’t have any “moderate” Democrats. We have Ilhan Omar. For the sake of our country, we need to get her out. |
---
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=f3870e5892b84882b5c0d0c553825c3c&_e=SqD5p_-87LMe7IGL-Dg-WjPLbSdqTtrvnMm_ilq52QqcM5m65o4inYaDf4nUHP43bzl5giwCpwZjqnG5azoSl-6pPPC0Fd4ShzBdx8kI29fGS4kZDDbn2g4WytIRHLaOGd4qBN98if0bviF3Z6ozSE-0oLeAato3SuIQFTJsvBd4s9ZDOMzrb_zLPsyFXK6-_F3PqDE2CE2kC5yIrWIG53zK-c5G2XXh-Sd3BNACENgDwWYGWWAUM3fSQrI6bSDF_QQdG_7RlLsQuLKm98DQSXn0E6SWGlzMonKDH2fpDgOAAt0t4dbNjhd0ZlbV-OVecJkNKDlDTwtrFWNlsnrQQlbDXiqkROFix_mbPz6H6q04IOvoV5mYkDlIqjiV8grBIp6l-li86UG3VATrpc3VtkMTZYNxUIgFTzATDB9pd2fGR3UkwUDdxABlyJOujoX44AJCyZNEMhCEYhzb6TM7D3QATTlbK261p0ia_rZdosY%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

The Democratic party you might remember is gone. The Democratic party that elected John F. Kennedy, who was a pro-life fiscal conservative, IS GONE.

Today’s Democratic party has no interest in serving you Fellow Conservative, or serving the people as a whole. Today’s Democrats are here to serve progressive special interests, the coastal tech millionaires, and college communists who have trust funds. [**We cannot let these anti-American forces win, but I need your help to fight back.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=f3870e5892b84882b5c0d0c553825c3c&_e=SqD5p_-87LMe7IGL-Dg-WjPLbSdqTtrvnMm_ilq52QqcM5m65o4inYaDf4nUHP43bzl5giwCpwZjqnG5azoSl-6pPPC0Fd4ShzBdx8kI29fGS4kZDDbn2g4WytIRHLaOGd4qBN98if0bviF3Z6ozSE-0oLeAato3SuIQFTJsvBd4s9ZDOMzrb_zLPsyFXK6-_F3PqDE2CE2kC5yIrWIG53zK-c5G2XXh-Sd3BNACENgDwWYGWWAUM3fSQrI6bSDF_QQdG_7RlLsQuLKm98DQSRbh77sGX2oMvKLnXqWmx4ucZ8Lxu8fRitNZtqjoqZlv7BapsMGJYYa4ZKCKVIDMRm8L8Ig8g-sdneBAKuLnECnZGavKZD1Y858IFjMHverxCDJiWXdGsEIjdH61Wg-okextW2YzmMBUSQaEA_pv6LEjzG-254Hqd4giVATawKQLWeok3f1rtDQStTC2mdJeiWxSA3FtTzsTLbmaI1g9YTY%3D)

**Fellow Conservative, the Democrats we see today have a lock on the minority communities across this nation, yet they don’t even serve these communities like they claim to.**

Ask yourself, if they truly cared about helping Black Americans like me, why do they fight to keep Black Americans trapped on welfare? Better yet, how can they say they want to stop crime and violence while demonizing and defunding the police that protect our communities?

[**They only care about control, and we need to break the current Democrat majority to stop their assault on our constitution, starting with Squad member Ilhan Omar.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=f3870e5892b84882b5c0d0c553825c3c&_e=SqD5p_-87LMe7IGL-Dg-WjPLbSdqTtrvnMm_ilq52QqcM5m65o4inYaDf4nUHP43bzl5giwCpwZjqnG5azoSl-6pPPC0Fd4ShzBdx8kI29fGS4kZDDbn2g4WytIRHLaOGd4qBN98if0bviF3Z6ozSE-0oLeAato3SuIQFTJsvBd4s9ZDOMzrb_zLPsyFXK6-_F3PqDE2CE2kC5yIrWIG53zK-c5G2XXh-Sd3BNACENgDwWYGWWAUM3fSQrI6bSDF_QQdG_7RlLsQuLKm98DQSZziZaA67dPKUdT0RFvcI-5JaMatKgc9tuxs4pnk0JGKFbWS6_BOerROYr5FDXPzx5MeXuakKqh8LBX0eyR9LFDSxMDiHfHXYUl8jKegHKweFr5Hn-9da_kfxWQ5t8Pyu-RwDduidmUtcbR_4MdDzhIEkWrNOjyphS3aSU0bN_YJRhI3_2eYl3QH2MV1ehjouCGDNalkOgVcvEDXFafsiBs%3D)

Fellow Conservative, we have a real opportunity to change the future of this country. [**But, if we don’t bring down “The Squad” and kick Ilhan Omar out of Congress, then we’re going to be stuck with this socialist nightmare that they’re trying to create.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=f3870e5892b84882b5c0d0c553825c3c&_e=SqD5p_-87LMe7IGL-Dg-WjPLbSdqTtrvnMm_ilq52QqcM5m65o4inYaDf4nUHP43bzl5giwCpwZjqnG5azoSl-6pPPC0Fd4ShzBdx8kI29fGS4kZDDbn2g4WytIRHLaOGd4qBN98if0bviF3Z6ozSE-0oLeAato3SuIQFTJsvBd4s9ZDOMzrb_zLPsyFXK6-_F3PqDE2CE2kC5yIrWIG53zK-c5G2XXh-Sd3BNACENgDwWYGWWAUM3fSQrI6bSDF_QQdG_7RlLsQuLKm98DQSe1oCP67J6BVolcnBdR-L9yLSGbjcAK_0O_hdzvXxSt4MbWcB0nhH6rwmmFY695X_MpRnAHhJbHfjc8MVgALXQWMta6P23lt6KJ9ohPyWOJwK7vzhJO2LA0xIYIURJbvjDZotyGukrJR4mpdNYYztEZTxhf4z5xz1FgakHFgiz1Bzeq00czU8KqtGOd4NC52sa7RhcMi1pu65IIt7DeiggY%3D)

[**Please help me take down the squad and take back Congress.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=f3870e5892b84882b5c0d0c553825c3c&_e=SqD5p_-87LMe7IGL-Dg-WjPLbSdqTtrvnMm_ilq52QqcM5m65o4inYaDf4nUHP43bzl5giwCpwZjqnG5azoSl-6pPPC0Fd4ShzBdx8kI29fGS4kZDDbn2g4WytIRHLaOGd4qBN98if0bviF3Z6ozSE-0oLeAato3SuIQFTJsvBd4s9ZDOMzrb_zLPsyFXK6-_F3PqDE2CE2kC5yIrWIG53zK-c5G2XXh-Sd3BNACENgDwWYGWWAUM3fSQrI6bSDF_QQdG_7RlLsQuLKm98DQSYqx0sgNMSjTwhjWE7zmrFal9D0xgJ6vfe-AU4VwdEtnSrG1F0FO6KABcEFk4rzsgfJTgi639agi_1ZQMU1beaLd3qblTR62TnW5I00-N-P36nK5-B5-Bx1pRmlpvOB6x6Ward1WrUhLOQxjJO-1BOJHhDlzT049edAVMbclZpkqsUkXDKh1U_QXGCept0hxuRJ4QGWxS8FTtW_180n1QNs%3D) If not for me, then for the future of our nation.

clean_body: Minnesota doesn’t have any “moderate” Democrats. We have Ilhan Omar. For the sake of our country, we need to get her out. | Fellow Conservative, The Democratic party you might remember is gone. The Democratic party that elected John F. Kennedy, who was a pro-life fiscal conservative, IS GONE. Today’s Democratic party has no interest in serving you Fellow Conservative, or serving the people as a whole. Today’s Democrats are here to serve progressive special interests, the coastal tech millionaires, and college communists who have trust funds. Fellow Conservative, the Democrats we see today have a lock on the minority communities across this nation, yet they don’t even serve these communities like they claim to. Ask yourself, if they truly cared about helping Black Americans like me, why do they fight to keep Black Americans trapped on welfare? Better yet, how can they say they want to stop crime and violence while demonizing and defunding the police that protect our communities? Fellow Conservative, we have a real opportunity to change the future of this country. If not for me, then for the future of our nation. Thank you, Cicely Davis | | PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

subject: Biden Puts America Last
body:
Our economic growth is flatlining.CNBC reports that our economy had its weakest quarter of the pandemic recovery era... |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=d940a08d66&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, Our economic growth is flatlining. CNBC reports that our economy had its weakest quarter of the pandemic recovery era. Biden’s supply chain crisis has caused drastic shortages. **And thanks to the inflation his policies have caused, many Americans simply can’t afford what little is left on the shelves! ** Of course, Joe Biden doesn’t care. He’s more focused on pushing multi trillion-dollar socialist spending bills that will only worsen our economic problems. ****
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=3e0c7b5005&e=c2296cffff)
---

| [FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIDEN'S DISASTERS](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=a184f6b186&e=c2296cffff "FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIDEN'S DISASTERS")
---
| Biden’s socialist economic policies are threatening to tank our entire economy. Instead of removing cumbersome red tape on our small businesses and fixing our supply chain issues, **he wants to plunge America even further into debt.** It’s becoming clearer by the day that to protect America’s future we need to take back the House and bring back President Trump’s economic policies that gave us prosperity and security. **That’s why I’m running for Congress. With your support, we CAN flip Florida’s 13th District and STOP Biden’s radical agenda.**
---

_Amanda Makki_

body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=1)
---
Friend, This week during veto session, Democrats pushed forward misguided and damaging policies, ranging from parental rights to redistricting. The repeal of the Parental Notification of Abortion Act is particularly troubling. This is a betrayal of parents, plain and simple, and is yet another example of Democrats’ failure to understand that parents play an appropriately vital role in a minor child’s life. Several Democrats crossed the aisle to vote with Republicans against the repeal—but not enough. The fact that the repeal faced significant bipartisan opposition shows just how extreme this agenda is. This repeal puts young women—many of whom are as young as middle-school age—in significant danger. The repeal was just one of many examples of Democrats’ rejecting common sense. The passage of an amendment to the Health Care Right of Conscience Act, which prevents people from being conscientious objectors to COVID vaccine mandates is clearly an effort to quash whatever resistance remains to Governor Pritzker’s rigid and overbearing COVID regime. By removing the ability of Illinoisans to refuse to comply with COVID- and vaccine-related mandates, Governor Pritzker’s power over our everyday lives grows even more suffocating. Similarly, the new Congressional and state legislative maps are a proof that Democrats are far more interested in keeping power than they are in fairness or giving all voices in Illinois a chance to be heard. Pritzker and Democrats in Springfield have prioritized enhancing their own power while failing to protect children or respect the rights of adults—especially parents. As Governor of Illinois, I will build upon a career-long legacy of keeping people safe and facilitating justice. Unlike Pritzker, I will keep my word, hold myself and others accountable, support business-friendly policies, and stand up to special interests. As we close out the week, have a fun and safe Halloween weekend! S/F, Paul Schimpf
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** Mad about this week's disgraceful veto session votes? My two St. Clair County Directors, Greg Graves and Becky McGrady, understand that it is winning elections—not complaining on social media—that will bring change to our state. Thank you, Greg and Becky, for your friendship and support! [If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=2)
* * *
**Paul on the Issues** I trust the people and parents of Illinois. That's why I am opposed to repealing the Parental Notice Act and modifying the Health Care Right of Conscience Act. As governor, I would **VETO** both pieces of legislation. [Watch my address on both issues and why I will make sure parents are the ones who make decisions when it comes to their child's life, not Springfield politicians. This election is about trust and I trust the people and parents of Illinois.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA74esEG7UkgwxFnfOZgeNI2_ihn9VxuS9yp7E4m8O6PY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=3) [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA74esEG7UkgwxFnfOZgeNI_HbFMAq0FobbxQiesms1mI&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=4)
* * *
**Social Media Spotlight** [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA-IddMxExKungvBh2YIvF8sFNkSePyPSYXE3Y8cWnWXw&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=5) When deployed to Iraq, I served as the lead American attorney advisor to the Iraqi prosecutors in the trial of Saddam Hussein. Under my guidance, the Iraqi prosecutors were able to induce a remarkable courtroom confession where Saddam admitted culpability in the massacre of hundreds of Iraqi civilians. I have never shied away from standing up to a challenge and doing what's right. As your governor, you can trust the same steadfast commitment to doing the right thing for our families, businesses, and fellow Illinoisans at all times. [Comment, share, or like our post here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA-IddMxExKungvBh2YIvF8sFNkSePyPSYXE3Y8cWnWXw&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=6)
* * *
**Attention Galesburg and Knox County-Area Supporters** Don't forget to join me next Tuesday, November 2nd, for a [Pre-Dinner Reception](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/evening?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=7) at Visions Venue in Galesburg starting at 4:30pm! Come hear my plan to defend parents' rights, stand up for working class families, and restore real leadership back in government by [getting your tickets here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/evening?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=8). **I'll also be on Galesburg's Morning News show on WGIL on Monday at 8:40am so be sure to tune in!**
* * *
**Get Involved** Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? **[Pitch in $5, $25, $50, or $100 NOW](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=9)** so we can share our [Facebook video](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA74esEG7UkgwxFnfOZgeNI_HbFMAq0FobbxQiesms1mI&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=10) with more people across the state on how we need to put trust back in the people and parents of Illinois. Have a hand in helping our digital advertising efforts today! ___
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to Paul.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=11).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=12) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=13).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_29&n=14), software for leaders.

subject: Almost there...can you help?

body:

| | |
---
| | **We're Almost There!**
---
| | Friend,

October has been great _. Our field push is on point and we are reaching large numbers of voters._**We're beating our opponents badly and we haven't even ramped up our campaign operations.**_ _The 'We the People' campaign to **Stand Up for America** is almost warmed up and ready to go into full swing in January 2022.

I'm sending one last email as a final call for our push to wrap up October 2021 with strong support. Without your support, Dan Newhouse will think we are losing momentum and we might end up with a crowded field of candidates as we had in the Governor's race.
I don't want that and I know you don't either.
We are only $753 away from passing our goal for this month with only a few hours left. Your support is so vital to our success and you've never let us down in the past.

[**_Please contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to CRUSH our October fundraising goal_**](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SoXHyp&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=E9YXGkY&)** _._**
**Please contribute ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to help us out. We're literally 15 people contributing $50 or more away from crushing this month's goal. We appreciate you all so much!**

Your friend,
Loren

**PS: LET'S GO BRANDON!**

name: Cicely Davis
subject: Not your grandfather’s Democratic Party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Minnesota doesn’t have any “moderate” Democrats. We have Ilhan Omar. For the sake of our country, we need to get her out. |
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=759aafb8abc84a3eb8e28199fa852173&_e=Qif8x_PGPy2-55gQnvx2XgFPhJYyt2FscRaz31VZVtOjHsV6T6Il2L_mCK8c_MbHGhU-eBLicVhcXHKKh2HLKUK2lEluxhJzcZgDeUjG96bKVZ9FzzY48OImGbsrhfE_O7rj-dxo3rGcLcoWMeLQpG1iPCMFt2Kd0jOnaFsjmz9NLTVS6aoL1Dz6gjI65NvFi9p2KU1cODRZTItXW7_NJikq3N9MxtSXCZzBRbPoRisfx7GJrYE9iHdrhvgRVrL5YsNfszmtz8fXBPCcm53577zo3RW0U5qng-GkmMWDH0Z3P_BkrL5FoAQesHOBv6vMe-u5GDdOoLOirhm_LYyk8mmpZKMKhh9gZQKgMYM2P9UvO4yLy423KEuI_rNAz0hju2k2Z0j4gz15XVW5HrbNM8RvUXs-5XwRKZXsMfi_0t4LtGf6cRFR-0SnLD-ymdKINFXpGXnICBdMRAR31OKG4lRk6tZ9if0MkRWRz_uwRrA%3D)

Peter,

The Democratic party you might remember is gone. The Democratic party that elected John F. Kennedy, who was a pro-life fiscal conservative, IS GONE.

Today’s Democratic party has no interest in serving you Peter, or serving the people as a whole. Today’s Democrats are here to serve progressive special interests, the coastal tech millionaires, and college communists who have trust funds. [**We cannot let these anti-American forces win, but I need your help to fight back.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=759aafb8abc84a3eb8e28199fa852173&_e=Qif8x_PGPy2-55gQnvx2XgFPhJYyt2FscRaz31VZVtOjHsV6T6Il2L_mCK8c_MbHGhU-eBLicVhcXHKKh2HLKUK2lEluxhJzcZgDeUjG96bKVZ9FzzY48OImGbsrhfE_O7rj-dxo3rGcLcoWMeLQpG1iPCMFt2Kd0jOnaFsjmz9NLTVS6aoL1Dz6gjI65NvFi9p2KU1cODRZTItXW7_NJikq3N9MxtSXCZzBRbPoRisfx7GJrYE9iHdrhvgRVrL5YsNfszmtz8fXBPCcm5357-Qwvr2EakoFZZC8iNisw7jLIvCWiMZ4rtbOhMB0ZhkfVy2SPJ3VL-lCQpVrY8WJsJKQF1FkQ6k3_7VdpkXICD8YeKECC7vASMXgUsqOY-7eibMrqAC6xOCVrl3_Hs2zE9Xf5O1I6yy620LxsgTzuEcTyLg-iAiVPM8MAGNDYEhLMCkYn6C1rLy7avPGUfxN-Kg61OG9ElVnt9MYjzAoXDc%3D)

**Peter, the Democrats we see today have a lock on the minority communities across this nation, yet they don’t even serve these communities like they claim to.**

Ask yourself, if they truly cared about helping Black Americans like me, why do they fight to keep Black Americans trapped on welfare? Better yet, how can they say they want to stop crime and violence while demonizing and defunding the police that protect our communities?

[**They only care about control, and we need to break the current Democrat majority to stop their assault on our constitution, starting with Squad member Ilhan Omar.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=759aafb8abc84a3eb8e28199fa852173&_e=Qif8x_PGPy2-55gQnvx2XgFPhJYyt2FscRaz31VZVtOjHsV6T6Il2L_mCK8c_MbHGhU-eBLicVhcXHKKh2HLKUK2lEluxhJzcZgDeUjG96bKVZ9FzzY48OImGbsrhfE_O7rj-dxo3rGcLcoWMeLQpG1iPCMFt2Kd0jOnaFsjmz9NLTVS6aoL1Dz6gjI65NvFi9p2KU1cODRZTItXW7_NJikq3N9MxtSXCZzBRbPoRisfx7GJrYE9iHdrhvgRVrL5YsNfszmtz8fXBPCcm535708bKu95T0TIhnf4EEu2ae_aiJaAoS4566viZXSpi_RXjEI48AugnT2zwLGdkmbw88i38Ait-1KpdlqzZ709aT-ixyEf1jfr06FEEQdUm5LEQm7vNeodvddbWRH08lNQV6gObBMMYktruJdAxdmRGcwDwInRp28t_zt796AFPs-I878yvzKWA2IZg3E_cqMUprTitojhWQQKI46ikz1lMXM%3D)

Peter, we have a real opportunity to change the future of this country. [**But, if we don’t bring down “The Squad” and kick Ilhan Omar out of Congress, then we’re going to be stuck with this socialist nightmare that they’re trying to create.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=759aafb8abc84a3eb8e28199fa852173&_e=Qif8x_PGPy2-55gQnvx2XgFPhJYyt2FscRaz31VZVtOjHsV6T6Il2L_mCK8c_MbHGhU-eBLicVhcXHKKh2HLKUK2lEluxhJzcZgDeUjG96bKVZ9FzzY48OImGbsrhfE_O7rj-dxo3rGcLcoWMeLQpG1iPCMFt2Kd0jOnaFsjmz9NLTVS6aoL1Dz6gjI65NvFi9p2KU1cODRZTItXW7_NJikq3N9MxtSXCZzBRbPoRisfx7GJrYE9iHdrhvgRVrL5YsNfszmtz8fXBPCcm5357_qpqpYauOx5LF4o_hndPZfQDCR_WNYdATBhRkOA24LT9mjhNoAITBdFUJNjDjGZACz3Cy-RAZaLHF1FTEbmFZXeXnrweiHxgpInmNIU1C36aALkG8HzKqu88Epp1mPmgbmVbj5UiwSzCt_q38l5eWUOg9_Lbth6KI4mYCx-1HoH4IYR3jBpwACmxm1AWXVqz02UcZbcIc00HNdh4pNSakc%3D)

[**Please help me take down the squad and take back Congress.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=759aafb8abc84a3eb8e28199fa852173&_e=Qif8x_PGPy2-55gQnvx2XgFPhJYyt2FscRaz31VZVtOjHsV6T6Il2L_mCK8c_MbHGhU-eBLicVhcXHKKh2HLKUK2lEluxhJzcZgDeUjG96bKVZ9FzzY48OImGbsrhfE_O7rj-dxo3rGcLcoWMeLQpG1iPCMFt2Kd0jOnaFsjmz9NLTVS6aoL1Dz6gjI65NvFi9p2KU1cODRZTItXW7_NJikq3N9MxtSXCZzBRbPoRisfx7GJrYE9iHdrhvgRVrL5YsNfszmtz8fXBPCcm535787w7YI1mYRomk0W0EgnAAcGc46RnYNHs5ZxB9OSL3nKV4Wqgz89AkOnei4WH73JpQX513724BBRDrMdly8d7c1hVW2KFqE5WXpH2gxFGRQ4N6s2LV2bvlGMIWGWHfmvpbZtmS0sxCPuvF6mA8CVoTVzt5ikny9n1tQ0Uav84Chi1g6f992EhiAAXKdGJ-AP67IBNvRgrZHf12YwOFuBy1o%3D) If not for me, then for the future of our nation.

Thank you,

clean_body: Minnesota doesn’t have any “moderate” Democrats. We have Ilhan Omar. For the sake of our country, we need to get her out. | Peter, The Democratic party you might remember is gone. The Democratic party that elected John F. Kennedy, who was a pro-life fiscal conservative, IS GONE. Today’s Democratic party has no interest in serving you Peter, or serving the people as a whole. Today’s Democrats are here to serve progressive special interests, the coastal tech millionaires, and college communists who have trust funds. Peter, the Democrats we see today have a lock on the minority communities across this nation, yet they don’t even serve these communities like they claim to. Ask yourself, if they truly cared about helping Black Americans like me, why do they fight to keep Black Americans trapped on welfare? Better yet, how can they say they want to stop crime and violence while demonizing and defunding the police that protect our communities? Peter, we have a real opportunity to change the future of this country. If not for me, then for the future of our nation. Thank you, Cicely Davis | | PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)
It's Katie Porter.

I'll cut right to the chase: ****[House Democrats are approaching our End of Month Deadline, and we're still $250,000 short of our goal. We need to hit our goal so that we have the resources we need to defend our House majority.

Can you contribute $3 or $10 to help defend our House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)****

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)

You might have seen me use my whiteboard to hold government officials and corporate executives from Big Pharma and Wall Street accountable. But today I'm using it to show you what we're up against:****
[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/mPmpcqzq6-)
Luckily, there's still time to turn the tide and defend House Democrats all across the country -- _but we need grassroots supporters like you to help. _

**[That's why I'm reaching out to you directly: Can I count on you to chip in $3 -- or whatever you can spare -- to protect our House Majority? ](https://links.e.dccc.)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Please take our Trump Poll before 11:59 p.m.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We need to know whether or not you’re going to stand with our Party leadership – including President Trump – as we work to take back the house from s We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|
---

Peter,

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b2c3ce8052a34059a49fa51c004a04ff&_e=6kpBXAdYkqO2jHloiVPbO815sMATfZqgUJwR1IxVtO3YEUQZOZjs4gCdvJp8xotoANBXLmYdKc8QTRPRRudSXXotf_xKpePlmp2JhiA2UgSfCc4WGFRqo0q08g6TV-cuLQf7KjZknhice9P3VGWWxKqduq4Bc6LzxUAKGYpzoIK1Fe0gdlURs7x81cGDartctbFWFrCDtBu4S9CUO7Xu61K0ZC_f-MNU5Zwjl_1sdijrROl10su125Ib0pKAUR3YWsmOD5EqEnJ-Irye5cTIGKCD9Hm24tgyA_UBrbPDoOc3LChb_AmG329fO05ZqZPhefuuVKyU9jExaeIumhXPqr3SMP6rjHVyg_vtqperF7I8-LNECXgrxLcTQS1382KNfRTISGfXY6GHx2CnwWM-VDmHOJV4Ku-rNSsHMmfEDEY7DsFj7bHusqTc7Ff5O0PLeiDm8y5Z2HGKGDEV8WZhkkiwbGtsjsF2UNpWywcrasfhswHwB-rTiRZZC1oPx-pn3UQk7DwCZ33KBb6uXbHklnoPZj5N7jBVNcUZd3YkhbA%3D)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 2,578 votes short. **

Peter, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b2c3ce8052a34059a49fa51c004a04ff&_e=6kpBXAdYkqO2jHloiVPbO815sMATfZqgUJwR1IxVtO3YEUQZOZjs4gCdvJp8xotoANBXLmYdKc8QTRPRRudSXXotf_xKpePlmp2JhiA2UgSfCc4WGFRqo0q08g6TV-cuLQf7KjZknhice9P3VGWWxKqduq4Bc6LzxUAKGYpzoIK1Fe0gdlURs7x81cGDartctbFWFrCDtBu4S9CUO7Xu61K0ZC_f-MNU5Zwjl_1sdijrROl10su125Ib0pKAUR3YWsmOD5EqEnJ-Irye5cTIGKCD9Hm24tgyA_UBrbPDoOc3LChb_AmG329fO05ZqZPhl5IKQhkdfBsFII_4mON1P89_xYvuIs2F0XCccnAaG4K54GtNkYb_PVmU3kvdEuh3FKmct3ZRKa3rEsTsOQUFSj553_TcQQpw7tb6i8bYWMYjm5wbRhxJosJtg9IV-vTgvVurIoEqcPqAHryivfQLEOfhNhaGbcZrsOVK2Xo9fSoA_OgXB5XqaxhX476FDPV00P3P_m1Mrh5-HMbv3t9MZmc3aUD4xwXHd8HUAHWF3kc%3D)**

You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go – and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year’s midterm elections**_.

subject: It’s official: My uncle is campaigning in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
He’ll do anything to get his candidate elected | | |
---
| | It’s official: my uncle, the most dangerous man in America, just announced he’s going to campaign for Glenn Youngkin in the Virginia governor’s race. Terry McAuliffe needs your support right now — more than ever. **[He set a rapid response goal of raising 10,000 grassroots contributions before my uncle’s rally in Virginia, and he needs your help. Will you split a donation between Terry’s campaign and Steve Sisolak right now?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt3F-WWEfzKFepdMRtcNPEIDs91HnclHd6Q3uYfQquF6ZpaJDx4p6rDMvC-7CNAn6l60bs8dXhwtNZUzDqCsb-sQPecRqTMH6t2Tfl1GRuMkfFm_A5I0ZmvVT8_1mlMctiI7D_gnAIeofMgcmoM0M-2iRjm0Ghw3ZibcWEzvEjRR4LgrXx1lRO9IJiUXuU5wEsWMYNumsje5nulLpOyL1e0ZNUYM1lGeZJNYvRfyARsYnrz1m9iUIDMoFBHT04Hrw8ijW0UbKTo4HYuoryrWDdiM-L86rJwHlkxge3N7A3a6U9NJrmlTUVy7TQxN0Gmpla1lIfk_uYYE5dk1gcE-ZZ3KOCUDu65GzC51Y4xN5VM7A5PHhHLktaKMpOtbFrQ-AtK_7aSxNKD2DwRk0kg5_yuA/3gk/EeACnyUdSey-AmWB2MKY2g/h0/fDrYDXr_-kkbi092q42AFonbQSiLDy2jZCNr8kNGy-w)** Glenn Youngkin might pretend he’s a moderate, pragmatic Republican. But the truth is, he’s just as bad as Donald Trump — that’s why Donald has endorsed him **_eight times._** And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are attached at the hip — they’re gone now. **Donald Trump is _all in_ for Youngkin.** We worked much too hard to stomp out right-wing extremism last year — and I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up to make sure my uncle’s radical followers, like Glenn Youngkin, aren’t given the chance to gain power. **[We need your support right now. clean_body: He’ll do anything to get his candidate elected | | | | | It’s official: my uncle, the most dangerous man in America, just announced he’s going to campaign for Glenn Youngkin in the Virginia governor’s race. Terry McAuliffe needs your support right now — more than ever. Glenn Youngkin might pretend he’s a moderate, pragmatic Republican. But the truth is, he’s just as bad as Donald Trump — that’s why Donald has endorsed him eight times. And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are attached at the hip — they’re gone now. Donald Trump is all in for Youngkin. We worked much too hard to stomp out right-wing extremism last year — and I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up to make sure my uncle’s radical followers, like Glenn Youngkin, aren’t given the chance to gain power. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Dr. Mary L. body:
Democratic socialists in the Senate are trying to eliminate our freedoms. I won’t let them get away with it when I’m in Washington... [](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=97d7f195ec52471f84fef3e07a5118a3&_e=biudKiZudvr61wwzZpGshZDMRLnvND0BSpNTtmz-hXUUUfMoTgPkAzi35iL0aLHiiS9pW4lktCxAz9XxFx1n0ZOCSj0xq5PYnOaXezJlL_ZlsmrQ7ptzpZldRjzMzXyHE31rCEZQAB5RgV3rl8SUg9MPNcXrg2YBtf6Gvq0o1nS-KaO9NVoZw4Z-lHWM4W7DDc2Vx1zolhyM6Q47vCqOD8uCNdVpiuRQ-4jA-aSBUU2Xwo_V25DR_kjeBqo-4AQAc-SGRjZiwDht5X8246TfPk4cRDyNGG8-qgCgXIsiScAa_nWK24TEYvtJHiY7c4GwgCvovWPkIqc2J716zJxlB_nODwLBBGOViQ2yEYNSqAn6uMcnUMjTVo1LCLdYJxqeOOBS_djT_2NW4Jvue9Oo3Nkb_6Giv73gy-963SPM7_nQe_GpTtW_8WM-PVIj7TsexUoGJQhdu8hgNv0BaUbNIeMfEjnasc0zyORAmg30FmYnKpaGzelxkfouWTM8UIi5) | |
---
Peter,

It’s no wonder why people like Senator Joe Manchin are on the brink of leaving the Democratic Party.

**Democrats are now the party of socialism, big government, and control – and America is in deep trouble as long as they’re in charge.**

Now, we’re seeing a revolt happen right before our eyes.
* _Joe Biden’s poll numbers are sinking faster than a rock._
* _Thousands of workers are pushing back against Biden’s vaccine mandate._
* _Democrats are reportedly “panicking” ahead of the 2022 midterm elections._

[](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=97d7f195ec52471f84fef3e07a5118a3&_e=biudKiZudvr61wwzZpGshZDMRLnvND0BSpNTtmz-hXUUUfMoTgPkAzi35iL0aLHiiS9pW4lktCxAz9XxFx1n0ZOCSj0xq5PYnOaXezJlL_ZlsmrQ7ptzpZldRjzMzXyHE31rCEZQAB5RgV3rl8SUg9MPNcXrg2YBtf6Gvq0o1nS-KaO9NVoZw4Z-lHWM4W7DDc2Vx1zolhyM6Q47vCqOD8uCNdVpiuRQ-4jA-aSBUU2Xwo_V25DR_kjeBqo-4AQAc-SGRjZiwDht5X8246TfPk4cRDyNGG8-qgCgXIsiScAdg3jw09ZCXtfKoJKiAeApubUIeA8a_TG-rbfDx6aA4NUVLVw_tlxpCBa0pEE4VDkd08vlWyvf_k2m8cjGxvY1KmFaNumSJqHqmxWjI5cPr8GSVZSS0YbFPBm83oH__2PNC6ye3p7_iiKNVe88qudGjxP_aYND2PQiq_CyZJsFiss_uuPnNjYGQTqTk_gySnxYj8rfv2EOktSVvp6hS3T7)

Peter, I don’t know where I would be today without the grace of God and the power of the American Dream.

_But I do know this:_

**I will never give an inch in the Senate against the socialists who are fighting to eliminate our freedoms.**

But before that can happen, I need your support – and with our End of Month fundraising deadline coming up, it’s more critical than ever.

_**[Will you help protect our freedoms by stepping up to take back the Senate?](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=97d7f195ec52471f84fef3e07a5118a3&_e=biudKiZudvr61wwzZpGshZDMRLnvND0BSpNTtmz-hXUUUfMoTgPkAzi35iL0aLHiiS9pW4lktCxAz9XxFx1n0ZOCSj0xq5PYnOaXezJlL_ZlsmrQ7ptzpZldRjzMzXyHE31rCEZQAB5RgV3rl8SUg9MPNcXrg2YBtf6Gvq0o1nS-KaO9NVoZw4Z-lHWM4W7DDc2Vx1zolhyM6Q47vCqOD8uCNdVpiuRQ-4jA-aSBUU2Xwo_V25DR_kjeBqo-4AQAc-SGRjZiwDht5X8246TfPk4cRDyNGG8-qgCgXIsiScB2dpVF0rHm3M-q1msDte9PvGGbsYVkbojDq8akTl0cEAl1F8zewrDDeWwNa1dgIMg4A95fnQWAs0zzL0CMT0MN2LjYZqPbJhcyI73ISaDEhR65klEtQGZmFLb2wFi0kEYSSfNs6o4xdy93Hvlf_w7SiAQAJisyJ2P9bIDS_FgqQwJOfY6zUB_J5ZIecIfOOxuFKN1R5sJ6Ps3R7ZZJEmqP)**_

name: Ryan Busse
subject: 3 reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The NRA, NSSF, and the rest of the gun lobby are currently spending millions of dollars working to roll back decades of progress on gun safety.
#

Hi , Ryan Busse here. I wanted to share 3 reasons why it’s critical that you donate before our upcoming end-of-month deadline.
1. The NRA, NSSF, and the rest of the gun lobby are currently spending millions of dollars working to roll back decades of work that ensures responsibility is part of gun ownership. To them, profit is more important than decency or even our democracy itself.

2. The overwhelming majority of Americans -- almost 90% -- support common sense gun legislation like universal background checks. Here at Giffords, we are doing the work to make sure that universal background checks and other responsible measures are a top priority in Congress.

3. Preventable gun violence has steadily increased in the last few years. Our gun violence epidemic got worse through the COVID-19 pandemic, and the numbers of lives lost grows every day.

After working in the gun industry for more than two decades, I’ve seen firsthand how the firearms industry and its lobby, especially the NRA, has become dangerously absolutist about the Second Amendment. The industry dismisses decency and promotes outrageous radicalized views.
**Now I’m working with Giffords where we are doing the work necessary to save lives. But we are facing an uphill battle against the gun lobby, and that’s why I’m asking:**
[**Will you make a $3 contribution towards our $115,000 October fundraising goal? Your contribution will go directly towards fighting back against the gun lobby.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?refcode=em211029-2-15&t=1&refcode2=1139_3935704_tWUL7t&akid=1139%2E3935704%2EtWUL7t)

I know that the Second Amendment and keeping Americans safe through sensible legislation go hand-in-hand. They’re not in disagreement.
Your support will help us to stop the NRA from spreading extremism and fuel our efforts to pass common sense gun safety laws like universal background checks that benefit all Americans—including responsible gun owners.
Thank you for your part in saving lives.
Ryan Busse
Senior Advisor, Giffords

subject: Bidens America Last Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great America PAC**
body:
American taxpayers are to foot the bill for foreigners that illegally crossed our borders? | | [](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=87df26abfb5b40809d090e12bc5260b1&_e=SemkNZGYWW3WDM3VsJjtTP-0_81k9lYtK5gaPIgCt27fOPevDjUx8bHh4BaTU35DykM2QYJY5P90vBcPgbxrx5OIcfh00SomvEwZz1uhQxaeGJ-iyGGTrhSYYW7dwRippxKaUNjbeKV_6tL1LuU8_z4r3IGGLI2hea-hRUfrcJFV58ItS_v9oNHgHvaaiFvZlpRfGOcnkqUX3WCsAQDv9MP-i6mKkVri1fCxLhxT2AiaQbTQf70zaCrORKSxSyuZpOJpQFSQ7goGF1ExROiA0Pv9C4ScCuYfuvof4x47lBnBk3zoOAH-4DRzSjqHDQnQV6PUKRV2_A2-ueOY4HZg826sd9MNlkq3HzabgzHwIFTgtDggO-TKVPa7jfxSou8HJXiwuW2TrrodPfUN6U9d5UjPedRYNXE15MSZP1fyuqW0oJm81Kyyv7TnjO5a4MY65mxUjdkTGVbxkrjetdZr3A%3D%3D) | Peter,

In one of the most outrageous and unacceptable examples of Biden Democrats' anti-American agenda, **they're now negotiating to give at least $450,000 to illegals who were _"separated during the Trump Administration."_**

Americans are already struggling to provide for their families with rising inflation and supply chain issues. Now Biden wants to raise taxes on Americans to pay illegals for their _"trauma!"_

American taxpayers are to foot the bill for foreigners that illegally crossed our borders?

**_No way._**

clean_body: American taxpayers are to foot the bill for foreigners that illegally crossed our borders? | | | Peter, In one of the most outrageous and unacceptable examples of Biden Democrats' anti-American agenda, they're now negotiating to give at least $450,000 to illegals who were "separated during the Trump Administration." Americans are already struggling to provide for their families with rising inflation and supply chain issues. Now Biden wants to raise taxes on Americans to pay illegals for their "trauma!" American taxpayers are to foot the bill for foreigners that illegally crossed our borders? No way. This is unacceptable, and we must stop it. Help stop their sellout of American Taxpayers and seal the border once and for all! Peter, Nobody is working harder than Great America PAC to spread the word, expose the Democrats, and defeat them in 2022. Thank you, Peter \-- please add your name now! Sincerely, Ed Rollins, Chairman, Great America PAC | | | | Paid for by Great America PAC 107 S. What the Left is doing to our country is unconscionable. So we have to take action now. But the Leftists in charge of Congress right now have different priorities...
* They voted AGAINST tracking down our American assets in the hands of the Taliban
* They want to give nearly half a million dollars to illegals crossing our border
* They want to increase taxes for every hard working American

And the more we learn, the worse it gets! With Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer controlling Congress and REFUSING to hold President Biden accountable: _This is just the beginning._ **That’s why we have to take back the House. clean_body: My campaign team sent me a note to tell me we haven’t heard from you in a while so I wanted to personally follow up. END OF MONTH DEADLINE ON SUNDAY, OCTOBER 31 Friend, I’m leading the charge and standing alongside Republicans to take back the house, but I can’t do it without a team of grassroots supporters like you. That’s why I’m asking you:can I count on you? My campaign team sent me a note to tell me we haven’t heard from you in a while so I wanted to personally follow up. What the Left is doing to our country is unconscionable. So we have to take action now. Not only is the Taliban now in control of a country we spent 20 years fighting to free, but they have their hands on billions of dollars of OUR military equipment. But the Leftists in charge of Congress right now have different priorities... They voted AGAINST tracking down our American assets in the hands of the Taliban They want to give nearly half a million dollars to illegals crossing our border They want to increase taxes for every hard working American And the more we learn, the worse it gets! With Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer controlling Congress and REFUSING to hold President Biden accountable: This is just the beginning. That’s why we have to take back the House. And we have to start NOW. Help Team Mace TAKE BACK CONGRESS -- Donate below!** I hope you’ll join me to take back the House. Because the only way we do that is by keeping this swing seat in Republican hands. Most sincerely, Nancy Mace | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Dr. Mary L. Trump
subject: It’s official: My uncle is campaigning in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5763?t=1006&akid=1291%2E3611125%2Ee_y2g- ]A personal message from Mary Trump

It’s official, folks: my uncle, the most dangerous man in
America, just announced he’s going to campaign for Glenn Youngkin in the
Virginia governor’s race.

Terry McAuliffe needs your support right now — more than ever. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5763?t=1007&akid=1291%2E3611125%2Ee_y2g- ]He set a
rapid response goal of raising 10,000 grassroots contributions before my
uncle’s rally in Virginia, and he needs your help. Will you split a
donation between Terry’s campaign and Tim Ryan right now?

Glenn Youngkin might pretend he’s a moderate, pragmatic Republican.

But the truth is, he’s just as bad as Donald Trump — that’s why Donald has
endorsed him eight times.

And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are
attached at the hip — they’re gone now. Donald Trump is all in for
Youngkin.

We worked much too hard to stomp out right-wing extremism last year — and
I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up to make sure my uncle’s
radical followers, like Glenn Youngkin, aren’t given the chance to gain
power.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5763?t=1008&akid=1291%2E3611125%2Ee_y2g- ]We need your support right now. Split a donation of any amount between
Tim Ryan and Terry’s campaign to help Terry stand up and reject Trump and
Youngkin — for good this time.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5763?t=1009&akid=1291%2E3611125%2Ee_y2g- ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5764?t=1010&akid=1291%2E3611125%2Ee_y2g- ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5766?t=1012&akid=1291%2E3611125%2Ee_y2g- ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5767?t=1013&akid=1291%2E3611125%2Ee_y2g- ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5763?t=1014&akid=1291%2E3611125%2Ee_y2g- ]Other Amount

Thank you,

Dr. Mary L. Trump, PhD

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=1291%2E3611125%2Ee_y2g- ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: We need 16,379 donations before Sunday.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We started the day about 17,400 donations short of the 75,000 goal we need to reach before Sunday
#

This is it.
We have about 48 hours to go until our end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close.
We started the day about 17,400 donations short of the 75,000 goal we need to reach before Sunday. And when we sent this email, we had about 16,300 left.
So we need to make up that gap.
If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make your first online $3 contribution to Mark’s re-election, there is quite simply no better time than right now. It’s the only way we’ll reach our goal.
Here’s your link to donate.
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/Oct-Deadline**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211029-2-15&t=1&refcode2=1609_6688874_bFFBgp&akid=1609%2E6688874%2EbFFBgp)

name: Sam Ricketts, Evergreen Action
subject: The largest-ever investment in climate action in American history.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Right now, we need to give our proven advocacy work all we've got.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3946?t=3&akid=12897%2E53494%2EVOTDYU) Friend, The last 24 hours have been a non-stop rush of political news. I'm writing to make sure this point isn't lost: **Yesterday was a major victory for the climate movement.** With you by our side, Evergreen has been a big part of the movement demanding bold climate policies that meet the moment. And yesterday, we saw the fruits of our labor in the text of the Build Back Better framework. Below, I'm going to outline the most important climate investments in the package. (You might recognize a _lot_ of these ideas from our policy memos.) [**_But first, I need to ask: Can you chip in to help us capitalize on this historic moment?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3946?t=4&akid=12897%2E53494%2EVOTDYU) | [CHIP IN](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3946?t=5&akid=12897%2E53494%2EVOTDYU)
---
Plain and simple: If this framework becomes law, it would represent the largest-ever investment in climate action in American history.
The Build Back Better framework incorporates many of our top priorities, including clean energy tax credits, a Civilian Climate Corps, funding to address environmental injustice, investments in a clean energy economy, and the creation of hundreds of thousands of good-paying union jobs. So now we must pass this bill. Period.
Still with me? Alright, let's get into it:
**CLIMATE INVESTMENTS IN THE BUILD BACK BETTER FRAMEWORK**
**Clean Energy Tax Credits**
* $320 billion in tax incentives for clean electricity, electric vehicles, clean buildings, advanced energy manufacturing, industrial decarbonization, and more
* Absolutely essential for meeting Biden's climate commitments
* Supports good-paying union jobs and investments in disadvantaged communities

**Greenhouse Gas Reduction Fund (aka Clean Energy Accelerator / Green Bank)**
* $29 billion in support for clean energy and electric vehicle charging infrastructure
* At least 40% of the benefits will support disadvantaged communities
* Builds upon proven state and local green banks and their job-creating success

**Civilian Climate Corps**
* Jumpstart a nationwide climate workforce mobilization
* Creates 300,000 jobs with a living wage and benefits
* Prepares for good-paying careers in the clean economy

**Environmental Justice**
* Invests directly in priorities identified by environmental justice leaders
* $9 billion for lead remediation
* $3 billion to reduce air pollution at ports
* $65 million to collect data on communities facing environmental injustice
* $3 billion for Environmental & Climate Justice Block Grants
* $150 billion for affordable housing and community needs

**Clean Buildings**
* Makes American homes and businesses cleaner, more affordable, and climate-ready
* $12 billion in consumer rebates for electric appliances and energy efficiency retrofits
* $2 billion for electrification and efficiency improvements for affordable housing.

**Clean Vehicles**
* $5 billion to replace polluting heavy-duty vehicles with clean vehicles
* Creates tax credits for purchasing electric vehicles
* Provides resources for EV charging stations

**Clean Electricity**
* 10-year extension of renewable energy tax credits
* $10 billion for rural communities to invest in renewable energy
* $40 billion in loan guarantees for innovative clean energy projects

And there are even more climate benefits in this bill. In short: It must pass.
[**_All of our advocacy has led to this moment. And by and large, it's worked. Now, we need to do everything in our power to pass this bill. If you're with us, I need you to chip in today._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3946?t=6&akid=12897%2E53494%2EVOTDYU)
[CHIP IN](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3946?t=7&akid=12897%2E53494%2EVOTDYU)
---
Thanks for everything you've done to get us to this moment. Please know that despite its historic investments, this bill is still just a down payment in the fight against the climate crisis. President Biden must use more aggressive executive action to ensure full climate pollution reductions across every sector of the economy. And at Evergreen Action, we'll be working alongside you to make sure that happens.
Onward,
Sam Ricketts
Co-Director, Evergreen Action
[CHIP IN](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3946?t=8&akid=12897%2E53494%2EVOTDYU)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=12897%2E53494%2EVOTDYU).Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible.| PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

| Dear Patriot, It pays big money to be an illegal immigrant. Joe Biden is about to shell out $450,000 apiece -- and $1 billion in total -- to people who crossed the border illegally. Your hard-earned money is about to be spent rewarding illegal immigrants for breaking the law. Does your job pay $450,000 a year? Mine sure doesn't. **The median household income in the U.S. in 2020 was $67,521 -- less than 20% of what illegal immigrants will now be paid.** **In fact, here’s a short list of high-profile careers that pay less than $450,000 a year:** ***** The President of the United States makes an annual salary of $400,000** ***** Brain surgeons make an average of $324,691 a year, according to Indeed** ***** NFL practice squad players make $252,000 a year** But now, illegal immigrants are about to get a fat paycheck of $450,000 per person. That's money coming out of your paycheck. It could be going towards you and your family, but instead it will be going to reward people who knowingly broke the law. Whose interests does Joe Biden really serve: your interests? Or the interests of illegal immigrants? If Joe Biden thinks he can pull something like this behind closed doors, without the public noticing, he is dead wrong. I'm about to expose him just like I've exposed all the other "heroes" of the Left: Anthony Fauci, Planned Parenthood, and many others. If Biden's going to give more than $1 billion of taxpayer money to illegal immigrants, the American public deserves to know about it. And now, our country is about to face the music for our reckless spending, with hyperinflation, a supply chain crisis, and economic recession. The last thing we need is another $1 billion in reckless government spending. And we certainly don't need it going towards rewarding people for crossing the border illegally! I'm going to expose Joe Biden for his irresponsible mishandling of the border crisis. And I'm going to expose him for his ridiculous plan to give YOUR tax money -- $450,000 apiece! -- to reward illegal immigrants. Will you help me get the word out?
