clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, It pays big money to be an illegal immigrant. Joe Biden is about to shell out $450,000 apiece -- and $1 billion in total -- to people who crossed the border illegally. Your hard-earned money is about to be spent rewarding illegal immigrants for breaking the law. Does your job pay $450,000 a year? Mine sure doesn't. The median household income in the U.S. in 2020 was $67,521 -- less than 20% of what illegal immigrants will now be paid. In fact, here’s a short list of high-profile careers that pay less than $450,000 a year: *** The President of the United States makes an annual salary of $400,000 *** Brain surgeons make an average of $324,691 a year, according to Indeed *** NFL practice squad players make $252,000 a year But now, illegal immigrants are about to get a fat paycheck of $450,000 per person. That's money coming out of your paycheck. It could be going towards you and your family, but instead it will be going to reward people who knowingly broke the law. Whose interests does Joe Biden really serve: your interests? Or the interests of illegal immigrants? If Joe Biden thinks he can pull something like this behind closed doors, without the public noticing, he is dead wrong. I'm about to expose him just like I've exposed all the other "heroes" of the Left: Anthony Fauci, Planned Parenthood, and many others. If Biden's going to give more than $1 billion of taxpayer money to illegal immigrants, the American public deserves to know about it. America is nearly $30 trillion in debt. And now, our country is about to face the music for our reckless spending, with hyperinflation, a supply chain crisis, and economic recession. The last thing we need is another $1 billion in reckless government spending. And we certainly don't need it going towards rewarding people for crossing the border illegally! I'm going to expose Joe Biden for his irresponsible mishandling of the border crisis. And I'm going to expose him for his ridiculous plan to give YOUR tax money -- $450,000 apiece! -- to reward illegal immigrants. Will you help me get the word out? In Liberty, | | | | **** P.S. Illegal immigrants are about to strike it rich. Joe Biden’s new plan would pay them more money than NFL players, brain surgeons, and even President Biden himself. This plan is insulting to American taxpayers. The median American household makes $67,521 a year -- less than 20% of what illegal immigrants are about to get. If your answer is "hell no!" then I need your help getting the word out. | | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . name: Charles Booker
subject: Kentucky Bourbon.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, right now,
there is a historic wave of labor strikes happening across the country.

From the folks who make Heaven Hill bourbon here in Kentucky to the
workers at John Deere, workers are claiming their power. And winning.

Just this past weekend, UFCW 23D voted to ratify a new contract with
Heaven Hill after weeks of walking the picket line. So we’re celebrating
and raising a glass to the workers who fought hard for this victory with
some brand new merch — Booker for Kentucky Bourbon glasses.

Here they are, straight off the etching machine:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211029-1122&t=1001&akid=1122%2E346206%2E0Hwy_o ]Photo of Charles Booker for U.S. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211029-1122&t=1002&akid=1122%2E346206%2E0Hwy_o ]Back of glass, which reads 'This
Senate bourbon glass - front bourbon is union made'

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211029-1122&t=1003&akid=1122%2E346206%2E0Hwy_o ]If you’re ready, you can get yourself a glass now by making a donation
of $20 or more. A percentage of the proceeds will go toward supporting the
workers from the United Food and Commercial Workers Union who took
significant risks and fought hard for the benefits and protections they
deserve at Heaven Hill.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211029-1122&t=1004&akid=1122%2E346206%2E0Hwy_o ]Contribute $20 →

Over the years, I’ve been proud to stand on the picket lines with
teachers, on the railroad tracks with coal miners, and with workers at
Churchill Downs. Together, we held the line for fair wages, the right to
unionize, sick days and paid family leave, and for a shot at bettering our
children’s future.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211029-1122&t=1005&akid=1122%2E346206%2E0Hwy_o ]Charles with Heaven Hill Distillery union workers at picket line

So when unionized workers at Heaven Hill Distillery demanded a fair
contract from their management, I understood how important it was to
support the workers as they went on strike to demand that executives
support the people who make this industry the bedrock of Kentucky’s
economy.

Because that’s what we do in Kentucky,
Peter. It’s part of who we are.

The workers I’ve met are the very reason why I’m running this election to
replace Rand Paul. Earlier this year, Rand introduced legislation that
would nationalize anti-union policies. Legislation that has proven to
reduce worker pay and put more money in the pockets of the rich. Together,
we must stand up to politicians like Rand and the companies who are
benefiting from his anti-union agenda.

Peter, our
work isn’t over yet, and there’s a long way to go when it comes to
transforming the future of our Commonwealth and to deliver the policies
that working families in Kentucky need.

So in honor of our Commonwealth’s proud tradition in labor movements — and
in honor of the fights to come — we created a Booker for Kentucky Bourbon
glass.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211029-1122&t=1006&akid=1122%2E346206%2E0Hwy_o ]We’re excited to be able to share this glass with you, and we hope
you’ll consider making a $20 donation to get your very own. 20% of your
contribution will go toward the United Food and Commercial Workers Union
so that they can continue taking on big fights.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211029-1122&t=1007&akid=1122%2E346206%2E0Hwy_o ]Get your Charles Booker bourbon glass

Cheers,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211029-1122-footer&t=1008&refcode2=1122_346206_0Hwy_o&akid=1122%2E346206%2E0Hwy_o

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1122%2E346206%2E0Hwy_o

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: are we sending you too many emails?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Short answer: NOPE
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38092689/313958931/-2023814932?refcode=20211029.12_TM_10JI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJiOTI4Mi0yZDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=arz1W7A3q3UP_kSyMDGB_F-jEt6sHo_y0uQuANMRv54=)

| | Hey Derek,

People ask me all the time: _Why do you send so many emails?_

_**[I’m going to tell you why, but first, can you donate now and help us raise $2,000,000 online by Sunday at midnight? Recent polls show a virtual tie and I need your help to get out the vote in the final 4 days of the campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38092690/313958932/-2023814932?refcode=20211029.12_TM_10JI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJiOTI4Mi0yZDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=arz1W7A3q3UP_kSyMDGB_F-jEt6sHo_y0uQuANMRv54=)**_

So here’s the truth:

Glenn Youngkin is trying to buy the Governor’s office. He’s already written himself multi-million dollar checks, and he’s welcomed support from the likes of Donald Trump, Steve Bannon and Betsy DeVos.

He’s spending huge sums of his own money to attack me and my campaign, and we’re doing our best to try and keep up.

Unlike Glenn, I’m running a campaign powered by a historic army of grassroots supporters. I’m proud that more than 100,000 people have chipped in just a few dollars at a time.

To put it simply, these emails are the most important tool we have to reach our grassroots supporters. We send so many because if we didn’t, Glenn Youngkin would have a clean shot at buying the Governor’s office. With the race close, your support is giving us a real chance to win.

_**[Look, I know it’s a lot, but I’m humbly asking for your support today: will you make a contribution of whatever amount feels right to you today? Your contribution, along with the $20 contributions of thousands of others will add up really quickly, and we’ll be able to take on my self-funding opponent in the final days of this race:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38092691/313958933/-2023814932?refcode=20211029.12_TM_10JI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJiOTI4Mi0yZDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=arz1W7A3q3UP_kSyMDGB_F-jEt6sHo_y0uQuANMRv54=)**_ | | | **[DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38092692/313958934/-2023814932?refcode=20211029.12_TM_10JI&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJiOTI4Mi0yZDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=arz1W7A3q3UP_kSyMDGB_F-jEt6sHo_y0uQuANMRv54=)**

Dear Peter,
I just received word _minutes ago_ that Attorney General Patrick Morrisey’s petition before the **U.S. Supreme Court** to hear a huge case in o**pposition to Biden’s radical climate change policies** has been granted.
You may recall that in 2016, Attorney General Patrick Morrisey led a successful 27-state effort at the U.S. Supreme Court to stop the Obama Power Plan— a radical job-killing proposal that would have provided the EPA with virtually unfettered authority to issue decarbonizing regulations.
With today’s news, West Virginia is in position to severely undermine radical Green New Deal policies.
If Biden prevails with his vision, it would not only **crush many American jobs** and **increase the price of electricity** ; it would provide a **major strategic advantage to China.** China is currently building a massive new fleet of coal-fired power plants at the very same time the United States would be ending coal-fired power plant use and reducing natural gas usage by 50 percent.
**We can’t let that happen!**
Attorney General Patrick Morrisey is **strongly opposed** to allowing President Biden to impose his **price-hiking, job-killing Green New Deal** on the American people. Very soon, you'll be hearing more about West Virginia and the coalition of 20 states who are fighting back against these terrible policies.
Sincerely,
George Staff to Team Morrisey
---

clean_body: | | | | We're heading back to the U.S. Supreme Court! Dear Peter, I just received word minutes ago that Attorney General Patrick Morrisey’s petition before the U.S. Supreme Court to hear a huge case in opposition to Biden’s radical climate change policies has been granted. You may recall that in 2016, Attorney General Patrick Morrisey led a successful 27-state effort at the U.S. Supreme Court to stop the Obama Power Plan— a radical job-killing proposal that would have provided the EPA with virtually unfettered authority to issue decarbonizing regulations. With today’s news, West Virginia is in position to severely undermine radical Green New Deal policies. If Biden prevails with his vision, it would not only crush many American jobs and increase the price of electricity ; it would provide a major strategic advantage to China. China is currently building a massive new fleet of coal-fired power plants at the very same time the United States would be ending coal-fired power plant use and reducing natural gas usage by 50 percent. We can’t let that happen! Attorney General Patrick Morrisey is strongly opposed to allowing President Biden to impose his price-hiking, job-killing Green New Deal on the American people. Very soon, you'll be hearing more about West Virginia and the coalition of 20 states who are fighting back against these terrible policies. Sincerely, George Staff to Team Morrisey | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. **Gone But Never Forgotten 🏅**
Let us never forget the 13 brave men and women who gave their lives during Joe Biden’s disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal. One of those 13 service members was Army Staff Sgt. Ryan Knauss, an East Tennessee native.

It was an honor to support legislation to award the Congressional Gold Medal, Congress’s highest medal, to Ryan and his fellow service members. I continue to pray for the families of these men and women. We can honor their service and sacrifice by keeping their memories alive.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: ICYMI: Patriot, they let a Republican lose!
body:
We're closing in on the end of the month and this has been one of the worst fundraising months we've had!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/qmmWUIqddA0LbsN0OH5FaQ/LTmEOOZv763cfEkdMR0KTc4A)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/qmmWUIqddA0LbsN0OH5FaQ/LTmEOOZv763cfEkdMR0KTc4A) We're closing in on the end of the month and this has been one of the worst fundraising months we've had! If you can [**help me catch up**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/qmmWUIqddA0LbsN0OH5FaQ/LTmEOOZv763cfEkdMR0KTc4A), I'd really appreciate it!

The reality is, I absolutely won't be getting support from the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) - **even after I win the primary and oust a Do-Nothing Republican**.

Knocking out an incumbent is a BIG no-no in the GOP - especially when you're knocking out a party puppet like Dan Webster who does what the Establishment tells him to do.

That's why [**I 'll need your support every step of the way!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/qmmWUIqddA0LbsN0OH5FaQ/LTmEOOZv763cfEkdMR0KTc4A)

Let me give you a few examples of what the NRCC does to "outsider" Republican candidates if they dare to "rock the boat":

In 2020, when Lauren Boebert knocked out incumbent Republican Scott Tipton, did she get support from the NRCC?

If you guessed "NO", you guessed correctly. **They didn 't spend a dime on independent expenditures for Lauren DESPITE spending $80 million on other candidates!**

Remember House Majority Leader Eric Cantor?

He was knocked out by Dave Brat, a conservative college professor who was backed by the TEA Party in 2014.

**The NRCC never spent a DIME on Brat and even LET HIM LOSE in 2018 to Democrat Abigail Spanberger by only 8,270 votes!**

Get the picture here?

The NRCC and RNC will use the hundreds of millions of dollars they collect from patriots like you to protect the establishment - **and that 's it!**

If you want to see a fighter like me in Congress - leading the charge in the HOSTILE TAKEOVER the GOP establishment - [**then you have to help get me there by donating to my campaign directly**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/qmmWUIqddA0LbsN0OH5FaQ/LTmEOOZv763cfEkdMR0KTc4A).

By this coming Sunday, I have to raise $24,118 to get back on track for the month. [**Any amount you can chip in will help me claw away at that**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/qmmWUIqddA0LbsN0OH5FaQ/LTmEOOZv763cfEkdMR0KTc4A), and I really appreciate anything that you can do.

Thanks so much for all that you do. I literally couldn't do it without you.

Respectfully,
